---
title: "eDNA18S"
author: "Nicole Pittoors"
date: "2025-09-18"
output: html_document
---
Set directory, create output directory
```{r set directory}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "./eDNA_18S_CYCLE_ARMS")

# Also set working directory for interactive use
setwd("./eDNA_18S_CYCLE_ARMS")

# Set output directory
#output_dir_eDNA18S <- "./eDNA_18S_CYCLE_ARMS/"

```

Load libraries
```{r load libraries}
# for data management
library(tidyr)
library(plyr)# when using plyr and dplyr, load plyr first
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)

# for diversity analyses
library(vegan)
# for manipulations and analysis of linked asv/metadata tables
library(phyloseq)

# for plotting
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(gridExtra)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(scales)
library(ggsci)

library(lme4)
library(multcomp) 
library(dplyr)
library(emmeans)
library(performance)
library(coin)
library(broom.mixed)
library(patchwork)
library(car)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(MuMIn)
library(openxlsx)
library(kableExtra)
```

Load phyloseq object
```{r}
physeq_eDNA18S <- readRDS("eDNA18S_phyloseq_20250915.rds")
```

Data checks
```{r}
#----------------eDNA Data Overview-------------------
# Examine the phyloseq object structure
print("=== eDNA 18S Phyloseq Object Overview ===")
print(physeq_eDNA18S)

# Basic dimensions
cat("\nBasic Dimensions:\n")
cat("Number of samples:", nsamples(physeq_eDNA18S), "\n")
cat("Number of taxa:", ntaxa(physeq_eDNA18S), "\n")

# Sample information
cat("\nSample Information:\n")
print("Sample names (first 10):")
print(head(sample_names(physeq_eDNA18S), 10))

print("Sample variables:")
print(sample_variables(physeq_eDNA18S))

# Taxonomy information
cat("\nTaxonomy Information:\n")
print("Taxonomic ranks:")
print(rank_names(physeq_eDNA18S))

print("First few taxa names:")
print(head(taxa_names(physeq_eDNA18S), 5))

# Check read distribution
cat("\n=== Read Distribution Analysis ===\n")

# Reads per sample
sample_read_counts_edna <- sample_sums(physeq_eDNA18S)
cat("Sample read counts summary:\n")
print(summary(sample_read_counts_edna))

cat("\nTop 10 samples by read count:\n")
print(sort(sample_read_counts_edna, decreasing = TRUE)[1:10])

# Reads per ASV/taxa
taxa_read_counts_edna <- taxa_sums(physeq_eDNA18S)
cat("\nTaxa read counts summary:\n")
print(summary(taxa_read_counts_edna))

# Check for zero-read ASVs
zero_read_asvs_edna <- sum(taxa_read_counts_edna == 0)
cat("\nASVs with zero reads across all samples:", zero_read_asvs_edna, "\n")

if(zero_read_asvs_edna > 0) {
  cat("Percentage of ASVs with zero reads:", round(zero_read_asvs_edna/ntaxa(physeq_eDNA18S)*100, 2), "%\n")
}

#----------------Extract Components-------------------
cat("\n=== Extracting Phyloseq Components ===\n")

# Extract OTU/ASV table (samples as rows, ASVs as columns for consistency with your ARMS code)
asv_table_eDNA <- as.data.frame(t(otu_table(physeq_eDNA18S)))
cat("ASV table dimensions:", dim(asv_table_eDNA), "(samples x ASVs)\n")

# Extract taxonomy table
tax_table_eDNA <- as.data.frame(tax_table(physeq_eDNA18S))
cat("Taxonomy table dimensions:", dim(tax_table_eDNA), "(ASVs x taxonomic ranks)\n")

# Extract sample metadata
metadata_eDNA <- as.data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA18S))
cat("Metadata dimensions:", dim(metadata_eDNA), "(samples x variables)\n")

print("Metadata column names:")
print(colnames(metadata_eDNA))

#----------------Clean Data (Remove Zero-Read ASVs)-------------------
if(zero_read_asvs_edna > 0) {
  cat("\n=== Removing Zero-Read ASVs ===\n")
  
  # Save original object
  physeq_eDNA18S_original <- physeq_eDNA18S
  
  # Remove zero-read ASVs
  physeq_eDNA18S_clean <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(physeq_eDNA18S) > 0, physeq_eDNA18S)
  
  cat("Original taxa count:", ntaxa(physeq_eDNA18S), "\n")
  cat("Cleaned taxa count:", ntaxa(physeq_eDNA18S_clean), "\n")
  cat("ASVs removed:", ntaxa(physeq_eDNA18S) - ntaxa(physeq_eDNA18S_clean), "\n")
  
  # Update the main object
  physeq_eDNA18S <- physeq_eDNA18S_clean
}
```

# eDNA Metadata Mapping - Add sitelocality and pp_mean columns
# Based on ARMS metadata_18S mapping
```{r}
# First, let's check the current Site_locality values in eDNA data
cat("Current Site_locality values in eDNA data:\n")
print(unique(metadata_eDNA$Site_locality))

# Create mapping from Site_locality to sitelocality based on ARMS data
site_locality_mapping <- c(
  "Diaphus_coral" = "Diaphus_deep1",
  "Diaphus_background" = "Diaphus_deep2", 
  "Alderdice_background" = "Alderdice_deep2",
  "Alderdice_coral" = "Alderdice_deep1",
  "McGrail_coral" = "McGrail_deep",
  "Bright_coral" = "Bright_deep1",
  "Bright_background" = "Bright_deep2",
  "Stetson_coral" = "Stetson_shallow",
  "EFGB_deep" = "EFGB_deep",
  "EFGB_shallow" = "EFGB_shallow",
  "Bright_shallow" = "Bright_shallow",
  "Alderdice_shallow" = "Alderdice_shallow"
)

# Create mapping from sitelocality to pp_mean based on ARMS data
pp_mean_mapping <- c(
  "Stetson_shallow" = 378.0407,
  "EFGB_deep" = 395.8951,
  "EFGB_shallow" = 395.8951,
  "Bright_shallow" = 417.8301,
  "Bright_deep1" = 417.8301,
  "Bright_deep2" = 417.8301,
  "McGrail_deep" = 502.7808,
  "Alderdice_deep1" = 607.4360,
  "Alderdice_deep2" = 607.4360,
  "Alderdice_shallow" = 606.3403,
  "Diaphus_deep1" = 1130.9303,
  "Diaphus_deep2" = 1130.9303
)

# Apply the mapping to create sitelocality column
metadata_eDNA$sitelocality <- site_locality_mapping[metadata_eDNA$Site_locality]

# Check if mapping worked correctly
cat("\nMapping check - Site_locality to sitelocality:\n")
mapping_check <- data.frame(
  Site_locality = metadata_eDNA$Site_locality,
  sitelocality = metadata_eDNA$sitelocality
)
print(unique(mapping_check))

# Apply the pp_mean mapping
metadata_eDNA$pp_mean <- pp_mean_mapping[metadata_eDNA$sitelocality]

# Check the final result
cat("\nFinal mapping check - all three columns:\n")
final_check <- data.frame(
  Site_locality = metadata_eDNA$Site_locality,
  sitelocality = metadata_eDNA$sitelocality,
  pp_mean = metadata_eDNA$pp_mean
)
print(unique(final_check))

# Check for any NA values (which would indicate unmapped categories)
cat("\nChecking for unmapped values:\n")
cat("Any NA in sitelocality:", any(is.na(metadata_eDNA$sitelocality)), "\n")
cat("Any NA in pp_mean:", any(is.na(metadata_eDNA$pp_mean)), "\n")

# Summary of the new columns
cat("\nSummary of new columns:\n")
cat("Unique sitelocality values:\n")
print(sort(unique(metadata_eDNA$sitelocality)))

cat("\nUnique pp_mean values:\n")
print(sort(unique(metadata_eDNA$pp_mean)))

# Display sample distribution by sitelocality
cat("\nSample distribution by sitelocality:\n")
print(table(metadata_eDNA$sitelocality))

# Update the sample_data in the phyloseq object
sample_data(physeq_eDNA18S) <- metadata_eDNA

# Verify the update worked
cat("\nVerifying phyloseq object update:\n")
cat("Sample variables now include:", paste(sample_variables(physeq_eDNA18S), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Save the updated objects
save(physeq_eDNA18S, 
     asv_table_eDNA, 
     tax_table_eDNA, 
     metadata_eDNA, 
     file = "./eDNA_18S_cleaned_data_with_mapping.Rdata")

cat("\nUpdated data saved to: ./eDNA_18S_cleaned_data_with_mapping.Rdata\n")

# Clean up temporary objects
rm(site_locality_mapping, pp_mean_mapping, mapping_check, final_check)

```

eDNA 18S Raw Data Visualization - Updated with sitelocality mapping
```{r raw data vis}
# eDNA 18S Raw Data Visualization - Updated with sitelocality mapping
# Matches ARMS analysis structure and color scheme

# Load required libraries
library(phyloseq)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)

# Load the updated data with mapping (run the mapping script first)
# load("./eDNA_18S_cleaned_data_with_mapping.Rdata")

#----------------Color Scheme and Site Ordering (matching ARMS)-------------------
# Define the same ordered sites as in ARMS analysis
ordered_sites_eDNA <- c("Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_deep", "EFGB_shallow", 
                       "Bright_shallow", "Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2",
                       "McGrail_deep", "Alderdice_deep1", "Alderdice_deep2",
                       "Alderdice_shallow", "Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")

# Define the same color palette as ARMS analysis
c12_sites_eDNA <- c("Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077",      
                   "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
                   "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3",
                   "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
                   "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599",
                   "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599",
                   "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30",
                   "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C",
                   "McGrail_deep" = "#015951",
                   "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E")

#----------------Raw Reads Visualization-------------------
cat("=== Creating eDNA Raw Reads Visualization ===\n")

# Melt the phyloseq data for plotting
eDNA_melted <- psmelt(physeq_eDNA18S)

# Remove rows with NA sitelocality (shouldn't be any after mapping)
eDNA_clean <- eDNA_melted[!is.na(eDNA_melted$sitelocality), ]

cat("Number of samples after removing NAs:", length(unique(eDNA_clean$Sample)), "\n")
cat("Sites present in eDNA data:\n")
print(sort(unique(eDNA_clean$sitelocality)))

# Sum abundances by sample and sitelocality
eDNA_summary <- eDNA_clean %>%
  group_by(Sample, sitelocality) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = 'drop')

# Create simplified sample names mapping
sample_info_eDNA <- data.frame(
  Sample = sample_names(physeq_eDNA18S),
  Sample_ID = sample_data(physeq_eDNA18S)$Sample_ID,
  sitelocality = sample_data(physeq_eDNA18S)$sitelocality,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Remove any NA samples
sample_info_eDNA <- sample_info_eDNA[!is.na(sample_info_eDNA$sitelocality), ]

# Create mapping from long sample names to short Sample_IDs
sample_name_mapping <- setNames(sample_info_eDNA$Sample_ID, sample_info_eDNA$Sample)

cat("Sample name mapping (first 5):\n")
print(head(sample_name_mapping, 5))

# Order samples by site using the same site order as ARMS
sample_info_eDNA$sitelocality <- factor(sample_info_eDNA$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_eDNA)
sample_info_eDNA_ordered <- sample_info_eDNA[order(sample_info_eDNA$sitelocality, sample_info_eDNA$Sample), ]
sampOrder_by_site_eDNA <- sample_info_eDNA_ordered$Sample

# Apply site factor levels and sample ordering to plot data
eDNA_summary$sitelocality <- factor(eDNA_summary$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_eDNA)
eDNA_summary$Sample <- factor(eDNA_summary$Sample, levels = sampOrder_by_site_eDNA)

# Add simplified sample names to the summary data
eDNA_summary$Sample_ID <- sample_name_mapping[as.character(eDNA_summary$Sample)]

# Create raw read abundance barplot (matching ARMS style)
rawBar_eDNA <- ggplot(eDNA_summary, aes(x = factor(Sample_ID, levels = unique(Sample_ID[order(Sample)])), 
                                       y = Abundance, fill = sitelocality)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "Raw Read Counts: eDNA 18S", fill = "Site", x = "Sample ID", y = "Read Abundance") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),  
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),  
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank() 
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_eDNA) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma_format())

print(rawBar_eDNA)

# Save the plot
ggsave("eDNA_18S_RawReads_Sample_Site.pdf", plot = rawBar_eDNA, device = "pdf", 
       scale = 1, width = 11, height = 8.5, units = "in", dpi = 300)

#----------------Save Sample Name Reference-------------------
# Create a reference table for sample name mapping
sample_reference <- data.frame(
  Full_Sample_Name = sample_info_eDNA_ordered$Sample,
  Sample_ID = sample_info_eDNA_ordered$Sample_ID,
  sitelocality = sample_info_eDNA_ordered$sitelocality,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Save the reference table
write.csv(sample_reference, "eDNA_18S_Sample_Name_Reference.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("\nSample name reference saved to: eDNA_18S_Sample_Name_Reference.csv\n")

#----------------Read Sums Distribution Plot-------------------
cat("\n=== Creating Read Distribution Plots ===\n")

# Create read sums dataframe (matching ARMS script exactly)
readsumsdf_eDNA <- data.frame(nreads = sort(taxa_sums(physeq_eDNA18S), TRUE), 
                             sorted = 1:ntaxa(physeq_eDNA18S), type = "ASVs")
readsumsdf_eDNA <- rbind(readsumsdf_eDNA, 
                        data.frame(nreads = sort(sample_sums(physeq_eDNA18S), TRUE), 
                                  sorted = 1:nsamples(physeq_eDNA18S), 
                                  type = "Samples"))

readplot_eDNA <- ggplot(readsumsdf_eDNA, aes(x = sorted, y = nreads)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "eDNA 18S: Total Reads by ASV, Sample", y = "Reads", x = "Sorted") +
  scale_y_log10(labels = comma_format()) +
  facet_wrap(~type, 1, scales = "free") +
  theme_light()

print(readplot_eDNA)

# Save
ggsave("eDNA_18S_Reads_ASVs_Samples.pdf", plot = readplot_eDNA, 
       width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

#----------------Summary by Site-------------------
cat("\n=== Site-based Summary ===\n")

# Calculate summary statistics by site
site_summary <- eDNA_summary %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    total_reads = sum(Abundance),
    mean_reads_per_sample = round(mean(Abundance), 0),
    median_reads_per_sample = round(median(Abundance), 0),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

print("Summary by sitelocality:")
print(site_summary)

# Create a site summary plot
site_plot <- ggplot(site_summary, aes(x = factor(sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_eDNA), 
                                     y = total_reads, fill = sitelocality)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "Total Reads by Site - eDNA 18S", 
       x = "Site", 
       y = "Total Reads",
       fill = "Site") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_eDNA) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma_format())

print(site_plot)

# Save site summary plot
ggsave("eDNA_18S_Total_Reads_by_Site.pdf", plot = site_plot, 
       width = 10, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

#----------------Final Summary Statistics-------------------
cat("\n=== Final eDNA Summary Statistics ===\n")
cat("Dataset: eDNA 18S\n")
cat("Number of samples:", nsamples(physeq_eDNA18S), "\n")
cat("Number of ASVs:", ntaxa(physeq_eDNA18S), "\n")
cat("Total reads:", sum(sample_sums(physeq_eDNA18S)), "\n")
cat("Mean reads per sample:", round(mean(sample_sums(physeq_eDNA18S)), 2), "\n")
cat("Mean ASVs per sample:", round(mean(metadata_eDNA$numberASVs), 2), "\n")

cat("\nSample distribution by sitelocality:\n")
print(table(metadata_eDNA$sitelocality))

cat("\nDepth range by sitelocality:\n")
depth_summary <- metadata_eDNA %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    min_depth = min(Depth, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_depth = max(Depth, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_depth = round(mean(Depth, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )
print(depth_summary)

# Clean up
rm(eDNA_melted, eDNA_clean, eDNA_summary, rawBar_eDNA, readsumsdf_eDNA, 
   readplot_eDNA, sample_info_eDNA, sample_info_eDNA_ordered, 
   site_summary, site_plot, depth_summary, sample_name_mapping, sample_reference)

cat("\n=== eDNA Raw Data Overview Complete ===\n")
cat("All plots saved as PDF files\n")
cat("Ready for taxonomic analysis!\n")
```

# ================================================
# ------------- Data Rarefaction -----------------
# ================================================
eDNA 18S Rarefaction Analysis
```{r rarefaction}
# eDNA 18S Rarefaction Analysis
# Adapted from ARMS analysis - focused on site comparisons

# Load required libraries
#library(phyloseq)
#library(ggplot2)
#library(dplyr)
#library(vegan)  # for rrarefy function

# Load the eDNA data with mapping (run mapping script first if needed)
# load("./eDNA_18S_cleaned_data_with_mapping.Rdata")

# Use the same color scheme as previous eDNA plots
ordered_sites_eDNA <- c("Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_deep", "EFGB_shallow", 
                       "Bright_shallow", "Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2",
                       "McGrail_deep", "Alderdice_deep1", "Alderdice_deep2",
                       "Alderdice_shallow", "Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")

c12_sites_eDNA <- c("Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077",      
                   "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
                   "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3",
                   "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
                   "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599",
                   "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599",
                   "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30",
                   "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C",
                   "McGrail_deep" = "#015951",
                   "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E")

#------------RAREFACTION CURVES---------------------
cat("=== eDNA 18S Rarefaction Analysis ===\n")

# 1. Generate rarefaction data
cat("1. Extracting ASV table correctly...\n")

# Check the original phyloseq structure
cat("Original phyloseq structure:\n")
cat("Taxa are rows:", taxa_are_rows(otu_table(physeq_eDNA18S)), "\n")
cat("OTU table dimensions:", dim(otu_table(physeq_eDNA18S)), "\n")

# Extract OTU table - since taxa_are_rows = FALSE, samples are already rows
asv_table_t_eDNA <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA18S))

# Get sample metadata
metadata_eDNA_rarefaction <- as.data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA18S))

cat("ASV table dimensions:", dim(asv_table_t_eDNA), "(samples x ASVs)\n")

# Check read depths first
cat("\nRead depth summary for eDNA samples:\n")
read_depths <- rowSums(asv_table_t_eDNA)
print(summary(read_depths))

# Generate rarefaction curves
# Set the steps for rarefaction (adjust max based on your data)
max_depth <- min(read_depths)  # Use minimum sample depth
cat("Minimum sample depth:", max_depth, "\n")

# Set steps - adjust based on your data range
if(max_depth > 1000) {
  step_size <- max(50, max_depth %/% 50)  # Create ~50 steps
} else {
  step_size <- max(10, max_depth %/% 20)  # Create ~20 steps for smaller datasets
}

steps <- seq(step_size, max_depth, by = step_size)
cat("Rarefaction steps: from", min(steps), "to", max(steps), "by", step_size, "\n")

cat("2. Generating rarefaction curves...\n")

# Create rarefaction data
rarefaction_data_eDNA <- data.frame()

for(i in seq_along(steps)) {
  step <- steps[i]
  if(i %% 5 == 0) cat("Processing step", i, "of", length(steps), "(depth =", step, ")\n")
  
  # Rarefy to current step
  rare_result <- rrarefy(asv_table_t_eDNA, step)
  
  # Calculate richness for each sample
  richness <- rowSums(rare_result > 0)
  
  # Create temporary dataframe
  temp_df <- data.frame(
    sample = rownames(rare_result),
    step = step,
    richness = richness
  )
  
  # Add to main dataframe
  rarefaction_data_eDNA <- rbind(rarefaction_data_eDNA, temp_df)
}

# Add metadata to rarefaction data
rarefaction_data_eDNA <- merge(rarefaction_data_eDNA, metadata_eDNA_rarefaction, 
                              by.x = "sample", by.y = "row.names")

cat("Rarefaction data generated with", nrow(rarefaction_data_eDNA), "rows\n")

#2 Create Summary data for plotting
cat("3. Creating summary data for plotting...\n")

# Summary by sitelocality
site_richness_summary_eDNA <- rarefaction_data_eDNA %>%
  group_by(step, sitelocality) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_richness = mean(richness, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_richness = sd(richness, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_samples = n(),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

# Check which sites are present
cat("Sites present in rarefaction data:\n")
print(sort(unique(site_richness_summary_eDNA$sitelocality)))

# Summary by depth categories (alternative grouping for eDNA)
# Create depth categories
metadata_eDNA_rarefaction$depth_category <- cut(metadata_eDNA_rarefaction$Depth,
                                               breaks = c(0, 100, 500, 1000, Inf),
                                               labels = c("Shallow (<100m)", "Medium (100-500m)", 
                                                        "Deep (500-1000m)", "Very Deep (>1000m)"),
                                               include.lowest = TRUE)

# Add depth category to rarefaction data
rarefaction_data_eDNA <- merge(rarefaction_data_eDNA, 
                              metadata_eDNA_rarefaction[, c("depth_category"), drop = FALSE], 
                              by.x = "sample", by.y = "row.names")

# Summary by depth category
depth_richness_summary_eDNA <- rarefaction_data_eDNA %>%
  group_by(step, depth_category) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_richness = mean(richness, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_richness = sd(richness, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_samples = n(),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(depth_category))

#3 Plot rarefaction curves
cat("4. Creating rarefaction curve plots...\n")

# Plot by sitelocality
site_plot_eDNA <- ggplot(site_richness_summary_eDNA, 
                        aes(x = step, y = mean_richness, color = sitelocality, fill = sitelocality)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_richness - se_richness, ymax = mean_richness + se_richness), 
              alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, alpha = 0.8, linewidth = 1.2) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c12_sites_eDNA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_eDNA) +
  labs(title = "eDNA 18S: Rarefaction Curves by Site",
       x = "Sampling Depth (reads)", 
       y = "Average number of ASVs (richness)",
       color = "Site",
       fill = "Site") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 11),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(site_plot_eDNA)

# Save plots
ggsave("eDNA_18S_rarefaction_by_site.pdf", plot = site_plot_eDNA, device = "pdf", 
       width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Check reads stats for rarefaction decision
cat("\n=== Rarefaction Decision Analysis ===\n")
set.seed(42)

# Check your read depths
cat("Read depth summary for eDNA samples:\n")
print(summary(sample_sums(physeq_eDNA18S)))

min_reads <- min(sample_sums(physeq_eDNA18S))
cat("\nMinimum sample depth:", min_reads, "\n")

# Show which sample has minimum reads
min_sample <- names(which.min(sample_sums(physeq_eDNA18S)))
cat("Sample with minimum reads:", min_sample, "\n")

# Conservative approach - rarefy to minimum depth to keep all samples
cat("\n5. Performing rarefaction to minimum depth...\n")
physeq_eDNA_rarefied <- rarefy_even_depth(physeq_eDNA18S, sample.size = min_reads, rngseed = 42)

# Check what we have after rarefaction
cat("\nBefore rarefaction:\n")
print(physeq_eDNA18S)

cat("\nAfter rarefaction:\n")
print(physeq_eDNA_rarefied)


# Calculate what was removed
asvs_before <- ntaxa(physeq_eDNA18S)
asvs_after <- ntaxa(physeq_eDNA_rarefied)
asvs_removed <- asvs_before - asvs_after

cat("\nRarefaction Results:\n")
cat("ASVs before rarefaction:", asvs_before, "\n")
cat("ASVs after rarefaction:", asvs_after, "\n") 
cat("ASVs removed:", asvs_removed, "\n")
cat("Percentage retained:", round(asvs_after/asvs_before * 100, 1), "%\n")

# Check which ASVs were removed (the rare ones)
if(asvs_removed > 0) {
  removed_asvs <- setdiff(taxa_names(physeq_eDNA18S), taxa_names(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
  cat("Number of ASVs removed:", length(removed_asvs), "\n")
  
  # Look at abundance of removed ASVs in original data
  removed_abundances <- taxa_sums(physeq_eDNA18S)[removed_asvs]
  cat("Abundance summary of removed ASVs:\n")
  print(summary(removed_abundances))
  
  cat("Most abundant removed ASV had", max(removed_abundances), "total reads\n")
}

# Export rarefied phyloseq object
save(physeq_eDNA_rarefied, file = "./physeq_eDNA18S_rarefied.Rdata")
cat("\nRarefied phyloseq object saved to: ./physeq_eDNA18S_rarefied.Rdata\n")

# Also save rarefaction curve data
save(rarefaction_data_eDNA, site_richness_summary_eDNA, depth_richness_summary_eDNA,
     file = "./eDNA_18S_rarefaction_data.Rdata")
cat("Rarefaction curve data saved to: ./eDNA_18S_rarefaction_data.Rdata\n")

# Summary statistics
cat("\n=== Final Summary ===\n")
cat("Rarefaction depth used:", min_reads, "reads per sample\n")
cat("Samples retained:", nsamples(physeq_eDNA_rarefied), "\n")
cat("ASVs retained:", ntaxa(physeq_eDNA_rarefied), "\n")
cat("Sites analyzed:", length(unique(metadata_eDNA$sitelocality)), "\n")

cat("\n=== Rarefaction Analysis Complete ===\n")
```
# ==================================================
# ------------- Diversity Statistics ---------------
# ==================================================
Calculate diversity indices:
Observed ASVs (richness)
Shannon diversity (log base 2)
Simpson diversity
Pielou's evenness
Margalef richness index
Chao1 & ACE (richness estimates)
Jaccard dissimilarity (mean per sample)

Visualizations Created:
Shannon vs Simpson violin plots by site
Richness vs Pielou's Evenness faceted violin plots
Both with error bars, means, and jittered points

Files Saved:
eDNA_18S_diversity_indices_rarefied.csv - All calculated indices
eDNA_18S_presence_absence_rarefied.csv - Binary ASV table
eDNA_18S_abundance_table_rarefied.csv - Rarefied abundance data
eDNA_18S_diversity_summary_by_site.csv - Summary statistics by site
Two PDF plots for diversity visualization
eDNA_18S_rarefied_with_diversity.Rdata - Complete R workspace
```{r}
# Create output directory
if(!dir.exists("./Alpha_Div_eDNA")) {
  dir.create("./Alpha_Div_eDNA")
  cat("Created directory: ./Alpha_Div_eDNA\n")
}

# ---------------------- DIVERSITY INDICES -----------------
cat("=== Calculating Diversity Indices from Rarefied eDNA Data ===\n")

# 1: Calculate Diversity Indices from Rarefied Data
cat("1. Extracting rarefied ASV table...\n")

# Extract ASV table (samples as rows, ASVs as columns)
# Since taxa_are_rows = FALSE in eDNA data, no need to transpose
asv_table_rarefied_eDNA <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))

# Verify dimensions
cat("Rarefied ASV table dimensions:", 
    nrow(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA), "samples x", ncol(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA), "ASVs\n")

# Create metadata dataframe from rarefied object
meta_eDNA_rarefied <- as.data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))

# Check rarefaction depth
rarefaction_depth <- unique(rowSums(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA))
cat("Rarefaction depth:", rarefaction_depth, "reads per sample\n")

# Presence/absence transformation
presence_absence_rarefied_eDNA <- asv_table_rarefied_eDNA
presence_absence_rarefied_eDNA[presence_absence_rarefied_eDNA > 0] <- 1

# Sample codes
sampleCode_eDNA <- rownames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)

cat("2. Calculating diversity indices...\n")

# Calculate diversity indices
relativeAbundance_eDNA <- rowSums(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA)  # Should all equal rarefaction depth
numberASVs_eDNA <- rowSums(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA > 0)
Shannon_eDNA <- vegan::diversity(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA, base = 2)
Simpson_eDNA <- vegan::diversity(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA, "simpson")
Pielou_eDNA <- Shannon_eDNA / log(numberASVs_eDNA, base = 2)  # Fixed: use numberASVs_eDNA not numberOTUs
Margalef_eDNA <- (numberASVs_eDNA - 1) / log(relativeAbundance_eDNA)

# Jaccard dissimilarity
cat("3. Calculating Jaccard dissimilarity...\n")
jaccard_dist_eDNA <- vegan::vegdist(presence_absence_rarefied_eDNA, method = "jaccard")
jaccard_mean_eDNA <- apply(as.matrix(jaccard_dist_eDNA), 1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)

# Build diversity dataframe
div_indices_rarefied_eDNA <- data.frame(
  relativeAbundance = relativeAbundance_eDNA,
  numberASVs = numberASVs_eDNA,
  Shannon = Shannon_eDNA,
  Simpson = Simpson_eDNA,
  Pielou = Pielou_eDNA,
  Margalef = Margalef_eDNA,
  Jaccard_mean_dissim = jaccard_mean_eDNA,
  row.names = sampleCode_eDNA
)

cat("4. Adding richness estimates...\n")

# Add Chao1 and ACE
richness_estimates_rarefied_eDNA <- estimate_richness(physeq_eDNA_rarefied, measures = c("Chao1", "ACE"))
div_indices_rarefied_eDNA$Chao1 <- richness_estimates_rarefied_eDNA$Chao1
div_indices_rarefied_eDNA$ACE <- richness_estimates_rarefied_eDNA$ACE

# Remove existing columns if they exist, merge diversity indices into metadata
if("relativeAbundance" %in% colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)) {
  meta_eDNA_rarefied$relativeAbundance <- NULL
}
if("numberASVs" %in% colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)) {
  meta_eDNA_rarefied$numberASVs <- NULL
}

meta_eDNA_rarefied <- cbind(meta_eDNA_rarefied, div_indices_rarefied_eDNA[rownames(meta_eDNA_rarefied), ])

# Reassign metadata back to phyloseq object
sample_data(physeq_eDNA_rarefied) <- sample_data(meta_eDNA_rarefied)

# Check that all objects have the same sample order
cat("5. Sample order consistency check:\n")
cat("phyloseq samples match metadata:", identical(sample_names(physeq_eDNA_rarefied), rownames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)), "\n")
cat("phyloseq samples match ASV table:", identical(sample_names(physeq_eDNA_rarefied), rownames(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA)), "\n")
cat("phyloseq samples match diversity indices:", identical(sample_names(physeq_eDNA_rarefied), rownames(div_indices_rarefied_eDNA)), "\n")

# Display diversity summary
cat("\nDiversity indices summary:\n")
print(summary(div_indices_rarefied_eDNA))

cat("6. Saving diversity data...\n")

# Save outputs
write.csv(div_indices_rarefied_eDNA, 
          "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_18S_diversity_indices_rarefied.csv", 
          quote = FALSE, row.names = TRUE)

write.csv(presence_absence_rarefied_eDNA, 
          "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_18S_presence_absence_rarefied.csv", 
          quote = FALSE, row.names = TRUE)

write.csv(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA, 
          "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_18S_abundance_table_rarefied.csv", 
          quote = FALSE, row.names = TRUE)

save(meta_eDNA_rarefied, physeq_eDNA_rarefied, div_indices_rarefied_eDNA, 
     file = "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_18S_rarefied_with_diversity.Rdata")

# ---------------------- VISUALIZATION -----------------
cat("\n=== Creating Diversity Visualizations ===\n")

# Prepare data for plotting (add sitelocality to div_indices)
div_indices_with_site <- div_indices_rarefied_eDNA
div_indices_with_site$sitelocality <- meta_eDNA_rarefied$sitelocality

# 2: Box Plot by SITELOCALITY (using rarefied data)
# Shannon and Simpson diversity
cat("1. Creating Shannon and Simpson diversity box plot...\n")

# Create custom box plot instead of using plot_richness
# First prepare the data
diversity_plot_data <- div_indices_with_site %>%
  dplyr::select(sitelocality, Shannon, Simpson) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Shannon, Simpson), 
               names_to = "Metric", 
               values_to = "Value")

# Create box plot (skip the summary step - use individual values)
rich_eDNA <- ggplot(diversity_plot_data, aes(x = factor(sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_eDNA), 
                                            y = Value, fill = sitelocality)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", alpha = 0.8, width = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +  # Add individual points
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_eDNA) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = paste0("eDNA 18S: Alpha Diversity by Site (Rarefied to ", rarefaction_depth, " reads)"), 
       fill = "Site", 
       x = "Site",
       y = "Diversity Value") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = 'black', size = 11, angle = -90, vjust = 1, hjust = 0),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  )

print(rich_eDNA)

# Save plot
ggsave("eDNA_18S_alphaDiv_Locality_boxplot_rarefied.pdf", plot = rich_eDNA, device = "pdf", 
       path = "./Alpha_Div_eDNA",
       scale = 1, width = 14, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)


# 3: Richness versus Pielou's Evenness Bar Plot
cat("2. Creating Richness vs Pielou's Evenness bar plot...\n")

# Convert to long format and calculate summary statistics
div_long_eDNA <- div_indices_with_site %>%
  dplyr::select(sitelocality, numberASVs, Pielou) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(numberASVs, Pielou), 
               names_to = "Metric", 
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Metric = case_when(
    Metric == "numberASVs" ~ "Observed ASVs",
    Metric == "Pielou" ~ "Pielou's Evenness"
  ))

# Calculate means and standard errors
div_summary_eDNA <- div_long_eDNA %>%
  group_by(sitelocality, Metric) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_value = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_value = sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

# Create faceted bar plot
rich_combined_eDNA <- ggplot(div_summary_eDNA, aes(x = factor(sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_eDNA), 
                                                  y = mean_value, fill = sitelocality)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", alpha = 0.8, width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_value - se_value, ymax = mean_value + se_value), 
                width = 0.3, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_eDNA) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  labs(title = paste0("eDNA 18S: Alpha Diversity by Site (Rarefied to ", rarefaction_depth, " reads)"), 
       y = "Value", x = "Site", fill = "Site") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = 'black', size = 11, angle = -90, vjust = 1, hjust = 0),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  )

print(rich_combined_eDNA)

# Save plot
ggsave("eDNA_18S_alphaDiv_Locality_barplot_rarefied_RvP.pdf", plot = rich_combined_eDNA, 
       device = "pdf", path = "./Alpha_Div_eDNA",
       scale = 1, width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# ---------------------- SUMMARY STATISTICS -----------------
cat("\n=== Diversity Summary by Site ===\n")

# Calculate summary statistics by site
diversity_summary_by_site <- div_indices_with_site %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    mean_ASVs = round(mean(numberASVs), 1),
    se_ASVs = round(sd(numberASVs)/sqrt(n()), 1),
    mean_Shannon = round(mean(Shannon), 2),
    se_Shannon = round(sd(Shannon)/sqrt(n()), 2),
    mean_Simpson = round(mean(Simpson), 3),
    se_Simpson = round(sd(Simpson)/sqrt(n()), 3),
    mean_Pielou = round(mean(Pielou), 3),
    se_Pielou = round(sd(Pielou)/sqrt(n()), 3),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

print("Diversity summary by sitelocality:")
print(diversity_summary_by_site)

# Save summary
write.csv(diversity_summary_by_site, 
          "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_18S_diversity_summary_by_site.csv", 
          quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)

# Clean up temporary objects
rm(asv_table_rarefied_eDNA, presence_absence_rarefied_eDNA, richness_estimates_rarefied_eDNA,
   div_indices_with_site, div_long_eDNA, rich_eDNA, rich_combined_eDNA)
```

# eDNA Site Ranking and Diversity Hotspot Analysis

```{r Site Ranking and Diversity Hotspot Analysis}
# ---------------------- FIX DUPLICATE COLUMNS -----------------
cat("0. Checking and fixing duplicate columns...\n")

# Check for duplicate column names
duplicate_cols <- duplicated(colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied))
cat("Duplicate columns found:", sum(duplicate_cols), "\n")

if(sum(duplicate_cols) > 0) {
  cat("Duplicate column names found. Removing duplicates...\n")
  
  # Show which columns are duplicated
  dup_names <- colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)[duplicate_cols]
  cat("Removing duplicate columns:", paste(unique(dup_names), collapse = ", "), "\n")
  
  # Remove duplicate columns (keep only the first occurrence)
  meta_eDNA_rarefied <- meta_eDNA_rarefied[, !duplicate_cols]
  
  cat("Cleaned metadata dimensions:", dim(meta_eDNA_rarefied), "\n")
  cat("Remaining columns:", paste(colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied), collapse = ", "), "\n")
}

# Check that we have the required diversity columns
required_cols <- c("numberASVs", "Shannon", "Simpson", "Pielou", "Chao1")
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied))

if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required diversity columns: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "), 
       "\nPlease run the diversity analysis script first.")
}
# ---------------------- SITE DIVERSITY RANKING -----------------
cat("1. Calculating site diversity rankings...\n")

# Calculate mean diversity metrics by site
site_diversity_summary <- meta_eDNA_rarefied %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    mean_depth = round(mean(Depth, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    mean_ASVs = round(mean(numberASVs), 1),
    se_ASVs = round(sd(numberASVs)/sqrt(n()), 1),
    mean_Shannon = round(mean(Shannon), 2),
    se_Shannon = round(sd(Shannon)/sqrt(n()), 2),
    mean_Simpson = round(mean(Simpson), 3),
    se_Simpson = round(sd(Simpson)/sqrt(n()), 3),
    mean_Pielou = round(mean(Pielou), 3),
    se_Pielou = round(sd(Pielou)/sqrt(n()), 3),
    mean_Chao1 = round(mean(Chao1), 1),
    se_Chao1 = round(sd(Chao1)/sqrt(n()), 1),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

# Add rankings for each metric
site_diversity_summary <- site_diversity_summary %>%
  mutate(
    rank_ASVs = rank(-mean_ASVs),
    rank_Shannon = rank(-mean_Shannon),
    rank_Simpson = rank(-mean_Simpson),
    rank_Pielou = rank(-mean_Pielou),
    rank_Chao1 = rank(-mean_Chao1),
    # Average rank across all metrics
    avg_rank = round((rank_ASVs + rank_Shannon + rank_Simpson + rank_Pielou + rank_Chao1) / 5, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(avg_rank)

print("Site diversity rankings (1 = highest diversity):")
print(site_diversity_summary)

# ---------------------- DIVERSITY HOTSPOTS IDENTIFICATION -----------------
cat("2. Identifying diversity hotspots and coldspots...\n")

# Identify top and bottom sites for each metric
top_sites <- list(
  ASVs = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_min(rank_ASVs, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality),
  Shannon = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_min(rank_Shannon, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality),
  Simpson = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_min(rank_Simpson, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality),
  Pielou = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_min(rank_Pielou, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality),
  Overall = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_min(avg_rank, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality)
)

bottom_sites <- list(
  ASVs = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_max(rank_ASVs, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality),
  Shannon = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_max(rank_Shannon, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality),
  Simpson = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_max(rank_Simpson, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality),
  Pielou = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_max(rank_Pielou, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality),
  Overall = site_diversity_summary %>% slice_max(avg_rank, n = 3) %>% pull(sitelocality)
)

# Print hotspots and coldspots
cat("\nDIVERSITY HOTSPOTS (Top 3 sites):\n")
for(metric in names(top_sites)) {
  cat(paste0(metric, ": ", paste(top_sites[[metric]], collapse = ", "), "\n"))
}

cat("\nDIVERSITY COLDSPOTS (Bottom 3 sites):\n")
for(metric in names(bottom_sites)) {
  cat(paste0(metric, ": ", paste(bottom_sites[[metric]], collapse = ", "), "\n"))
}

# ---------------------- DEPTH PATTERN ANALYSIS -----------------
cat("3. Analyzing depth patterns...\n")

# Create depth categories
site_diversity_summary$depth_category <- cut(site_diversity_summary$mean_depth,
                                           breaks = c(0, 100, 500, 1000, Inf),
                                           labels = c("Shallow (<100m)", "Medium (100-500m)", 
                                                    "Deep (500-1000m)", "Very Deep (>1000m)"),
                                           include.lowest = TRUE)

# Depth category summary
depth_diversity_summary <- site_diversity_summary %>%
  group_by(depth_category) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_sites = n(),
    depth_range = paste0(round(min(mean_depth)), "-", round(max(mean_depth)), "m"),
    mean_ASVs = round(mean(mean_ASVs), 1),
    mean_Shannon = round(mean(mean_Shannon), 2),
    mean_Simpson = round(mean(mean_Simpson), 3),
    mean_Pielou = round(mean(mean_Pielou), 3),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(depth_category))

print("Diversity by depth category:")
print(depth_diversity_summary)

# ---------------------- ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS -----------------
cat("4. Simple environmental correlations...\n")

# Calculate correlations with environmental variables
env_vars_edna <- c("Depth", "Visibility_std_rank", "pp_mean")
diversity_vars_edna <- c("numberASVs", "Shannon", "Simpson", "Pielou", "Chao1")

# Create correlation matrix
cor_results <- data.frame()

for(env_var in env_vars_edna) {
  if(env_var %in% colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)) {
    for(div_var in diversity_vars_edna) {
      # Calculate correlation for each site (using site means)
      site_env <- meta_eDNA_rarefied %>%
        group_by(sitelocality) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(
          env_value = mean(get(env_var), na.rm = TRUE),
          div_value = mean(get(div_var), na.rm = TRUE),
          .groups = 'drop'
        )
      
      cor_test <- cor.test(site_env$env_value, site_env$div_value, method = "pearson")
      
      cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, data.frame(
        Environmental_Variable = env_var,
        Diversity_Metric = div_var,
        Correlation = round(cor_test$estimate, 3),
        P_value = round(cor_test$p.value, 3),
        Significant = cor_test$p.value < 0.05
      ))
    }
  }
}

print("Environmental correlations (site-level):")
print(cor_results %>% arrange(P_value))

# ---------------------- VISUALIZATION -----------------
cat("5. Creating visualizations...\n")

# Site ranking heatmap
ranking_data <- site_diversity_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(sitelocality, rank_ASVs, rank_Shannon, rank_Simpson, rank_Pielou, rank_Chao1) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("rank_"), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Rank") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Metric = gsub("rank_", "", Metric))

heatmap_plot <- ggplot(ranking_data, aes(x = Metric, y = factor(sitelocality, levels = rev(ordered_sites_eDNA)), 
                                        fill = Rank)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option = 'magma', name = "Rank\n(1=highest)") +
  labs(title = "eDNA Diversity Rankings by Site",
       x = "Diversity Metric",
       y = "Site") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

print(heatmap_plot)

# Overall ranking bar plot
overall_ranking_plot <- ggplot(site_diversity_summary, 
                              aes(x = factor(sitelocality, levels = site_diversity_summary$sitelocality), 
                                  y = avg_rank, fill = sitelocality)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_eDNA) +
  labs(title = "Overall Diversity Ranking by Site",
       subtitle = "Lower values = higher diversity (average across all metrics)",
       x = "Site",
       y = "Average Rank") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = avg_rank), vjust = -0.3, size = 3)

print(overall_ranking_plot)

# Depth vs diversity scatter plots
depth_plots <- list()

for(i in 1:length(diversity_vars)) {
  div_var <- diversity_vars[i]
  
  depth_plots[[i]] <- ggplot(site_diversity_summary, 
                            aes(x = mean_depth, y = get(paste0("mean_", div_var)), 
                                color = sitelocality)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", alpha = 0.3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c12_sites_eDNA) +
    labs(title = paste("Depth vs", gsub("number", "", div_var)),
         x = "Mean Depth (m)",
         y = paste("Mean", gsub("number", "", div_var))) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
}

# Combine depth plots
depth_combined <- gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs = depth_plots, ncol = 2)

# ---------------------- SAVE OUTPUTS -----------------
cat("6. Saving results...\n")

# Save data tables
write.csv(site_diversity_summary, "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_site_diversity_rankings.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(depth_diversity_summary, "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_depth_diversity_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(cor_results, "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_environmental_correlations.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Save plots
ggsave("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_diversity_ranking_heatmap.pdf", plot = heatmap_plot, 
       width = 8, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_overall_diversity_ranking.pdf", plot = overall_ranking_plot, 
       width = 12, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_depth_diversity_relationships.pdf", plot = depth_combined, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Summary report
cat("\n=== SITE RANKING SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("HIGHEST DIVERSITY SITES (overall):\n")
cat(paste("1.", site_diversity_summary$sitelocality[1], "(avg rank:", site_diversity_summary$avg_rank[1], ")\n"))
cat(paste("2.", site_diversity_summary$sitelocality[2], "(avg rank:", site_diversity_summary$avg_rank[2], ")\n"))
cat(paste("3.", site_diversity_summary$sitelocality[3], "(avg rank:", site_diversity_summary$avg_rank[3], ")\n"))

cat("\nLOWEST DIVERSITY SITES (overall):\n")
n_sites <- nrow(site_diversity_summary)
cat(paste("1.", site_diversity_summary$sitelocality[n_sites], "(avg rank:", site_diversity_summary$avg_rank[n_sites], ")\n"))
cat(paste("2.", site_diversity_summary$sitelocality[n_sites-1], "(avg rank:", site_diversity_summary$avg_rank[n_sites-1], ")\n"))
cat(paste("3.", site_diversity_summary$sitelocality[n_sites-2], "(avg rank:", site_diversity_summary$avg_rank[n_sites-2], ")\n"))

# Count significant environmental correlations
sig_cors <- sum(cor_results$Significant, na.rm = TRUE)
total_cors <- nrow(cor_results)
cat(paste("\nENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATIONS:", sig_cors, "of", total_cors, "correlations significant (p < 0.05)\n"))
```


```{r}
# eDNA Community Overlap and ASV Sharing Analysis
# Analysis of ASV sharing patterns between sites


# Try to load UpSetR, if not available, skip that plot
upset_available <- FALSE
tryCatch({
  library(UpSetR)
  upset_available <- TRUE
  cat("UpSetR library loaded successfully\n")
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("UpSetR library not available. UpSet plot will be skipped.\n")
  cat("To install UpSetR: install.packages('UpSetR')\n")
})

# Try to load VennDiagram as alternative
venn_available <- FALSE
tryCatch({
  library(VennDiagram)
  venn_available <- TRUE
  cat("VennDiagram library loaded successfully\n")
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("VennDiagram library not available.\n")
})


# ---------------------- PREPARE ASV PRESENCE/ABSENCE DATA -----------------
cat("1. Preparing ASV presence/absence data by site...\n")

# Get ASV table (samples as rows, ASVs as columns)
asv_table_eDNA <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
metadata_eDNA_overlap <- as.data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))

# Create presence/absence table by site
asv_by_site <- list()

for(site in ordered_sites_eDNA) {
  # Get samples for this site
  site_samples <- rownames(metadata_eDNA_overlap)[metadata_eDNA_overlap$sitelocality == site]
  
  if(length(site_samples) > 0) {
    # Get ASVs present in at least one sample from this site
    site_asv_table <- asv_table_eDNA[site_samples, , drop = FALSE]
    
    # ASVs present at this site (present in at least one sample)
    present_asvs <- colnames(site_asv_table)[colSums(site_asv_table > 0) > 0]
    asv_by_site[[site]] <- present_asvs
    
    cat("Site", site, ":", length(present_asvs), "ASVs\n")
  }
}

# ---------------------- ASV SHARING STATISTICS -----------------
cat("2. Calculating ASV sharing statistics...\n")

# Calculate sharing metrics
total_asvs <- length(unique(unlist(asv_by_site)))
cat("Total unique ASVs across all sites:", total_asvs, "\n")

# ASVs present at each number of sites
sharing_stats <- data.frame(
  num_sites = 1:length(asv_by_site),
  num_asvs = 0,
  percentage = 0
)

all_asvs <- unique(unlist(asv_by_site))

for(asv in all_asvs) {
  sites_with_asv <- sum(sapply(asv_by_site, function(x) asv %in% x))
  sharing_stats$num_asvs[sites_with_asv] <- sharing_stats$num_asvs[sites_with_asv] + 1
}

sharing_stats$percentage <- round(sharing_stats$num_asvs / total_asvs * 100, 1)

# Add categories
sharing_stats$category <- c(
  "Site-specific (1 site)",
  "Rare (2 sites)", 
  "Uncommon (3 sites)",
  "Limited (4 sites)",
  "Moderate (5 sites)",
  "Common (6 sites)",
  "Widespread (7 sites)",
  "Very common (8 sites)",
  "Highly shared (9 sites)",
  "Nearly ubiquitous (10 sites)",
  "Almost universal (11 sites)",
  "Universal (all 12 sites)"
)[1:length(asv_by_site)]

print("ASV sharing distribution:")
print(sharing_stats)

# Identify site-specific and widespread ASVs
site_specific_asvs <- all_asvs[sapply(all_asvs, function(asv) sum(sapply(asv_by_site, function(x) asv %in% x)) == 1)]
widespread_asvs <- all_asvs[sapply(all_asvs, function(asv) sum(sapply(asv_by_site, function(x) asv %in% x)) >= length(asv_by_site) * 0.75)]

cat("\nSite-specific ASVs:", length(site_specific_asvs), "(", round(length(site_specific_asvs)/total_asvs*100, 1), "%)\n")
cat("Widespread ASVs (≥75% of sites):", length(widespread_asvs), "(", round(length(widespread_asvs)/total_asvs*100, 1), "%)\n")

# ---------------------- PAIRWISE SITE SIMILARITY -----------------
cat("3. Calculating pairwise site similarity...\n")

# Calculate Jaccard similarity between all site pairs
sites_with_data <- names(asv_by_site)
n_sites <- length(sites_with_data)

jaccard_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = n_sites, ncol = n_sites)
rownames(jaccard_matrix) <- colnames(jaccard_matrix) <- sites_with_data

for(i in 1:n_sites) {
  for(j in 1:n_sites) {
    site1_asvs <- asv_by_site[[sites_with_data[i]]]
    site2_asvs <- asv_by_site[[sites_with_data[j]]]
    
    intersection <- length(intersect(site1_asvs, site2_asvs))
    union <- length(union(site1_asvs, site2_asvs))
    
    jaccard_matrix[i, j] <- intersection / union
  }
}

# Find most and least similar site pairs
jaccard_matrix_lower <- jaccard_matrix
jaccard_matrix_lower[upper.tri(jaccard_matrix_lower, diag = TRUE)] <- NA

max_similarity <- max(jaccard_matrix_lower, na.rm = TRUE)
min_similarity <- min(jaccard_matrix_lower, na.rm = TRUE)

max_pair <- which(jaccard_matrix_lower == max_similarity, arr.ind = TRUE)
min_pair <- which(jaccard_matrix_lower == min_similarity, arr.ind = TRUE)

cat("Most similar sites:", sites_with_data[max_pair[1, 1]], "and", sites_with_data[max_pair[1, 2]], 
    "(Jaccard =", round(max_similarity, 3), ")\n")
cat("Least similar sites:", sites_with_data[min_pair[1, 1]], "and", sites_with_data[min_pair[1, 2]], 
    "(Jaccard =", round(min_similarity, 3), ")\n")

# ---------------------- VISUALIZATIONS -----------------
cat("4. Creating visualizations...\n")

# ASV sharing distribution plot
sharing_plot <- ggplot(sharing_stats, aes(x = num_sites, y = num_asvs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(num_asvs, "\n(", percentage, "%)")), 
            vjust = -0.2, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of ASV Sharing Across Sites",
       subtitle = paste("Total ASVs:", total_asvs),
       x = "Number of Sites with ASV",
       y = "Number of ASVs") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:length(asv_by_site)) +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  )

print(sharing_plot)

# Site similarity heatmap
jaccard_df <- reshape2::melt(jaccard_matrix)
colnames(jaccard_df) <- c("Site1", "Site2", "Jaccard_Similarity")

similarity_heatmap <- ggplot(jaccard_df, aes(x = Site1, y = Site2, fill = Jaccard_Similarity)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Jaccard\nSimilarity", option = "plasma") +
  labs(title = "Pairwise Site Similarity (ASV Composition)",
       x = "Site", y = "Site") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  coord_fixed()

print(similarity_heatmap)

# ASVs per site barplot
site_asv_counts <- data.frame(
  site = names(asv_by_site),
  asv_count = sapply(asv_by_site, length)
) %>%
  arrange(desc(asv_count))

site_richness_plot <- ggplot(site_asv_counts, aes(x = factor(site, levels = site), y = asv_count, fill = site)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_eDNA) +
  labs(title = "ASV Richness by Site",
       x = "Site", y = "Number of ASVs") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = asv_count), vjust = -0.3, size = 3)

print(site_richness_plot)

# ---------------------- UPSET PLOT FOR MULTI-SITE OVERLAPS -----------------
cat("5. Creating UpSet plot for multi-site overlaps...\n")

# Prepare data for UpSet plot
# Create binary matrix: rows = ASVs, columns = sites
upset_data <- matrix(0, nrow = total_asvs, ncol = length(asv_by_site))
rownames(upset_data) <- all_asvs
colnames(upset_data) <- names(asv_by_site)

for(site in names(asv_by_site)) {
  upset_data[asv_by_site[[site]], site] <- 1
}

# Convert to data frame for UpSet
upset_df <- as.data.frame(upset_data)

# Create UpSet plot if library is available
if(upset_available) {
  pdf("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_ASV_upset_plot.pdf", width = 14, height = 8)
  UpSetR::upset(upset_df, 
        sets = names(asv_by_site),
        sets.bar.color = c12_sites_eDNA[names(asv_by_site)],
        order.by = "freq",
        decreasing = TRUE,
        mb.ratio = c(0.7, 0.3),
        text.scale = c(1.3, 1.1, 1, 1, 1.5, 0.75),
        mainbar.y.label = "ASV Intersection Size",
        sets.x.label = "ASVs per Site")
  dev.off()
  cat("UpSet plot saved to: ./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_ASV_upset_plot.pdf\n")
} else {
  cat("UpSetR not available. Creating alternative visualization...\n")
  
  # Alternative: Create a simple intersection plot showing top intersections
  # Calculate intersection sizes for all site combinations
  intersection_data <- data.frame()
  
  # Two-way intersections
  sites_list <- names(asv_by_site)
  for(i in 1:(length(sites_list)-1)) {
    for(j in (i+1):length(sites_list)) {
      site1 <- sites_list[i]
      site2 <- sites_list[j]
      intersection_size <- length(intersect(asv_by_site[[site1]], asv_by_site[[site2]]))
      
      intersection_data <- rbind(intersection_data, data.frame(
        combination = paste(site1, "∩", site2),
        type = "Two-way",
        size = intersection_size,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
  
  # Top intersections plot
  top_intersections <- intersection_data %>%
    arrange(desc(size)) %>%
    head(15)
  
  intersection_plot <- ggplot(top_intersections, aes(x = reorder(combination, size), y = size)) +
    geom_col(fill = "steelblue", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "Top 15 Site Pairwise ASV Intersections",
         x = "Site Combination", y = "Number of Shared ASVs") +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    geom_text(aes(label = size), hjust = -0.1, size = 3)
  
  print(intersection_plot)
  
  ggsave("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_site_intersections_alternative.pdf", plot = intersection_plot, 
         width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  
  cat("Alternative intersection plot created and saved.\n")
}

# ---------------------- CORE AND UNIQUE ASV ANALYSIS -----------------
cat("6. Analyzing core and unique ASVs...\n")

# Core ASVs (present in ≥75% of sites)
core_threshold <- ceiling(length(asv_by_site) * 0.75)
core_asvs <- all_asvs[sapply(all_asvs, function(asv) sum(sapply(asv_by_site, function(x) asv %in% x)) >= core_threshold)]

# Unique ASVs for each site
unique_asvs_by_site <- list()
for(site in names(asv_by_site)) {
  other_sites <- names(asv_by_site)[names(asv_by_site) != site]
  other_asvs <- unique(unlist(asv_by_site[other_sites]))
  unique_asvs_by_site[[site]] <- setdiff(asv_by_site[[site]], other_asvs)
}

# Summary table
site_summary <- data.frame(
  Site = names(asv_by_site),
  Total_ASVs = sapply(asv_by_site, length),
  Unique_ASVs = sapply(unique_asvs_by_site, length),
  Core_ASVs = sapply(names(asv_by_site), function(site) sum(core_asvs %in% asv_by_site[[site]])),
  Percent_Unique = round(sapply(unique_asvs_by_site, length) / sapply(asv_by_site, length) * 100, 1)
) %>%
  arrange(desc(Total_ASVs))

print("Site ASV summary:")
print(site_summary)

cat("\nCore ASVs (present in ≥", core_threshold, "sites):", length(core_asvs), "\n")

# ---------------------- SAVE OUTPUTS -----------------
cat("7. Saving results...\n")

# Save data tables
write.csv(sharing_stats, "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_ASV_sharing_distribution.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(site_summary, "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_site_ASV_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(jaccard_df, "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_site_similarity_matrix.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Save core and unique ASV lists
if(length(core_asvs) > 0) {
  write.table(core_asvs, "./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_core_ASVs.txt", 
              quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)
}

for(site in names(unique_asvs_by_site)) {
  if(length(unique_asvs_by_site[[site]]) > 0) {
    write.table(unique_asvs_by_site[[site]], 
                paste0("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_unique_ASVs_", gsub("_", "", site), ".txt"),
                quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)
  }
}

# Save plots
ggsave("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_ASV_sharing_distribution.pdf", plot = sharing_plot, 
       width = 10, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_site_similarity_heatmap.pdf", plot = similarity_heatmap, 
       width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_site_ASV_richness.pdf", plot = site_richness_plot, 
       width = 12, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# ---------------------- SUMMARY REPORT -----------------
cat("\n=== COMMUNITY OVERLAP SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("TOTAL ASVs:", total_asvs, "\n")
cat("CORE ASVs (≥75% sites):", length(core_asvs), "(", round(length(core_asvs)/total_asvs*100, 1), "%)\n")
cat("SITE-SPECIFIC ASVs:", length(site_specific_asvs), "(", round(length(site_specific_asvs)/total_asvs*100, 1), "%)\n")

cat("\nRICHEST SITES:\n")
for(i in 1:3) {
  cat(paste(i, ".", site_summary$Site[i], ":", site_summary$Total_ASVs[i], "ASVs\n"))
}

cat("\nMOST UNIQUE SITES (% unique ASVs):\n")
unique_sorted <- site_summary[order(-site_summary$Percent_Unique), ]
for(i in 1:3) {
  cat(paste(i, ".", unique_sorted$Site[i], ":", unique_sorted$Percent_Unique[i], "%\n"))
}

```

# Comprehensive summary for Methods and Results sections
```{r summary stats}
# Load required libraries
#library(phyloseq)
#library(dplyr)

# Load the data (adjust path as needed)
# load("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_18S_rarefied_with_diversity.Rdata")

# ---------------------- BASIC DATA OVERVIEW -----------------
cat("1. BASIC DATA OVERVIEW\n")
cat("----------------------\n")

# Remove duplicate columns if they exist
duplicate_cols <- duplicated(colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied))
if(sum(duplicate_cols) > 0) {
  meta_eDNA_rarefied <- meta_eDNA_rarefied[, !duplicate_cols]
  cat("(Duplicate columns removed from metadata)\n")
}

# Basic dimensions
n_samples <- nsamples(physeq_eDNA_rarefied)
n_asvs <- ntaxa(physeq_eDNA_rarefied)
n_sites <- length(unique(meta_eDNA_rarefied$sitelocality))
total_reads <- sum(sample_sums(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
rarefaction_depth <- unique(sample_sums(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))[1]

cat("Number of samples:", n_samples, "\n")
cat("Number of ASVs:", n_asvs, "\n")
cat("Number of sites:", n_sites, "\n")
cat("Total sequencing reads:", format(total_reads, big.mark = ","), "\n")
cat("Rarefaction depth:", format(rarefaction_depth, big.mark = ","), "reads per sample\n")

# Samples per site
samples_per_site <- table(meta_eDNA_rarefied$sitelocality)
cat("Samples per site: mean =", round(mean(samples_per_site), 1), 
    "± SD =", round(sd(samples_per_site), 1), 
    "(range:", min(samples_per_site), "-", max(samples_per_site), ")\n")

cat("\n")

# ---------------------- ASV RICHNESS STATISTICS -----------------
cat("2. ASV RICHNESS STATISTICS\n")
cat("--------------------------\n")

# ASVs per sample statistics (this is what you specifically asked for)
asvs_per_sample <- meta_eDNA_rarefied$numberASVs
cat("ASVs per sample:\n")
cat("  Mean ± SD:", round(mean(asvs_per_sample), 1), "±", round(sd(asvs_per_sample), 1), "\n")
cat("  Median (IQR):", round(median(asvs_per_sample), 1), 
    "(", round(quantile(asvs_per_sample, 0.25), 1), "-", round(quantile(asvs_per_sample, 0.75), 1), ")\n")
cat("  Range:", min(asvs_per_sample), "-", max(asvs_per_sample), "\n")

# Richness estimates
cat("Chao1 richness estimates:\n")
cat("  Mean ± SD:", round(mean(meta_eDNA_rarefied$Chao1), 1), "±", round(sd(meta_eDNA_rarefied$Chao1), 1), "\n")
cat("  Range:", round(min(meta_eDNA_rarefied$Chao1), 1), "-", round(max(meta_eDNA_rarefied$Chao1), 1), "\n")

cat("\n")

# ---------------------- ALPHA DIVERSITY STATISTICS -----------------
cat("3. ALPHA DIVERSITY STATISTICS\n")
cat("-----------------------------\n")

# Shannon diversity
shannon_stats <- meta_eDNA_rarefied$Shannon
cat("Shannon diversity (H'):\n")
cat("  Mean ± SD:", round(mean(shannon_stats), 2), "±", round(sd(shannon_stats), 2), "\n")
cat("  Range:", round(min(shannon_stats), 2), "-", round(max(shannon_stats), 2), "\n")

# Simpson diversity
simpson_stats <- meta_eDNA_rarefied$Simpson
cat("Simpson diversity (1-D):\n")
cat("  Mean ± SD:", round(mean(simpson_stats), 3), "±", round(sd(simpson_stats), 3), "\n")
cat("  Range:", round(min(simpson_stats), 3), "-", round(max(simpson_stats), 3), "\n")

# Pielou's evenness
pielou_stats <- meta_eDNA_rarefied$Pielou
cat("Pielou's evenness (J'):\n")
cat("  Mean ± SD:", round(mean(pielou_stats), 3), "±", round(sd(pielou_stats), 3), "\n")
cat("  Range:", round(min(pielou_stats), 3), "-", round(max(pielou_stats), 3), "\n")

cat("\n")

# ---------------------- SITE-LEVEL DIVERSITY SUMMARY -----------------
cat("4. SITE-LEVEL DIVERSITY SUMMARY\n")
cat("-------------------------------\n")

# Calculate site-level statistics
site_summary <- meta_eDNA_rarefied %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    mean_depth = round(mean(Depth, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
    mean_ASVs = round(mean(numberASVs), 1),
    mean_Shannon = round(mean(Shannon), 2),
    mean_Simpson = round(mean(Simpson), 3),
    mean_Pielou = round(mean(Pielou), 3),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_ASVs))

# Highest and lowest diversity sites
cat("Highest ASV richness sites:\n")
for(i in 1:3) {
  cat("  ", i, ".", site_summary$sitelocality[i], ":", site_summary$mean_ASVs[i], "ASVs\n")
}

cat("Lowest ASV richness sites:\n")
n_sites_total <- nrow(site_summary)
for(i in (n_sites_total-2):n_sites_total) {
  cat("  ", n_sites_total-i+1, ".", site_summary$sitelocality[i], ":", site_summary$mean_ASVs[i], "ASVs\n")
}

# Range across sites
cat("Range across sites:\n")
cat("  ASV richness:", min(site_summary$mean_ASVs), "-", max(site_summary$mean_ASVs), 
    "(", round(max(site_summary$mean_ASVs)/min(site_summary$mean_ASVs), 1), "x difference)\n")
cat("  Shannon diversity:", min(site_summary$mean_Shannon), "-", max(site_summary$mean_Shannon), "\n")

cat("\n")

# ---------------------- COMMUNITY OVERLAP STATISTICS -----------------
cat("5. COMMUNITY OVERLAP AND SHARING\n")
cat("--------------------------------\n")

# Calculate ASV sharing (simplified version of the overlap analysis)
asv_table_summary <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))

# ASVs by site
asv_by_site_summary <- list()
for(site in unique(meta_eDNA_rarefied$sitelocality)) {
  site_samples <- rownames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)[meta_eDNA_rarefied$sitelocality == site]
  site_asv_table <- asv_table_summary[site_samples, , drop = FALSE]
  present_asvs <- colnames(site_asv_table)[colSums(site_asv_table > 0) > 0]
  asv_by_site_summary[[site]] <- present_asvs
}

# Calculate sharing statistics
all_asvs_summary <- unique(unlist(asv_by_site_summary))
total_unique_asvs <- length(all_asvs_summary)

# Site-specific ASVs
site_specific_count <- sum(sapply(all_asvs_summary, function(asv) {
  sum(sapply(asv_by_site_summary, function(x) asv %in% x)) == 1
}))

# Widespread ASVs (≥75% of sites)
widespread_threshold <- ceiling(length(asv_by_site_summary) * 0.75)
widespread_count <- sum(sapply(all_asvs_summary, function(asv) {
  sum(sapply(asv_by_site_summary, function(x) asv %in% x)) >= widespread_threshold
}))

cat("Total unique ASVs across sites:", total_unique_asvs, "\n")
cat("Site-specific ASVs:", site_specific_count, "(", round(site_specific_count/total_unique_asvs*100, 1), "%)\n")
cat("Widespread ASVs (≥", widespread_threshold, "sites):", widespread_count, 
    "(", round(widespread_count/total_unique_asvs*100, 1), "%)\n")

# ASV richness range by site
site_asv_counts <- sapply(asv_by_site_summary, length)
cat("ASVs per site: range", min(site_asv_counts), "-", max(site_asv_counts), 
    "(", round(max(site_asv_counts)/min(site_asv_counts), 1), "x difference)\n")

cat("\n")

# ---------------------- ENVIRONMENTAL CONTEXT -----------------
cat("6. ENVIRONMENTAL CONTEXT\n")
cat("------------------------\n")

# Depth range
depth_range <- range(meta_eDNA_rarefied$Depth, na.rm = TRUE)
cat("Sampling depth range:", depth_range[1], "-", depth_range[2], "m\n")

# Temperature range (if available)
if("Temperature" %in% colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)) {
  temp_range <- range(meta_eDNA_rarefied$Temperature, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("Temperature range:", round(temp_range[1], 1), "-", round(temp_range[2], 1), "°C\n")
}

# Salinity range (if available)
if("Salinity" %in% colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)) {
  sal_range <- range(meta_eDNA_rarefied$Salinity, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("Salinity range:", round(sal_range[1], 1), "-", round(sal_range[2], 1), "\n")
}

cat("\n")

# ---------------------- TAXONOMIC OVERVIEW -----------------
cat("7. TAXONOMIC COMPOSITION OVERVIEW\n")
cat("---------------------------------\n")

# Get taxonomy data
tax_data <- as.data.frame(tax_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
asv_data <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))

# Calculate reads per taxon
tax_data$total_reads <- colSums(asv_data)

# Top phyla
phylum_summary <- tax_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(phylum) & phylum != "") %>%
  group_by(phylum) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_asvs = n(),
    total_reads = sum(total_reads),
    percentage = round(sum(total_reads) / sum(tax_data$total_reads) * 100, 1),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_reads))

cat("Number of phyla represented:", nrow(phylum_summary), "\n")
cat("Top 5 phyla by abundance:\n")
for(i in 1:min(5, nrow(phylum_summary))) {
  cat("  ", i, ".", phylum_summary$phylum[i], ":", phylum_summary$percentage[i], 
      "% (", phylum_summary$n_asvs[i], "ASVs)\n")
}

# Cumulative percentage of top phyla
top5_cumulative <- sum(phylum_summary$percentage[1:min(5, nrow(phylum_summary))])
cat("Top 5 phyla represent", round(top5_cumulative, 1), "% of total reads\n")

cat("\n")

# ---------------------- DATA SUMMARY TABLE -----------------
cat("8. PUBLICATION-READY SUMMARY TABLE\n")
cat("----------------------------------\n")

# Create a summary table suitable for publication
summary_table <- data.frame(
  Metric = c(
    "Samples (n)",
    "Sites (n)", 
    "Total ASVs",
    "Rarefaction depth (reads)",
    "ASVs per sample",
    "Shannon diversity (H')",
    "Simpson diversity (1-D)",
    "Pielou's evenness (J')",
    "Chao1 richness",
    "Site-specific ASVs (%)",
    "Widespread ASVs (%)",
    "Depth range (m)",
    "Dominant phylum"
  ),
  Value = c(
    as.character(n_samples),
    as.character(n_sites),
    as.character(n_asvs),
    format(rarefaction_depth, big.mark = ","),
    paste0(round(mean(asvs_per_sample), 1), " ± ", round(sd(asvs_per_sample), 1)),
    paste0(round(mean(shannon_stats), 2), " ± ", round(sd(shannon_stats), 2)),
    paste0(round(mean(simpson_stats), 3), " ± ", round(sd(simpson_stats), 3)),
    paste0(round(mean(pielou_stats), 3), " ± ", round(sd(pielou_stats), 3)),
    paste0(round(mean(meta_eDNA_rarefied$Chao1), 1), " ± ", round(sd(meta_eDNA_rarefied$Chao1), 1)),
    paste0(round(site_specific_count/total_unique_asvs*100, 1), "%"),
    paste0(round(widespread_count/total_unique_asvs*100, 1), "%"),
    paste0(depth_range[1], "-", depth_range[2]),
    paste0(phylum_summary$phylum[1], " (", phylum_summary$percentage[1], "%)")
  )
)

print(summary_table)

cat("\n")

# ---------------------- SAVE OUTPUTS -----------------
cat("9. SAVING SUMMARY STATISTICS\n")
cat("----------------------------\n")

# Create output directory
if(!dir.exists("./Manuscript_Stats")) {
  dir.create("./Manuscript_Stats")
}

# Save the publication table
write.csv(summary_table, "./Manuscript_Stats/eDNA_publication_summary_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Save detailed site statistics
write.csv(site_summary, "./Manuscript_Stats/eDNA_site_diversity_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Save sample-level statistics for supplementary material
sample_stats <- meta_eDNA_rarefied %>%
  select(sitelocality, Sample_ID, Depth, numberASVs, Shannon, Simpson, Pielou, Chao1) %>%
  arrange(sitelocality, Sample_ID)

write.csv(sample_stats, "./Manuscript_Stats/eDNA_sample_diversity_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Save taxonomy summary
write.csv(phylum_summary, "./Manuscript_Stats/eDNA_phylum_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

# UNIFIED eDNA 18S ANALYSIS FRAMEWORK
# eDNA 18S ANALYSIS: PROPER HANDLING OF TECHNICAL REPLICATES
# Uses replicates for statistical testing, aggregates for reporting
```{r}
library(phyloseq)
library(car)       # Type II tests
library(emmeans)   # Post-hoc comparisons
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
```

```{r}
# ========= PART 0: DATA PREPARATION ========================

cat("=== DATA STRUCTURE ===\n")

# Clean duplicate columns
duplicate_cols <- duplicated(colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied))
if(sum(duplicate_cols) > 0) {
  cat("Removing", sum(duplicate_cols), "duplicate columns\n")
  meta_eDNA_rarefied <- meta_eDNA_rarefied[, !duplicate_cols]
}

# Show sample structure
cat("\nSample structure:\n")
print(table(meta_eDNA_rarefied$sitelocality))
cat("Total samples:", nrow(meta_eDNA_rarefied), "\n")
cat("Number of sites:", length(unique(meta_eDNA_rarefied$sitelocality)), "\n\n")

cat("Statistical approach:\n")
cat("• Using n =", nrow(meta_eDNA_rarefied), "samples for hypothesis testing\n")
cat("• Sequential Niskin replicates treated as technical replicates\n")
cat("• P-values interpreted conservatively due to pseudo-replication\n")
cat("• Site-level means calculated for reporting and visualization\n\n")

# ===============  PART 1: SITE EFFECTS - HYPOTHESIS TESTING (USES ALL REPLICATES) ==================

cat("=== PART 1: TESTING FOR SITE DIFFERENCES ===\n")
cat("Using all", nrow(meta_eDNA_rarefied), "samples (technical replicates)\n\n")

diversity_metrics <- c("Shannon", "Simpson", "Pielou", "numberASVs", "Chao1")
site_models <- list()
site_results <- data.frame()

for(metric in diversity_metrics) {
  cat("--- Analyzing", metric, "---\n")
  
  # Fit linear model with all replicates
  formula_str <- paste(metric, "~ sitelocality")
  site_models[[metric]] <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = meta_eDNA_rarefied)
  
  # Type II ANOVA
  anova_result <- Anova(site_models[[metric]], type = "II")
  print(anova_result)
  
  # Model fit
  r2 <- summary(site_models[[metric]])$r.squared
  adj_r2 <- summary(site_models[[metric]])$adj.r.squared
  cat("R² =", round(r2, 3), "| Adjusted R² =", round(adj_r2, 3), "\n")
  
  # Calculate effective sample size (conservative)
  n_sites <- length(unique(meta_eDNA_rarefied$sitelocality))
  cat("Note: Effective n ≈", n_sites, "sites (not", nrow(meta_eDNA_rarefied), "samples)\n\n")
  
  # Store results
  site_results <- rbind(site_results, data.frame(
    Metric = metric,
    F_value = anova_result["sitelocality", "F value"],
    df1 = anova_result["sitelocality", "Df"],
    df2 = anova_result["Residuals", "Df"],
    p_value = anova_result["sitelocality", "Pr(>F)"],
    R_squared = r2,
    Adj_R_squared = adj_r2,
    Significant = anova_result["sitelocality", "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05,
    Conservative_sig = anova_result["sitelocality", "Pr(>F)"] < 0.01  # More stringent
  ))
}

cat("\nSITE EFFECTS SUMMARY:\n")
print(site_results[, c("Metric", "F_value", "p_value", "R_squared", 
                       "Significant", "Conservative_sig")])
cat("\n")

# =========  PART 2: POST-HOC COMPARISONS (CONDITIONAL) =================

cat("=== PART 2: POST-HOC SITE COMPARISONS ===\n\n")

posthoc_results <- list()

for(metric in diversity_metrics) {
  
  site_p <- site_results$p_value[site_results$Metric == metric]
  
  # Use more conservative threshold due to pseudo-replication
  if(!is.na(site_p) && site_p < 0.01) {  # More stringent α
    cat(metric, "- Site effect highly significant (p =", round(site_p, 4), ")\n")
    cat("Running Tukey HSD post-hoc tests...\n")
    
    # Estimated marginal means
    emm <- emmeans(site_models[[metric]], ~ sitelocality)
    pairs <- pairs(emm, adjust = "tukey")
    
    posthoc_results[[metric]] <- list(
      emmeans = as.data.frame(emm),
      contrasts = as.data.frame(pairs)
    )
    
    # Show significant pairs
    sig_pairs <- as.data.frame(pairs) %>%
      filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
      arrange(p.value)
    
    if(nrow(sig_pairs) > 0) {
      cat("Significant pairwise differences (α = 0.05, post-hoc):\n")
      print(sig_pairs[, c("contrast", "estimate", "SE", "t.ratio", "p.value")])
    } else {
      cat("No significant pairwise differences after Tukey correction\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
    
  } else if(!is.na(site_p) && site_p < 0.05) {
    cat(metric, "- Site effect marginally significant (p =", round(site_p, 4), ")\n")
    cat("Not running post-hoc due to pseudo-replication concerns\n")
    cat("(Use conservative α = 0.01 for post-hoc testing)\n\n")
  } else {
    cat(metric, "- Site effect not significant (p =", round(site_p, 4), ")\n\n")
  }
}

# ==========  PART 3: CALCULATE SITE-LEVEL MEANS FOR REPORTING ==============

cat("=== PART 3: SITE-LEVEL SUMMARY STATISTICS ===\n")
cat("(For reporting and visualization)\n\n")

site_summary <- meta_eDNA_rarefied %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>%
  summarise(
    n_replicates = n(),
    
    # Diversity metrics
    Shannon_mean = mean(Shannon, na.rm = TRUE),
    Shannon_SE = sd(Shannon, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    Simpson_mean = mean(Simpson, na.rm = TRUE),
    Simpson_SE = sd(Simpson, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    Pielou_mean = mean(Pielou, na.rm = TRUE),
    Pielou_SE = sd(Pielou, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    ASVs_mean = mean(numberASVs, na.rm = TRUE),
    ASVs_SE = sd(numberASVs, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    Chao1_mean = mean(Chao1, na.rm = TRUE),
    Chao1_SE = sd(Chao1, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    
    # Environmental variables
    Depth = mean(Depth, na.rm = TRUE),
    Visibility_std_rank = mean(Visibility_std_rank, na.rm = TRUE),
    pp_mean = mean(pp_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

print(site_summary[, c("sitelocality", "n_replicates", "Shannon_mean", 
                       "Shannon_SE", "ASVs_mean")])
cat("\n")

# ==========  PART 4: ENVIRONMENTAL EFFECTS (USES ALL REPLICATES) ============

cat("=== PART 4: ENVIRONMENTAL PREDICTORS ===\n")
cat("Using all", nrow(meta_eDNA_rarefied), "samples\n\n")

env_vars <- c("Depth", "Visibility_std_rank", "pp_mean")
available_env <- env_vars[env_vars %in% colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)]
cat("Testing predictors:", paste(available_env, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

env_models <- list()
env_results <- data.frame()

for(metric in diversity_metrics) {
  cat("--- Environmental effects on", metric, "---\n")
  
  if(length(available_env) > 0) {
    formula_str <- paste(metric, "~", paste(available_env, collapse = " + "))
    env_models[[metric]] <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = meta_eDNA_rarefied)
    
    anova_result <- Anova(env_models[[metric]], type = "II")
    print(anova_result)
    
    r2 <- summary(env_models[[metric]])$r.squared
    adj_r2 <- summary(env_models[[metric]])$adj.r.squared
    cat("R² =", round(r2, 3), "| Adjusted R² =", round(adj_r2, 3), "\n\n")
    
    for(var in available_env) {
      env_results <- rbind(env_results, data.frame(
        Metric = metric,
        Predictor = var,
        F_value = anova_result[var, "F value"],
        p_value = anova_result[var, "Pr(>F)"],
        Significant = anova_result[var, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05,
        Model_R2 = r2
      ))
    }
  }
}

cat("ENVIRONMENTAL EFFECTS SUMMARY:\n")
print(env_results)
cat("\n")

# =========== PART 5: DIVERSITY HOTSPOTS & RANKINGS (USES SITE MEANS) ============

cat("=== PART 5: DIVERSITY HOTSPOT IDENTIFICATION ===\n\n")

# Calculate rankings based on site means
site_diversity_summary <- site_summary %>%
  mutate(
    rank_ASVs = rank(-ASVs_mean),
    rank_Shannon = rank(-Shannon_mean),
    rank_Simpson = rank(-Simpson_mean),
    rank_Pielou = rank(-Pielou_mean),
    rank_Chao1 = rank(-Chao1_mean),
    avg_rank = round((rank_ASVs + rank_Shannon + rank_Simpson + 
                      rank_Pielou + rank_Chao1) / 5, 1)
  ) %>%
  arrange(avg_rank)

cat("SITE DIVERSITY RANKINGS (based on means):\n")
print(site_diversity_summary[, c("sitelocality", "Shannon_mean", "ASVs_mean", 
                                  "avg_rank", "n_replicates")])

cat("\n--- DIVERSITY HOTSPOTS ---\n")
cat("Top 3 (highest diversity):\n")
for(i in 1:3) {
  sig_flag <- ""
  if(site_results$Significant[site_results$Metric == "Shannon"]) {
    sig_flag <- " *"
  }
  cat(i, ".", site_diversity_summary$sitelocality[i], 
      "(Shannon:", round(site_diversity_summary$Shannon_mean[i], 2), "±",
      round(site_diversity_summary$Shannon_SE[i], 2), ")", sig_flag, "\n")
}
```
