```{r}
cat("\nBottom 3 (lowest diversity):\n")
n <- nrow(site_diversity_summary)
for(i in (n-2):n) {
  cat(n-i+1, ".", site_diversity_summary$sitelocality[i], 
      "(Shannon:", round(site_diversity_summary$Shannon_mean[i], 2), "±",
      round(site_diversity_summary$Shannon_SE[i], 2), ")\n")
}


# ===========  PART 6: COMMUNITY SIMILARITY & OVERLAP ===========

cat("=== PART 6: COMMUNITY SIMILARITY ANALYSIS ===\n\n")

# Get ASV presence/absence by site (using all samples)
asv_table <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
if(taxa_are_rows(physeq_eDNA_rarefied)) {
  asv_table <- t(asv_table)
}

metadata_samples <- as.data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))

asv_by_site <- list()
for(site in unique(metadata_samples$sitelocality)) {
  site_samples <- rownames(metadata_samples)[metadata_samples$sitelocality == site]
  site_asv_table <- asv_table[site_samples, , drop = FALSE]
  present_asvs <- colnames(site_asv_table)[colSums(site_asv_table > 0) > 0]
  asv_by_site[[site]] <- present_asvs
  cat("Site", site, ":", length(present_asvs), "ASVs\n")
}

# Jaccard similarity
sites <- names(asv_by_site)
n_sites <- length(sites)
jaccard_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = n_sites, ncol = n_sites)
rownames(jaccard_matrix) <- colnames(jaccard_matrix) <- sites

for(i in 1:n_sites) {
  for(j in 1:n_sites) {
    intersection <- length(intersect(asv_by_site[[sites[i]]], asv_by_site[[sites[j]]]))
    union <- length(union(asv_by_site[[sites[i]]], asv_by_site[[sites[j]]]))
    jaccard_matrix[i, j] <- intersection / union
  }
}

jaccard_lower <- jaccard_matrix
jaccard_lower[upper.tri(jaccard_lower, diag = TRUE)] <- NA
cat("\nJaccard similarity range:", round(min(jaccard_lower, na.rm = TRUE), 3), 
    "-", round(max(jaccard_lower, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")

# ASV sharing
total_asvs <- length(unique(unlist(asv_by_site)))
site_specific <- sum(sapply(unique(unlist(asv_by_site)), function(asv) {
  sum(sapply(asv_by_site, function(x) asv %in% x)) == 1
}))
widespread <- sum(sapply(unique(unlist(asv_by_site)), function(asv) {
  sum(sapply(asv_by_site, function(x) asv %in% x)) >= ceiling(n_sites * 0.75)
}))

cat("Total unique ASVs:", total_asvs, "\n")
cat("Site-specific ASVs:", site_specific, "(", round(site_specific/total_asvs*100, 1), "%)\n")
cat("Widespread ASVs (≥75% sites):", widespread, "(", round(widespread/total_asvs*100, 1), "%)\n\n")

# ============  PART 7: VISUALIZATIONS ==============

cat("=== PART 7: CREATING VISUALIZATIONS ===\n\n")

# 1. Shannon diversity with error bars and significance
sig_flag <- ifelse(site_results$Significant[site_results$Metric == "Shannon"], 
                   "***", "ns")
p_val <- site_results$p_value[site_results$Metric == "Shannon"]

p1 <- ggplot(site_diversity_summary, 
             aes(x = reorder(sitelocality, -Shannon_mean), y = Shannon_mean)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Shannon_mean - Shannon_SE, 
                    ymax = Shannon_mean + Shannon_SE), 
                width = 0.3, linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Shannon Diversity by Site",
       subtitle = paste0("Site effect: ", sig_flag, " (p = ", 
                        round(p_val, 4), ", n = 33 samples, 12 sites)"),
       x = "Site", y = "Shannon Diversity (H')") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9))

print(p1)

# 2. Overall diversity rankings
p2 <- ggplot(site_diversity_summary, 
             aes(x = reorder(sitelocality, -avg_rank), y = avg_rank)) +
  geom_col(fill = "coral", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Overall Diversity Ranking",
       subtitle = "Lower rank = higher diversity (average across 5 metrics)",
       x = "Site", y = "Average Rank") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) +
  geom_text(aes(label = avg_rank), vjust = -0.3, size = 3)

print(p2)

# 3. Jaccard similarity heatmap
jaccard_df <- reshape2::melt(jaccard_matrix)
colnames(jaccard_df) <- c("Site1", "Site2", "Jaccard")

p3 <- ggplot(jaccard_df, aes(x = Site1, y = Site2, fill = Jaccard)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Jaccard\nSimilarity") +
  labs(title = "Community Similarity Between Sites") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")) +
  coord_fixed()

print(p3)

# 4. Environmental relationship (if significant)
if(any(env_results$Significant) && "Depth" %in% available_env) {
  depth_shannon <- env_results %>% 
    filter(Predictor == "Depth" & Metric == "Shannon")
  
  p4 <- ggplot(meta_eDNA_rarefied, aes(x = Depth, y = Shannon)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = sitelocality), size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = TRUE) +
    labs(title = "Shannon Diversity vs Depth",
         subtitle = paste0("p = ", round(depth_shannon$p_value, 4)),
         x = "Depth (m)", y = "Shannon Diversity (H')",
         color = "Site") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "right")
  
  print(p4)
}

# ============== PART 8: EXPORT RESULTS ===============

cat("\n=== PART 8: EXPORTING RESULTS ===\n\n")

dir.create("./eDNA_Site_Analysis", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Site-level summaries (for reporting)
write.csv(site_diversity_summary, 
          "./eDNA_Site_Analysis/Site_Diversity_Summary.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Statistical test results
write.csv(site_results, 
          "./eDNA_Site_Analysis/Site_Effects_ANOVA.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(env_results, 
          "./eDNA_Site_Analysis/Environmental_Effects.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Post-hoc results
for(metric in names(posthoc_results)) {
  write.csv(posthoc_results[[metric]]$contrasts,
            paste0("./eDNA_Site_Analysis/PostHoc_", metric, ".csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  sig_pairs <- posthoc_results[[metric]]$contrasts %>%
    filter(p.value < 0.05)
  if(nrow(sig_pairs) > 0) {
    write.csv(sig_pairs,
              paste0("./eDNA_Site_Analysis/PostHoc_", metric, "_Significant.csv"),
              row.names = FALSE)
  }
}

# Community data
write.csv(jaccard_matrix, 
          "./eDNA_Site_Analysis/Jaccard_Similarity_Matrix.csv")

# Save plots
ggsave("./eDNA_Site_Analysis/Shannon_by_Site.pdf", p1, 
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("./eDNA_Site_Analysis/Overall_Rankings.pdf", p2, 
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("./eDNA_Site_Analysis/Jaccard_Heatmap.pdf", p3, 
       width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300)

cat("Results exported to: ./eDNA_Site_Analysis/\n\n")
```

============================================================================
 # 18S-eDNA DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS BY SITE
 Simple table matching the format from 18S-ARMS and COI-ARMS
===========================================================================
```{r}
# phyloseq object
physeq_eDNA <- physeq_eDNA_rarefied

cat("=== CALCULATING 18S-eDNA DIVERSITY METRICS ===\n\n")

# ============================================================================
# CALCULATE DIVERSITY METRICS
# ============================================================================

# Get OTU table
otu_tab <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA))
if(taxa_are_rows(physeq_eDNA)) {
  otu_tab <- t(otu_tab)
}
otu_mat <- as.matrix(otu_tab)

# Calculate diversity metrics
observed_richness <- rowSums(otu_mat > 0)
shannon <- vegan::diversity(otu_mat, index = "shannon")
simpson <- vegan::diversity(otu_mat, index = "simpson")
pielou <- shannon / log(observed_richness)
pielou[is.nan(pielou)] <- 0

# Get metadata
metadata_eDNA <- as.data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA))
metadata_eDNA <- as.data.frame(metadata_eDNA, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Add diversity metrics
metadata_eDNA$observed_richness <- observed_richness[rownames(metadata_eDNA)]
metadata_eDNA$shannon <- shannon[rownames(metadata_eDNA)]
metadata_eDNA$simpson <- simpson[rownames(metadata_eDNA)]
metadata_eDNA$pielou <- pielou[rownames(metadata_eDNA)]

cat("Total samples:", nrow(metadata_eDNA), "\n")
cat("Total ASVs:", ntaxa(physeq_eDNA), "\n")
cat("Sites:", length(unique(metadata_eDNA$sitelocality)), "\n\n")

# ============  FUNCTION: Calculate summary statistics by group ============

calc_summary_stats <- function(data, group_var, metric) {
  data %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
    summarise(
      N = n(),
      Mean = round(mean(.data[[metric]], na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      SD = round(sd(.data[[metric]], na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      SE = round(sd(.data[[metric]], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()), 1),
      Min = round(min(.data[[metric]], na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Max = round(max(.data[[metric]], na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
}

# =============  CREATE COMPREHENSIVE SITE STATISTICS TABLE ================

cat("=== TABLE: DIVERSITY BY SITE (18S-eDNA) ===\n\n")

# Calculate stats for each metric
site_richness_eDNA <- calc_summary_stats(metadata_eDNA, "sitelocality", "observed_richness")
site_evenness_eDNA <- calc_summary_stats(metadata_eDNA, "sitelocality", "pielou")
site_shannon_eDNA <- calc_summary_stats(metadata_eDNA, "sitelocality", "shannon")
site_simpson_eDNA <- calc_summary_stats(metadata_eDNA, "sitelocality", "simpson")

# Combine into single comprehensive table
site_stats_eDNA <- site_richness_eDNA %>%
  rename(Richness_Mean = Mean, Richness_SD = SD, Richness_SE = SE,
         Richness_Min = Min, Richness_Max = Max) %>%
  select(sitelocality, N, Richness_Mean, Richness_SD, Richness_SE, 
         Richness_Min, Richness_Max) %>%
  left_join(
    site_evenness_eDNA %>% 
      select(sitelocality, Mean, SD, SE, Min, Max) %>% 
      rename(Evenness_Mean = Mean, Evenness_SD = SD, Evenness_SE = SE,
             Evenness_Min = Min, Evenness_Max = Max),
    by = "sitelocality"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    site_shannon_eDNA %>% 
      select(sitelocality, Mean, SD, SE, Min, Max) %>% 
      rename(Shannon_Mean = Mean, Shannon_SD = SD, Shannon_SE = SE,
             Shannon_Min = Min, Shannon_Max = Max),
    by = "sitelocality"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    site_simpson_eDNA %>% 
      select(sitelocality, Mean, SD, SE, Min, Max) %>% 
      rename(Simpson_Mean = Mean, Simpson_SD = SD, Simpson_SE = SE,
             Simpson_Min = Min, Simpson_Max = Max),
    by = "sitelocality"
  )

# Sort by Shannon diversity (highest to lowest)
site_stats_eDNA <- site_stats_eDNA %>%
  arrange(desc(Shannon_Mean))

print(site_stats_eDNA)
cat("\n")

# Check column names
cat("Column names:\n")
print(colnames(site_stats_eDNA))
cat("\n")

# ===========  EXPORT TABLE ==============================

dir.create("./Alpha_Diversity_Tables", showWarnings = FALSE)

write.csv(site_stats_eDNA, 
          "./Alpha_Diversity_Tables/TableS2_18SeDNA_Site_Stats.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("=== TABLE EXPORTED ===\n")
cat("File: ./Alpha_Diversity_Tables/TableS2_18SeDNA_Site_Stats.csv\n\n")

# ===========  PRINT SUMMARY ==================

cat("=== SUMMARY ===\n\n")

cat("Highest diversity site:", site_stats_eDNA$sitelocality[1], "\n")
cat("  Shannon: ", site_stats_eDNA$Shannon_Mean[1], " ± ", 
    site_stats_eDNA$Shannon_SE[1], "\n")
cat("  ASVs: ", site_stats_eDNA$Richness_Mean[1], " ± ", 
    site_stats_eDNA$Richness_SE[1], "\n\n")

cat("Lowest diversity site:", site_stats_eDNA$sitelocality[nrow(site_stats_eDNA)], "\n")
cat("  Shannon: ", site_stats_eDNA$Shannon_Mean[nrow(site_stats_eDNA)], " ± ", 
    site_stats_eDNA$Shannon_SE[nrow(site_stats_eDNA)], "\n")
cat("  ASVs: ", site_stats_eDNA$Richness_Mean[nrow(site_stats_eDNA)], " ± ", 
    site_stats_eDNA$Richness_SE[nrow(site_stats_eDNA)], "\n\n")
```

============================================================================
# 18S-eDNA OVERALL DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS
# Single row with all summary stats across all samples
============================================================================
```{r}
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)

# Your phyloseq object
physeq_eDNA <- physeq_eDNA_rarefied

cat("=== CALCULATING 18S-eDNA OVERALL DIVERSITY METRICS ===\n\n")

# =============  CALCULATE DIVERSITY METRICS =====================

# Get OTU table
otu_tab <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA))
if(taxa_are_rows(physeq_eDNA)) {
  otu_tab <- t(otu_tab)
}
otu_mat <- as.matrix(otu_tab)

# Calculate diversity metrics
observed_richness <- rowSums(otu_mat > 0)
shannon <- vegan::diversity(otu_mat, index = "shannon")
simpson <- vegan::diversity(otu_mat, index = "simpson")
pielou <- shannon / log(observed_richness)
pielou[is.nan(pielou)] <- 0

cat("Total samples:", length(observed_richness), "\n")
cat("Total ASVs:", ntaxa(physeq_eDNA), "\n\n")

# ===============  CREATE OVERALL SUMMARY STATISTICS TABLE (ONE ROW) ===================

overall_stats_eDNA <- data.frame(
  Dataset = "18S-eDNA",
  N = length(observed_richness),
  
  # Richness
  Richness_Mean = round(mean(observed_richness, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
  Richness_SD = round(sd(observed_richness, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
  Richness_SE = round(sd(observed_richness, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(length(observed_richness)), 1),
  Richness_Min = round(min(observed_richness, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
  Richness_Max = round(max(observed_richness, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
  
  # Evenness (Pielou)
  Evenness_Mean = round(mean(pielou, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Evenness_SD = round(sd(pielou, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Evenness_SE = round(sd(pielou, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(length(pielou)), 3),
  Evenness_Min = round(min(pielou, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Evenness_Max = round(max(pielou, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  
  # Shannon
  Shannon_Mean = round(mean(shannon, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  Shannon_SD = round(sd(shannon, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  Shannon_SE = round(sd(shannon, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(length(shannon)), 2),
  Shannon_Min = round(min(shannon, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  Shannon_Max = round(max(shannon, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  
  # Simpson
  Simpson_Mean = round(mean(simpson, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Simpson_SD = round(sd(simpson, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Simpson_SE = round(sd(simpson, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(length(simpson)), 3),
  Simpson_Min = round(min(simpson, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Simpson_Max = round(max(simpson, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
)

print(overall_stats_eDNA)
cat("\n")

# Check column names
cat("Column names:\n")
print(colnames(overall_stats_eDNA))
cat("\n")

# ================  EXPORT TABLE ====================

dir.create("./Alpha_Diversity_Tables", showWarnings = FALSE)

write.csv(overall_stats_eDNA, 
          "./Alpha_Diversity_Tables/Overall_18SeDNA_Stats.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("=== TABLE EXPORTED ===\n")
cat("File: ./Alpha_Diversity_Tables/Overall_18SeDNA_Stats.csv\n\n")

cat("=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
```


# =======================================
# ------ 4th Root Transformation --------
# =======================================

```{r plot prep}
# eDNA 4th Root Transformation and NMDS Analysis
# Adapted from ARMS analysis for eDNA dataset
# Load the rarefied eDNA data
# load("./Alpha_Div_eDNA/eDNA_18S_rarefied_with_diversity.Rdata")

# Use consistent color scheme and site ordering
ordered_sites_edna <- c("Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_deep", "EFGB_shallow", 
                       "Bright_shallow", "Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2",
                       "McGrail_deep", "Alderdice_deep1", "Alderdice_deep2",
                       "Alderdice_shallow", "Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")

c12_sites_edna <- c("Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077",      
                   "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
                   "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3",
                   "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
                   "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599",
                   "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599",
                   "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30",
                   "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C",
                   "McGrail_deep" = "#015951",
                   "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E")

# Create output directory
if(!dir.exists("./NMDS_eDNA")) {
  dir.create("./NMDS_eDNA")
  cat("Created directory: ./NMDS_eDNA\n")
}

cat("=== eDNA 4th Root Transformation and NMDS Analysis ===\n")
```

```{r 4th root tranformation}
# ----------------- Robust 4th Root Transformation -----------------
cat("1. Performing 4th root transformation...\n")

# Extract ASV table from rarefied data
biotic_edna <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))

# Clean data - remove empty ASVs (shouldn't be any after rarefaction)
biotic_sums_edna <- colSums(biotic_edna)  # Sum across samples for each ASV
empty_asvs_edna <- sum(biotic_sums_edna == 0)
cat("Number of empty ASVs:", empty_asvs_edna, "\n") 

if(empty_asvs_edna > 0) {
  keep_asvs_edna <- biotic_sums_edna > 0
  biotic_clean_edna <- biotic_edna[, keep_asvs_edna]
  cat("ASVs removed:", sum(!keep_asvs_edna), "\n")
  cat("Final ASV count:", ncol(biotic_clean_edna), "\n")
} else {
  biotic_clean_edna <- biotic_edna
  cat("No empty ASVs found - data is clean!\n")
}

# Convert to proportions (samples as rows, ASVs as columns)
biotic_percs_edna <- sweep(biotic_clean_edna, 1, rowSums(biotic_clean_edna), "/")

# Verification checks
cat("Proportions table dimensions:", paste(dim(biotic_percs_edna), collapse = " x "), "(samples x ASVs)\n")
cat("Sample sums (should all be 1):", range(rowSums(biotic_percs_edna)), "\n")

# Apply 4th root transformation
biotic_percs_4th_edna <- biotic_percs_edna^0.25

cat("4th root range:", range(biotic_percs_4th_edna), "\n")

# Create 4th root transformed phyloseq object
# Need to transpose for phyloseq (ASVs as rows)
otu_4th_edna <- otu_table(t(biotic_percs_4th_edna), taxa_are_rows = TRUE)
samp_4th_edna <- sample_data(meta_eDNA_rarefied)
physeq_4th_edna <- phyloseq(otu_4th_edna, samp_4th_edna)

# Also create 4th root version of rarefied data
physeq_rarefied_4th_edna <- physeq_eDNA_rarefied
otu_table(physeq_rarefied_4th_edna) <- (otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))^(1/4)

# Final verification
cat("\n=== TRANSFORMATION VERIFICATION ===\n")
cat("Sample order consistency:")
cat(" 4th root matches rarefied:", identical(sample_names(physeq_4th_edna), sample_names(physeq_eDNA_rarefied)), "\n")
cat("Transformation verification:\n")
cat("Original rarefied range:", range(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied)), "\n")
cat("4th root rarefied range:", range(otu_table(physeq_rarefied_4th_edna)), "\n")
rarefaction_depth_edna <- unique(sample_sums(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))[1]
cat("Expected max (", rarefaction_depth_edna, "^0.25):", rarefaction_depth_edna^0.25, "\n")
```


# =======================================
# --------------- NMDS ------------------
# =======================================
```{r NMDS BC 4th Root, Jacc}
#----------------NMDS Bray-Curtis of 4th Root Transformed Data ----------------
cat("\n2. Performing NMDS ordination...\n")

# Ordinate Bray-Curtis distances on 4th root transformed rarefied data
nmdsBray_4th_edna <- ordinate(physeq_rarefied_4th_edna, method = "NMDS", distance = "bray",
                             k = 2, trymax = 1000)

# Check stress value
cat("NMDS Stress value:", round(nmdsBray_4th_edna$stress, 3), "\n")

# Function to calculate convex hull
find_hull_edna <- function(df) df[chull(df$NMDS1, df$NMDS2), ]

# Extract NMDS scores
nmds_scores_edna <- as.data.frame(scores(nmdsBray_4th_edna, display = "sites"))
nmds_scores_edna$sitelocality <- meta_eDNA_rarefied[rownames(nmds_scores_edna), "sitelocality"]  

# Set the correct factor order for sitelocality
nmds_scores_edna$sitelocality <- factor(nmds_scores_edna$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_edna)

# Calculate convex hulls for each site
hulls_site_edna <- nmds_scores_edna %>% 
  group_by(sitelocality) %>% 
  do(find_hull_edna(.))

#----------------NMDS Plot by SITE LOCALITY----------------
cat("3. Creating NMDS plot by site...\n")

# Create base plot
oP_site_edna <- plot_ordination(physeq_rarefied_4th_edna, nmdsBray_4th_edna)
oP_site_edna$layers <- oP_site_edna$layers[-1]  # Remove default points

# Add custom points and styling
oP_site_edna <- oP_site_edna + 
  geom_point(data = nmds_scores_edna, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, fill = sitelocality), 
             size = 4, shape = 21, color = "black") + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_edna) + 
  labs(title = "eDNA 18S 4th Root Transformed: Bray-Curtis NMDS", fill = "Site") + 
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.box.just = "left",
        legend.margin = margin(t = 10), 
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5, ncol = 3)) + 
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_site_edna, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = sitelocality, fill = sitelocality), 
               alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  annotate('text', x = min(nmds_scores_edna$NMDS1), y = max(nmds_scores_edna$NMDS2), 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmdsBray_4th_edna$stress, 3)), 
           size = 5, hjust = 0, vjust = 1)

print(oP_site_edna)

#----------------NMDS Plot by DEPTH----------------
cat("4. Creating NMDS plot by depth...\n")

# Create depth plot
oP_depth_edna <- plot_ordination(physeq_rarefied_4th_edna, nmdsBray_4th_edna)
oP_depth_edna$layers <- oP_depth_edna$layers[-1]

# Add depth data to scores
nmds_scores_depth_edna <- nmds_scores_edna
nmds_scores_depth_edna$depth <- meta_eDNA_rarefied[rownames(nmds_scores_depth_edna), "Depth"]

# Calculate hulls for depth
hulls_depth_edna <- nmds_scores_depth_edna %>% 
  group_by(depth) %>% 
  do(find_hull_edna(.))

# Build depth plot
oP_depth_edna <- oP_depth_edna + 
  geom_point(data = nmds_scores_depth_edna, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, fill = depth), 
             size = 4, shape = 21, color = "black") + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Depth (m)", direction = -1) +
  labs(title = "eDNA 18S 4th Root Transformed: Bray-Curtis NMDS", fill = "Depth (m)") + 
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.justification = "left",
        legend.margin = margin(t = 10), 
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Depth (m)", title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5, 
                              barwidth = 15, barheight = 1.5)) + 
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_depth_edna, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = depth, fill = depth), 
               alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  annotate('text', x = min(nmds_scores_edna$NMDS1), y = max(nmds_scores_edna$NMDS2), 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmdsBray_4th_edna$stress, 3)), 
           size = 5, hjust = 0, vjust = 1)

print(oP_depth_edna)

#----------------NMDS Plot by TURBIDITY----------------
cat("5. Creating NMDS plot by temperature...\n")

# Create temperature plot (if temperature data available)
if("Visibility_std_rank" %in% colnames(meta_eDNA_rarefied)) {
  oP_turb_edna <- plot_ordination(physeq_rarefied_4th_edna, nmdsBray_4th_edna)
  oP_turb_edna$layers <- oP_turb_edna$layers[-1]
  
  # Add temperature data to scores
  nmds_scores_turb_edna <- nmds_scores_edna
  nmds_scores_turb_edna$Visibility_std_rank <- meta_eDNA_rarefied[rownames(nmds_scores_turb_edna), "Visibility_std_rank"]
  
  # Calculate hulls for temperature
  hulls_turb_edna <- nmds_scores_turb_edna %>% 
    group_by(Visibility_std_rank) %>% 
    do(find_hull_edna(.))
  
  # Build temperature plot
  oP_turb_edna <- oP_turb_edna + 
    geom_point(data = nmds_scores_turb_edna, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, fill = Visibility_std_rank), 
               size = 4, shape = 21, color = "black") + 
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = "Mean Turbidity Rank") +
    labs(title = "eDNA 18S 4th Root Transformed: Bray-Curtis NMDS", fill = "Visibility_std_rank") + 
    theme_light() + 
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.box = "horizontal",
          legend.justification = "left",
          legend.margin = margin(t = 10), 
          legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
          axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
          axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
          axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5)) +
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Visibility_std_rank", title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5, 
                                barwidth = 15, barheight = 1.5)) + 
    geom_polygon(data = hulls_turb_edna, 
                 aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = Visibility_std_rank, fill = Visibility_std_rank), 
                 alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
    annotate('text', x = min(nmds_scores_edna$NMDS1), y = max(nmds_scores_edna$NMDS2), 
             label = paste('stress =', round(nmdsBray_4th_edna$stress, 3)), 
             size = 5, hjust = 0, vjust = 1)
  
  print(oP_turb_edna)
} else {
  cat("Turbididty data not available, skipping turbidity plot\n")
  oP_turb_edna <- NULL
}

#----------------COMBINED PLOT----------------
cat("6. Creating combined plot...\n")

# Create modified versions for combination
oP_site_clean_edna <- oP_site_edna

oP_depth_clean_edna <- oP_depth_edna + 
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Depth (meters)", 
                              title.position = "top", 
                              title.hjust = 0.5, 
                              barwidth = 15, 
                              barheight = 2))

if(!is.null(oP_temp_edna)) {
  oP_turb_clean_edna <- oP_turb_edna + 
    guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Visibility_std_rank", 
                                title.position = "top", 
                                title.hjust = 0.5, 
                                barwidth = 15, 
                                barheight = 2))
  
  # Combine all three plots
  combined_plot_edna <- oP_site_clean_edna + oP_depth_clean_edna + oP_turb_clean_edna
} else {
  # Combine only site and depth plots
  combined_plot_edna <- oP_site_clean_edna + oP_depth_clean_edna
}

# Add overall title and panel labels
combined_plot_edna <- combined_plot_edna + 
  plot_annotation(
    title = "eDNA 18S 4th Root Transformed: Bray-Curtis Dissimilarity NMDS",
    tag_levels = 'A',
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_plot_edna)

#----------------JACCARD NMDS (Presence/Absence)----------------
cat("\n7. Creating Jaccard NMDS on presence/absence data...\n")

# Create presence/absence phyloseq object
asv_table_pa_edna <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
asv_table_pa_edna[asv_table_pa_edna > 0] <- 1  # Convert to presence/absence

# Create PA phyloseq object
otu_pa_edna <- otu_table(t(asv_table_pa_edna), taxa_are_rows = TRUE)
samp_pa_edna <- sample_data(meta_eDNA_rarefied)
physeq_pa_edna <- phyloseq(otu_pa_edna, samp_pa_edna)

# Calculate NMDS with Jaccard dissimilarity
nmdsJaccard_pa_edna <- ordinate(physeq_pa_edna, method = "NMDS", distance = "jaccard",
                               k = 2, trymax = 1000)

cat("Jaccard NMDS Stress value:", round(nmdsJaccard_pa_edna$stress, 3), "\n")

# Extract scores for Jaccard NMDS
nmds_scores_pa_edna <- as.data.frame(scores(nmdsJaccard_pa_edna, display = "sites"))
nmds_scores_pa_edna$sitelocality <- meta_eDNA_rarefied[rownames(nmds_scores_pa_edna), "sitelocality"]
nmds_scores_pa_edna$sitelocality <- factor(nmds_scores_pa_edna$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_edna)

# Calculate hulls for PA data
hulls_pa_edna <- nmds_scores_pa_edna %>% 
  group_by(sitelocality) %>% 
  do(find_hull_edna(.))

# Jaccard NMDS plot by site
oP_pa_edna <- plot_ordination(physeq_pa_edna, nmdsJaccard_pa_edna)
oP_pa_edna$layers <- oP_pa_edna$layers[-1]

oP_pa_edna <- oP_pa_edna + 
  geom_point(data = nmds_scores_pa_edna, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, fill = sitelocality), 
             size = 4, shape = 21, color = "black") + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_edna) + 
  labs(title = "eDNA 18S Presence/Absence: Jaccard NMDS", fill = "Site") + 
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.box = "horizontal",
        legend.box.just = "left",
        legend.margin = margin(t = 10), 
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 18),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5, ncol = 3)) + 
  geom_polygon(data = hulls_pa_edna, 
               aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, group = sitelocality, fill = sitelocality), 
               alpha = 0.4, color = NA) +
  annotate('text', x = min(nmds_scores_pa_edna$NMDS1), y = max(nmds_scores_pa_edna$NMDS2), 
           label = paste('stress =', round(nmdsJaccard_pa_edna$stress, 3)), 
           size = 5, hjust = 0, vjust = 1)

print(oP_pa_edna)

#----------------SAVE PLOTS----------------
cat("\n8. Saving plots...\n")

# Save individual plots
ggsave("eDNA_18S_NMDS_4th_Site.pdf", plot = oP_site_edna, device = "pdf", 
       path = "./NMDS_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("eDNA_18S_NMDS_4th_Depth.pdf", plot = oP_depth_edna, device = "pdf", 
       path = "./NMDS_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)

if(!is.null(oP_temp_edna)) {
  ggsave("eDNA_18S_NMDS_4th_Turb.pdf", plot = oP_turb_edna, device = "pdf", 
         path = "./NMDS_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)
}

ggsave("eDNA_18S_NMDS_4th_Combined.pdf", plot = combined_plot_edna, device = "pdf", 
       path = "./NMDS_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 20, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("eDNA_18S_NMDS_Jaccard_PA_Site.pdf", plot = oP_pa_edna, device = "pdf", 
       path = "./NMDS_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Save ordination objects
save(physeq_4th_edna, physeq_rarefied_4th_edna, physeq_pa_edna,
     nmdsBray_4th_edna, nmdsJaccard_pa_edna,
     file = "./NMDS_eDNA/eDNA_NMDS_objects.Rdata")

```


=======================================
------------ PERMANOVAS ---------------
=======================================

# ---- eDNA 18S PERMANOVA Analysis - Aligned with Metabarcoding Framework -----
Following the EXACT same structure as metabarcoding analysis:
MARGINAL Tests (Individual Effects)
CONDITIONAL Tests (Explicit Controls using model comparison)  
SEQUENTIAL Tests (Order Matters)
```{r PERMANOVAs}
#library(vegan)
#library(dplyr)

#========================= PREPARE DATA =========================

cat("=== PREPARING eDNA 18S DATA (ALIGNED FRAMEWORK) ===\n")

# Use 4th root transformed data (aligned with metabarcoding approach)
community_4th_root_edna <- biotic_percs_4th_edna

# Use cleaned metadata
metadata_for_permanova_edna <- metadata_edna

# Ensure sample alignment
common_samples_edna <- intersect(rownames(community_4th_root_edna), rownames(metadata_for_permanova_edna))
community_4th_root_edna <- community_4th_root_edna[common_samples_edna, ]
metadata_for_permanova_edna <- metadata_for_permanova_edna[common_samples_edna, ]

cat("Community data:", nrow(community_4th_root_edna), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root_edna), "ASVs\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_4th_root_edna), rownames(metadata_for_permanova_edna)), "\n")

# Calculate distance matrix
dist_matrix_edna <- vegdist(community_4th_root_edna, method = "bray")

# Check available variables (aligned with eDNA focus)
required_vars_edna <- c("Depth", "Visibility_std_rank", "Latitude", "Longitude", "sitelocality")
optional_vars_edna <- c("pp_mean")
available_vars_edna <- intersect(c(required_vars_edna, optional_vars_edna), colnames(metadata_for_permanova_edna))
has_pp_mean_edna <- "pp_mean" %in% available_vars_edna

cat("Available variables:", paste(available_vars_edna, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("pp_mean available:", has_pp_mean_edna, "\n")

# Create output directory
if(!dir.exists("./PERMANOVA_eDNA")) {
  dir.create("./PERMANOVA_eDNA")
}

#========================= PERMDISP TESTING =========================

cat("\nTesting PERMDISP assumptions\n")
permdisp_site_edna <- betadisper(dist_matrix_edna, metadata_for_permanova_edna$sitelocality)
permdisp_test_site_edna <- permutest(permdisp_site_edna, permutations = 999)
f_val_edna <- permdisp_test_site_edna$tab$F[1]
p_val_edna <- permdisp_test_site_edna$tab$`Pr(>F)`[1]
assumption_met_edna <- ifelse(p_val_edna >= 0.05, "PASSED", " VIOLATED")
cat(sprintf("Sitelocality PERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_edna, p_val_edna, assumption_met_edna))

#========================= HELPER FUNCTION =========================

# Helper function following metabarcoding approach
run_permanova_edna <- function(formula_str, test_name) {
  tryCatch({
    result <- adonis2(
      as.formula(paste("dist_matrix_edna ~", formula_str)),
      data = metadata_for_permanova_edna,
      permutations = 999,
      by = "terms"
    )
    
    result_df <- as.data.frame(result)
    model_r2 <- sum(result_df[!rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total"), "R2"], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Extract detailed statistics for each term
    term_rows <- !rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total")
    
    if (sum(term_rows) > 0) {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = rownames(result_df)[term_rows],
        Df = result_df[term_rows, "Df"],
        SumOfSqs = result_df[term_rows, "SumOfSqs"],
        R2 = result_df[term_rows, "R2"],
        F_Statistic = result_df[term_rows, "F"],
        P_value = result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"],
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    } else {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = NA,
        Df = NA,
        SumOfSqs = NA,
        R2 = NA,
        F_Statistic = NA,
        P_value = NA,
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    
    return(list(result = result, r2 = model_r2, detailed_stats = detailed_stats))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("%-35s: ERROR - %s\n", test_name, e$message))
    return(list(result = NULL, r2 = NA, detailed_stats = NULL))
  })
}

#========================= INITIALIZE RESULTS =========================

results_edna <- list()
detailed_stats_list_edna <- list()

cat("\nRunning eDNA PERMANOVA analyses following metabarcoding framework...\n")

#========================= MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) =========================

cat("\n=== MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) ===\n")

# Individual environmental effects
results_edna$depth_alone <- run_permanova_edna("Depth", "Depth Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["depth_alone"]] <- results_edna$depth_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results_edna$depth_alone$r2))

results_edna$visibility_alone <- run_permanova_edna("Visibility_std_rank", "Visibility Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["visibility_alone"]] <- results_edna$visibility_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Visibility Alone", results_edna$visibility_alone$r2))

# Individual geographic effects (following metabarcoding focus)
results_edna$latitude_alone <- run_permanova_edna("Latitude", "Latitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["latitude_alone"]] <- results_edna$latitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results_edna$latitude_alone$r2))

results_edna$longitude_alone <- run_permanova_edna("Longitude", "Longitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["longitude_alone"]] <- results_edna$longitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results_edna$longitude_alone$r2))

# pp_mean effect (if available)
if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  results_edna$pp_alone <- run_permanova_edna("pp_mean", "pp_mean Alone")
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["pp_alone"]] <- results_edna$pp_alone$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean Alone", results_edna$pp_alone$r2))
}

# Site effect
results_edna$site_alone <- run_permanova_edna("sitelocality", "Site Effects Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["site_alone"]] <- results_edna$site_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results_edna$site_alone$r2))

#========================= CONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls) =========================

cat("\n=== CONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls) ===\n")
cat("Using model comparison method for true conditional variance partitioning\n")

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  # 1. pp_mean | Longitude (following metabarcoding framework)
  cat("Running conditional test: pp_mean | Longitude\n")
  longitude_only_r2_edna <- results_edna$longitude_alone$r2
  pp_longitude_result_edna <- run_permanova_edna("Longitude + pp_mean", "Longitude + pp_mean")
  pp_longitude_r2_edna <- pp_longitude_result_edna$r2
  pp_conditional_r2_edna <- pp_longitude_r2_edna - longitude_only_r2_edna
  
  results_edna$pp_after_longitude <- list(
    r2 = pp_conditional_r2_edna,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "pp_mean | Longitude",
      Term = "pp_mean_conditional",
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = pp_conditional_r2_edna,
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Model_R2 = pp_conditional_r2_edna,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["pp_after_longitude"]] <- results_edna$pp_after_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean | Longitude", pp_conditional_r2_edna))
  
  # 2. Longitude | pp_mean (following metabarcoding framework)
  cat("Running conditional test: Longitude | pp_mean\n")
  pp_only_r2_edna <- results_edna$pp_alone$r2
  longitude_conditional_r2_edna <- pp_longitude_r2_edna - pp_only_r2_edna
  
  results_edna$longitude_after_pp <- list(
    r2 = longitude_conditional_r2_edna,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "Longitude | pp_mean",
      Term = "longitude_conditional",
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = longitude_conditional_r2_edna,
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Model_R2 = longitude_conditional_r2_edna,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["longitude_after_pp"]] <- results_edna$longitude_after_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude | pp_mean", longitude_conditional_r2_edna))
}

#========================= SEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters) =========================

cat("\n=== SEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters) ===\n")
cat("Following metabarcoding sequential model building\n")

# 1. Depth + Visibility_std_rank - Sequential: depth first, then visibility|depth
results_edna$env_baseline <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank", "Environmental Baseline (D+V)")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_baseline"]] <- results_edna$env_baseline$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline (D+V)", results_edna$env_baseline$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  # 2. Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean - Sequential: env first, then pp|env
  results_edna$env_pp <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean", "Environmental + pp_mean")
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_pp"]] <- results_edna$env_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + pp_mean", results_edna$env_pp$r2))
}

# 3. Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Longitude - Sequential: env first, then longitude|env
results_edna$env_longitude <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Longitude", "Environmental + Longitude")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_longitude"]] <- results_edna$env_longitude$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Longitude", results_edna$env_longitude$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  # 4. Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean + Longitude - Sequential: all variables in order
  results_edna$env_pp_longitude <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean + Longitude", "Environmental + pp_mean + Longitude")
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_pp_longitude"]] <- results_edna$env_pp_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + pp_mean + Longitude", results_edna$env_pp_longitude$r2))
}

# 5. Depth + Visibility_std_rank + sitelocality - Sequential: env first, then site|env
results_edna$env_site <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + sitelocality", "Environmental + Site")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_site"]] <- results_edna$env_site$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results_edna$env_site$r2))

#========================= ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS =========================

cat("\n=== ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS ===\n")

# Geography | Environment (using model comparison method)
cat("Running conditional test: geography | environment\n")
env_only_r2_edna <- results_edna$env_baseline$r2
env_spatial_result_edna <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Latitude + Longitude", "Environmental + Spatial")
env_spatial_r2_edna <- env_spatial_result_edna$r2
spatial_conditional_r2_edna <- env_spatial_r2_edna - env_only_r2_edna

results_edna$geography_after_env <- list(
  r2 = spatial_conditional_r2_edna,
  detailed_stats = data.frame(
    Test_Name = "Geography | Environment", 
    Term = "geography_conditional",
    Df = NA,
    SumOfSqs = NA,
    R2 = spatial_conditional_r2_edna,
    F_Statistic = NA,
    P_value = NA,
    Model_R2 = spatial_conditional_r2_edna,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
)
detailed_stats_list_edna[["geography_after_env"]] <- results_edna$geography_after_env$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", spatial_conditional_r2_edna))

# Store the environmental + spatial model
results_edna$env_spatial <- env_spatial_result_edna
detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_spatial"]] <- results_edna$env_spatial$detailed_stats

# Full model
if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  results_edna$full_model <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Latitude + Longitude + pp_mean", "Full Model")
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["full_model"]] <- results_edna$full_model$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results_edna$full_model$r2))
  
  # Site | All Measured Variables (following metabarcoding)
  cat("Running conditional test: site | all variables\n")
  full_model_r2_edna <- results_edna$full_model$r2
  site_all_result_edna <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Latitude + Longitude + pp_mean + sitelocality", "Site + All Variables")
  site_all_r2_edna <- site_all_result_edna$r2
  site_conditional_r2_edna <- site_all_r2_edna - full_model_r2_edna
  
  results_edna$site_after_all <- list(
    r2 = site_conditional_r2_edna,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "Site | All Measured Variables",
      Term = "site_conditional", 
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = site_conditional_r2_edna,
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Model_R2 = site_conditional_r2_edna,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["site_after_all"]] <- results_edna$site_after_all$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Measured Variables", site_conditional_r2_edna))
}

#========================= COMPILE RESULTS =========================

cat("\n=== COMPILING ALIGNED RESULTS ===\n")

# Combine all detailed statistics
all_detailed_stats_edna <- do.call(rbind, detailed_stats_list_edna[!sapply(detailed_stats_list_edna, is.null)])
all_detailed_stats_edna$Data_Type <- "eDNA_18S"
all_detailed_stats_edna$Fraction <- "ASV_level"

# Create summary matching metabarcoding format
test_names_edna <- c()
r2_values_edna <- c()

# Add marginal tests
test_names_edna <- c(test_names_edna, "Depth Alone", "Visibility Alone", "Latitude Alone", "Longitude Alone", "Site Effects Alone")
r2_values_edna <- c(r2_values_edna, results_edna$depth_alone$r2, results_edna$visibility_alone$r2, results_edna$latitude_alone$r2, results_edna$longitude_alone$r2, results_edna$site_alone$r2)

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  test_names_edna <- c(test_names_edna, "pp_mean Alone", "pp_mean | Longitude", "Longitude | pp_mean")
  r2_values_edna <- c(r2_values_edna, results_edna$pp_alone$r2, results_edna$pp_after_longitude$r2, results_edna$longitude_after_pp$r2)
}

# Add sequential tests
test_names_edna <- c(test_names_edna, "Environmental Baseline", "Environmental + Site", "Geography | Environment")
r2_values_edna <- c(r2_values_edna, results_edna$env_baseline$r2, results_edna$env_site$r2, results_edna$geography_after_env$r2)

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  test_names_edna <- c(test_names_edna, "Environmental + pp_mean", "Full Model", "Site | All Measured Variables")
  r2_values_edna <- c(r2_values_edna, results_edna$env_pp$r2, results_edna$full_model$r2, results_edna$site_after_all$r2)
}

summary_results_edna <- data.frame(
  Test = test_names_edna,
  R2 = r2_values_edna,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sort by R² for interpretation
summary_results_edna <- summary_results_edna[order(summary_results_edna$R2, decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE), ]

#========================= SAVE RESULTS =========================

# Save results with aligned naming
write.csv(all_detailed_stats_edna, 
          file.path("./PERMANOVA_eDNA/eDNA_18S_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_detailed_statistics.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(summary_results_edna, 
          file.path("./PERMANOVA_eDNA/eDNA_18S_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_summary.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

#========================= RESULTS SUMMARY =========================

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("eDNA 18S PERMANOVA RESULTS - ALIGNED WITH METABARCODING FRAMEWORK\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")

cat("\nMARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results_edna$depth_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Visibility Alone", results_edna$visibility_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results_edna$latitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results_edna$longitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results_edna$site_alone$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean Alone", results_edna$pp_alone$r2))
  
  cat("\nCONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls):\n")
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean | Longitude", results_edna$pp_after_longitude$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude | pp_mean", results_edna$longitude_after_pp$r2))
}

cat("\nSEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline", results_edna$env_baseline$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results_edna$env_site$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", results_edna$geography_after_env$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + pp_mean", results_edna$env_pp$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results_edna$full_model$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Variables", results_edna$site_after_all$r2))
}

cat(sprintf("\nPERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_edna, p_val_edna, assumption_met_edna))

cat("\nResults saved to ./PERMANOVA_eDNA/\n")
cat("- Detailed statistics: eDNA_18S_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_detailed_statistics.csv\n")
cat("- Summary results: eDNA_18S_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_summary.csv\n")

# Display sorted summary for quick interpretation
cat("\n=== RANKED RESULTS (by R²) ===\n")
print(summary_results_edna)
```

# Metadata fixes
```{r}
# Rename existing objects for clarity
metadata_edna_rarefied <- metadata_edna  # 27 samples from rarefied data

# Create the full 33-sample metadata for future analyses
metadata_edna <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA18S))  # 33 samples from original data

# For the Jaccard PERMANOVA, use the full dataset
metadata_jaccard_edna <- metadata_edna  # This will have 33 samples matching Jaccard distances

cat("metadata_edna_rarefied:", nrow(metadata_edna_rarefied), "samples (for Bray-Curtis analyses)\n")
cat("metadata_edna:", nrow(metadata_edna), "samples (for Jaccard and future analyses)\n")
```

# PERMANOVAs with Bray-curtis distance of 4th root transformed data (non-rarefied)
```{r PERMANOVAS - Bray Curtis Distances 4th Root Transformed}
# =======  eDNA 18S PERMANOVA Analysis - Aligned with Metabarcoding Framework =================

#========================= PREPARE DATA =========================

cat("=== PREPARING eDNA 18S DATA (NON-RAREFIED - ALIGNED FRAMEWORK) ===\n")

# Use NON-RAREFIED data for PERMANOVA (better practice for Bray-Curtis)
# Extract data from original phyloseq object
otu_data_original_edna <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA18S))
if(taxa_are_rows(physeq_eDNA18S)) {
  otu_data_original_edna <- t(otu_data_original_edna)  # Transpose so samples are rows
}

# Create proportional abundances and apply 4th root transformation
biotic_percs_original_edna <- sweep(otu_data_original_edna, 1, rowSums(otu_data_original_edna), "/")
community_4th_root_edna <- biotic_percs_original_edna^0.25

# Extract metadata from original phyloseq object
metadata_for_permanova_edna <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA18S))

# Ensure sample alignment
common_samples_edna <- intersect(rownames(community_4th_root_edna), rownames(metadata_for_permanova_edna))
community_4th_root_edna <- community_4th_root_edna[common_samples_edna, ]
metadata_for_permanova_edna <- metadata_for_permanova_edna[common_samples_edna, ]

cat("Community data:", nrow(community_4th_root_edna), "samples x", ncol(community_4th_root_edna), "ASVs\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(rownames(community_4th_root_edna), rownames(metadata_for_permanova_edna)), "\n")

# Calculate distance matrix
dist_matrix_edna <- vegdist(community_4th_root_edna, method = "bray")

# Check available variables (aligned with eDNA focus)
required_vars_edna <- c("Depth", "Visibility_std_rank", "Latitude", "Longitude", "sitelocality")
optional_vars_edna <- c("pp_mean")
available_vars_edna <- intersect(c(required_vars_edna, optional_vars_edna), colnames(metadata_for_permanova_edna))
has_pp_mean_edna <- "pp_mean" %in% available_vars_edna

cat("Available variables:", paste(available_vars_edna, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("pp_mean available:", has_pp_mean_edna, "\n")

# Create output directory
if(!dir.exists("./PERMANOVA_eDNA")) {
  dir.create("./PERMANOVA_eDNA")
}

#========================= PERMDISP TESTING =========================

cat("\nTesting PERMDISP assumptions\n")
permdisp_site_edna <- betadisper(dist_matrix_edna, metadata_for_permanova_edna$sitelocality)
permdisp_test_site_edna <- permutest(permdisp_site_edna, permutations = 999)
f_val_edna <- permdisp_test_site_edna$tab$F[1]
p_val_edna <- permdisp_test_site_edna$tab$`Pr(>F)`[1]
assumption_met_edna <- ifelse(p_val_edna >= 0.05, "PASSED", " VIOLATED")
cat(sprintf("Sitelocality PERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_edna, p_val_edna, assumption_met_edna))

#========================= HELPER FUNCTION =========================

# Helper function following metabarcoding approach
run_permanova_edna <- function(formula_str, test_name) {
  tryCatch({
    result <- adonis2(
      as.formula(paste("dist_matrix_edna ~", formula_str)),
      data = metadata_for_permanova_edna,
      permutations = 999,
      by = "terms"
    )
    
    result_df <- as.data.frame(result)
    model_r2 <- sum(result_df[!rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total"), "R2"], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Extract detailed statistics for each term
    term_rows <- !rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total")
    
    if (sum(term_rows) > 0) {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = rownames(result_df)[term_rows],
        Df = result_df[term_rows, "Df"],
        SumOfSqs = result_df[term_rows, "SumOfSqs"],
        R2 = result_df[term_rows, "R2"],
        F_Statistic = result_df[term_rows, "F"],
        P_value = result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"],
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    } else {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = NA,
        Df = NA,
        SumOfSqs = NA,
        R2 = NA,
        F_Statistic = NA,
        P_value = NA,
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    
    return(list(result = result, r2 = model_r2, detailed_stats = detailed_stats))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("%-35s: ERROR - %s\n", test_name, e$message))
    return(list(result = NULL, r2 = NA, detailed_stats = NULL))
  })
}

#========================= INITIALIZE RESULTS =========================

results_edna <- list()
detailed_stats_list_edna <- list()

cat("\nRunning eDNA PERMANOVA analyses following metabarcoding framework...\n")

#========================= MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) =========================

cat("\n=== MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) ===\n")

# Individual environmental effects
results_edna$depth_alone <- run_permanova_edna("Depth", "Depth Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["depth_alone"]] <- results_edna$depth_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results_edna$depth_alone$r2))

results_edna$visibility_alone <- run_permanova_edna("Visibility_std_rank", "Visibility Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["visibility_alone"]] <- results_edna$visibility_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Visibility Alone", results_edna$visibility_alone$r2))

# Individual geographic effects (following metabarcoding focus)
results_edna$latitude_alone <- run_permanova_edna("Latitude", "Latitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["latitude_alone"]] <- results_edna$latitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results_edna$latitude_alone$r2))

results_edna$longitude_alone <- run_permanova_edna("Longitude", "Longitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["longitude_alone"]] <- results_edna$longitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results_edna$longitude_alone$r2))

# pp_mean effect (if available)
if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  results_edna$pp_alone <- run_permanova_edna("pp_mean", "pp_mean Alone")
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["pp_alone"]] <- results_edna$pp_alone$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean Alone", results_edna$pp_alone$r2))
}

# Site effect
results_edna$site_alone <- run_permanova_edna("sitelocality", "Site Effects Alone")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["site_alone"]] <- results_edna$site_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results_edna$site_alone$r2))

#========================= CONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls) =========================

cat("\n=== CONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls) ===\n")
cat("Using model comparison method for true conditional variance partitioning\n")

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  # 1. pp_mean | Longitude (following metabarcoding framework)
  cat("Running conditional test: pp_mean | Longitude\n")
  longitude_only_r2_edna <- results_edna$longitude_alone$r2
  pp_longitude_result_edna <- run_permanova_edna("Longitude + pp_mean", "Longitude + pp_mean")
  pp_longitude_r2_edna <- pp_longitude_result_edna$r2
  pp_conditional_r2_edna <- pp_longitude_r2_edna - longitude_only_r2_edna
  
  results_edna$pp_after_longitude <- list(
    r2 = pp_conditional_r2_edna,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "pp_mean | Longitude",
      Term = "pp_mean_conditional",
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = pp_conditional_r2_edna,
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Model_R2 = pp_conditional_r2_edna,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["pp_after_longitude"]] <- results_edna$pp_after_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean | Longitude", pp_conditional_r2_edna))
  
  # 2. Longitude | pp_mean (following metabarcoding framework)
  cat("Running conditional test: Longitude | pp_mean\n")
  pp_only_r2_edna <- results_edna$pp_alone$r2
  longitude_conditional_r2_edna <- pp_longitude_r2_edna - pp_only_r2_edna
  
  results_edna$longitude_after_pp <- list(
    r2 = longitude_conditional_r2_edna,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "Longitude | pp_mean",
      Term = "longitude_conditional",
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = longitude_conditional_r2_edna,
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Model_R2 = longitude_conditional_r2_edna,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["longitude_after_pp"]] <- results_edna$longitude_after_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude | pp_mean", longitude_conditional_r2_edna))
}

#========================= SEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters) =========================

cat("\n=== SEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters) ===\n")
cat("Following metabarcoding sequential model building\n")

# 1. Depth + Visibility_std_rank - Sequential: depth first, then visibility|depth
results_edna$env_baseline <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank", "Environmental Baseline (D+V)")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_baseline"]] <- results_edna$env_baseline$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline (D+V)", results_edna$env_baseline$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  # 2. Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean - Sequential: env first, then pp|env
  results_edna$env_pp <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean", "Environmental + pp_mean")
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_pp"]] <- results_edna$env_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + pp_mean", results_edna$env_pp$r2))
}

# 3. Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Longitude - Sequential: env first, then longitude|env
results_edna$env_longitude <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Longitude", "Environmental + Longitude")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_longitude"]] <- results_edna$env_longitude$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Longitude", results_edna$env_longitude$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  # 4. Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean + Longitude - Sequential: all variables in order
  results_edna$env_pp_longitude <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean + Longitude", "Environmental + pp_mean + Longitude")
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_pp_longitude"]] <- results_edna$env_pp_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + pp_mean + Longitude", results_edna$env_pp_longitude$r2))
}

# 5. Depth + Visibility_std_rank + sitelocality - Sequential: env first, then site|env
results_edna$env_site <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + sitelocality", "Environmental + Site")
detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_site"]] <- results_edna$env_site$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results_edna$env_site$r2))

#========================= ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS =========================

cat("\n=== ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS ===\n")

# Geography | Environment (using model comparison method)
cat("Running conditional test: geography | environment\n")
env_only_r2_edna <- results_edna$env_baseline$r2
env_spatial_result_edna <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Latitude + Longitude", "Environmental + Spatial")
env_spatial_r2_edna <- env_spatial_result_edna$r2
spatial_conditional_r2_edna <- env_spatial_r2_edna - env_only_r2_edna

results_edna$geography_after_env <- list(
  r2 = spatial_conditional_r2_edna,
  detailed_stats = data.frame(
    Test_Name = "Geography | Environment", 
    Term = "geography_conditional",
    Df = NA,
    SumOfSqs = NA,
    R2 = spatial_conditional_r2_edna,
    F_Statistic = NA,
    P_value = NA,
    Model_R2 = spatial_conditional_r2_edna,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
)
detailed_stats_list_edna[["geography_after_env"]] <- results_edna$geography_after_env$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", spatial_conditional_r2_edna))

# Store the environmental + spatial model
results_edna$env_spatial <- env_spatial_result_edna
detailed_stats_list_edna[["env_spatial"]] <- results_edna$env_spatial$detailed_stats

# Full model
if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  results_edna$full_model <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Latitude + Longitude + pp_mean", "Full Model")
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["full_model"]] <- results_edna$full_model$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results_edna$full_model$r2))
  
  # Site | All Measured Variables (following metabarcoding)
  cat("Running conditional test: site | all variables\n")
  full_model_r2_edna <- results_edna$full_model$r2
  site_all_result_edna <- run_permanova_edna("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Latitude + Longitude + pp_mean + sitelocality", "Site + All Variables")
  site_all_r2_edna <- site_all_result_edna$r2
  site_conditional_r2_edna <- site_all_r2_edna - full_model_r2_edna
  
  results_edna$site_after_all <- list(
    r2 = site_conditional_r2_edna,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "Site | All Measured Variables",
      Term = "site_conditional", 
      Df = NA,
      SumOfSqs = NA,
      R2 = site_conditional_r2_edna,
      F_Statistic = NA,
      P_value = NA,
      Model_R2 = site_conditional_r2_edna,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_edna[["site_after_all"]] <- results_edna$site_after_all$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Measured Variables", site_conditional_r2_edna))
}

#========================= COMPILE RESULTS =========================

cat("\n=== COMPILING ALIGNED RESULTS ===\n")

# Combine all detailed statistics
all_detailed_stats_edna <- do.call(rbind, detailed_stats_list_edna[!sapply(detailed_stats_list_edna, is.null)])
all_detailed_stats_edna$Data_Type <- "eDNA_18S"
all_detailed_stats_edna$Fraction <- "ASV_level"

# Create summary matching metabarcoding format
test_names_edna <- c()
r2_values_edna <- c()

# Add marginal tests
test_names_edna <- c(test_names_edna, "Depth Alone", "Visibility Alone", "Latitude Alone", "Longitude Alone", "Site Effects Alone")
r2_values_edna <- c(r2_values_edna, results_edna$depth_alone$r2, results_edna$visibility_alone$r2, results_edna$latitude_alone$r2, results_edna$longitude_alone$r2, results_edna$site_alone$r2)

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  test_names_edna <- c(test_names_edna, "pp_mean Alone", "pp_mean | Longitude", "Longitude | pp_mean")
  r2_values_edna <- c(r2_values_edna, results_edna$pp_alone$r2, results_edna$pp_after_longitude$r2, results_edna$longitude_after_pp$r2)
}

# Add sequential tests
test_names_edna <- c(test_names_edna, "Environmental Baseline", "Environmental + Site", "Geography | Environment")
r2_values_edna <- c(r2_values_edna, results_edna$env_baseline$r2, results_edna$env_site$r2, results_edna$geography_after_env$r2)

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  test_names_edna <- c(test_names_edna, "Environmental + pp_mean", "Full Model", "Site | All Measured Variables")
  r2_values_edna <- c(r2_values_edna, results_edna$env_pp$r2, results_edna$full_model$r2, results_edna$site_after_all$r2)
}

summary_results_edna <- data.frame(
  Test = test_names_edna,
  R2 = r2_values_edna,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sort by R² for interpretation
summary_results_edna <- summary_results_edna[order(summary_results_edna$R2, decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE), ]

#========================= SAVE RESULTS =========================

# Save results with aligned naming
write.csv(all_detailed_stats_edna, 
          file.path("./PERMANOVA_eDNA/eDNA_18S_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_detailed_statistics.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(summary_results_edna, 
          file.path("./PERMANOVA_eDNA/eDNA_18S_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_summary.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

#========================= RESULTS SUMMARY =========================

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("eDNA 18S PERMANOVA RESULTS - ALIGNED WITH METABARCODING FRAMEWORK\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")

cat("\nMARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results_edna$depth_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Visibility Alone", results_edna$visibility_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results_edna$latitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results_edna$longitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results_edna$site_alone$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean Alone", results_edna$pp_alone$r2))
  
  cat("\nCONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls):\n")
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean | Longitude", results_edna$pp_after_longitude$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude | pp_mean", results_edna$longitude_after_pp$r2))
}

cat("\nSEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline", results_edna$env_baseline$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results_edna$env_site$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", results_edna$geography_after_env$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_edna) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + pp_mean", results_edna$env_pp$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results_edna$full_model$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Variables", results_edna$site_after_all$r2))
}

cat(sprintf("\nPERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_edna, p_val_edna, assumption_met_edna))

cat("\nResults saved to ./PERMANOVA_eDNA/\n")
cat("- Detailed statistics: eDNA_18S_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_detailed_statistics.csv\n")
cat("- Summary results: eDNA_18S_PERMANOVA_ALIGNED_summary.csv\n")

# Display sorted summary for quick interpretation
cat("\n=== RANKED RESULTS (by R²) ===\n")
print(summary_results_edna)
```


============================================================================
eDNA 18S JACCARD PERMANOVA - SUPPLEMENTARY ANALYSIS
Using presence/absence data and Jaccard dissimilarity
=============================================================================
```{r PERMANOVAs with Jaccard's distance}
#library(vegan)
#library(dplyr)

#========================= PREPARE DATA =========================

# Use existing Jaccard distance matrix and metadata
dist_matrix_jaccard_edna <- jaccard_dist_eDNA
metadata_jaccard_edna <- metadata_edna

# Ensure sample alignment for Jaccard analysis
jaccard_samples <- labels(dist_matrix_jaccard_edna)
metadata_jaccard_edna <- metadata_jaccard_edna[jaccard_samples, ]

cat("Jaccard analysis:", length(jaccard_samples), "samples\n")
cat("Sample alignment check:", identical(jaccard_samples, rownames(metadata_jaccard_edna)), "\n")

# Check available variables
available_vars_jaccard <- intersect(c("Depth", "Visibility_std_rank", "Latitude", "Longitude", "sitelocality", "pp_mean"), 
                                   colnames(metadata_jaccard_edna))
has_pp_mean_jaccard <- "pp_mean" %in% available_vars_jaccard

cat("Available variables:", paste(available_vars_jaccard, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Create output directory
if(!dir.exists("./PERMANOVA_eDNA_Jaccard")) {
  dir.create("./PERMANOVA_eDNA_Jaccard")
}

#========================= PERMDISP TESTING =========================

cat("\nTesting PERMDISP assumptions for Jaccard distances\n")
permdisp_jaccard_edna <- betadisper(dist_matrix_jaccard_edna, metadata_jaccard_edna$sitelocality)
permdisp_test_jaccard_edna <- permutest(permdisp_jaccard_edna, permutations = 999)
f_val_jaccard <- permdisp_test_jaccard_edna$tab$F[1]
p_val_jaccard <- permdisp_test_jaccard_edna$tab$`Pr(>F)`[1]
assumption_met_jaccard <- ifelse(p_val_jaccard >= 0.05, "PASSED", " VIOLATED")
cat(sprintf("Jaccard PERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_jaccard, p_val_jaccard, assumption_met_jaccard))

#========================= HELPER FUNCTION =========================

run_permanova_jaccard <- function(formula_str, test_name) {
  tryCatch({
    result <- adonis2(
      as.formula(paste("dist_matrix_jaccard_edna ~", formula_str)),
      data = metadata_jaccard_edna,
      permutations = 999,
      by = "terms"
    )
    
    result_df <- as.data.frame(result)
    model_r2 <- sum(result_df[!rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total"), "R2"], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Extract detailed statistics for each term
    term_rows <- !rownames(result_df) %in% c("Residual", "Total")
    
    if (sum(term_rows) > 0) {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = rownames(result_df)[term_rows],
        Df = result_df[term_rows, "Df"],
        SumOfSqs = result_df[term_rows, "SumOfSqs"],
        R2 = result_df[term_rows, "R2"],
        F_Statistic = result_df[term_rows, "F"],
        P_value = result_df[term_rows, "Pr(>F)"],
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    } else {
      detailed_stats <- data.frame(
        Test_Name = test_name,
        Term = NA,
        Df = NA,
        SumOfSqs = NA,
        R2 = NA,
        F_Statistic = NA,
        P_value = NA,
        Model_R2 = model_r2,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    
    return(list(result = result, r2 = model_r2, detailed_stats = detailed_stats))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("%-35s: ERROR - %s\n", test_name, e$message))
    return(list(result = NULL, r2 = NA, detailed_stats = NULL))
  })
}

#========================= INITIALIZE RESULTS =========================

results_jaccard <- list()
detailed_stats_list_jaccard <- list()

cat("\nRunning Jaccard PERMANOVA analyses...\n")

#========================= MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) =========================

cat("\n=== MARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects) ===\n")

results_jaccard$depth_alone <- run_permanova_jaccard("Depth", "Depth Alone")
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["depth_alone"]] <- results_jaccard$depth_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results_jaccard$depth_alone$r2))

results_jaccard$visibility_alone <- run_permanova_jaccard("Visibility_std_rank", "Visibility Alone")
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["visibility_alone"]] <- results_jaccard$visibility_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Visibility Alone", results_jaccard$visibility_alone$r2))

results_jaccard$latitude_alone <- run_permanova_jaccard("Latitude", "Latitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["latitude_alone"]] <- results_jaccard$latitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results_jaccard$latitude_alone$r2))

results_jaccard$longitude_alone <- run_permanova_jaccard("Longitude", "Longitude Alone")
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["longitude_alone"]] <- results_jaccard$longitude_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results_jaccard$longitude_alone$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_jaccard) {
  results_jaccard$pp_alone <- run_permanova_jaccard("pp_mean", "pp_mean Alone")
  detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["pp_alone"]] <- results_jaccard$pp_alone$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean Alone", results_jaccard$pp_alone$r2))
}

results_jaccard$site_alone <- run_permanova_jaccard("sitelocality", "Site Effects Alone")
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["site_alone"]] <- results_jaccard$site_alone$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results_jaccard$site_alone$r2))

#========================= CONDITIONAL TESTS =========================

cat("\n=== CONDITIONAL TESTS (Explicit Controls) ===\n")

if (has_pp_mean_jaccard) {
  # pp_mean | Longitude
  longitude_only_r2_jaccard <- results_jaccard$longitude_alone$r2
  pp_longitude_result_jaccard <- run_permanova_jaccard("Longitude + pp_mean", "Longitude + pp_mean")
  pp_longitude_r2_jaccard <- pp_longitude_result_jaccard$r2
  pp_conditional_r2_jaccard <- pp_longitude_r2_jaccard - longitude_only_r2_jaccard
  
  results_jaccard$pp_after_longitude <- list(
    r2 = pp_conditional_r2_jaccard,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "pp_mean | Longitude",
      Term = "pp_mean_conditional",
      Df = NA, SumOfSqs = NA, R2 = pp_conditional_r2_jaccard,
      F_Statistic = NA, P_value = NA, Model_R2 = pp_conditional_r2_jaccard,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["pp_after_longitude"]] <- results_jaccard$pp_after_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean | Longitude", pp_conditional_r2_jaccard))
  
  # Longitude | pp_mean
  pp_only_r2_jaccard <- results_jaccard$pp_alone$r2
  longitude_conditional_r2_jaccard <- pp_longitude_r2_jaccard - pp_only_r2_jaccard
  
  results_jaccard$longitude_after_pp <- list(
    r2 = longitude_conditional_r2_jaccard,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "Longitude | pp_mean",
      Term = "longitude_conditional",
      Df = NA, SumOfSqs = NA, R2 = longitude_conditional_r2_jaccard,
      F_Statistic = NA, P_value = NA, Model_R2 = longitude_conditional_r2_jaccard,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["longitude_after_pp"]] <- results_jaccard$longitude_after_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude | pp_mean", longitude_conditional_r2_jaccard))
}

#========================= SEQUENTIAL TESTS =========================

cat("\n=== SEQUENTIAL TESTS (Order Matters) ===\n")

results_jaccard$env_baseline <- run_permanova_jaccard("Depth + Visibility_std_rank", "Environmental Baseline (D+V)")
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["env_baseline"]] <- results_jaccard$env_baseline$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline (D+V)", results_jaccard$env_baseline$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_jaccard) {
  results_jaccard$env_pp <- run_permanova_jaccard("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean", "Environmental + pp_mean")
  detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["env_pp"]] <- results_jaccard$env_pp$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + pp_mean", results_jaccard$env_pp$r2))
}

results_jaccard$env_longitude <- run_permanova_jaccard("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Longitude", "Environmental + Longitude")
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["env_longitude"]] <- results_jaccard$env_longitude$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Longitude", results_jaccard$env_longitude$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_jaccard) {
  results_jaccard$env_pp_longitude <- run_permanova_jaccard("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + pp_mean + Longitude", "Environmental + pp_mean + Longitude")
  detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["env_pp_longitude"]] <- results_jaccard$env_pp_longitude$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + pp_mean + Longitude", results_jaccard$env_pp_longitude$r2))
}

results_jaccard$env_site <- run_permanova_jaccard("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + sitelocality", "Environmental + Site")
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["env_site"]] <- results_jaccard$env_site$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results_jaccard$env_site$r2))

#========================= ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS =========================

cat("\n=== ADDITIONAL MODEL COMPARISONS ===\n")

# Geography | Environment
env_only_r2_jaccard <- results_jaccard$env_baseline$r2
env_spatial_result_jaccard <- run_permanova_jaccard("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Latitude + Longitude", "Environmental + Spatial")
env_spatial_r2_jaccard <- env_spatial_result_jaccard$r2
spatial_conditional_r2_jaccard <- env_spatial_r2_jaccard - env_only_r2_jaccard

results_jaccard$geography_after_env <- list(
  r2 = spatial_conditional_r2_jaccard,
  detailed_stats = data.frame(
    Test_Name = "Geography | Environment", Term = "geography_conditional",
    Df = NA, SumOfSqs = NA, R2 = spatial_conditional_r2_jaccard,
    F_Statistic = NA, P_value = NA, Model_R2 = spatial_conditional_r2_jaccard,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
)
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["geography_after_env"]] <- results_jaccard$geography_after_env$detailed_stats
cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", spatial_conditional_r2_jaccard))

results_jaccard$env_spatial <- env_spatial_result_jaccard
detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["env_spatial"]] <- results_jaccard$env_spatial$detailed_stats

# Full model
if (has_pp_mean_jaccard) {
  results_jaccard$full_model <- run_permanova_jaccard("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Latitude + Longitude + pp_mean", "Full Model")
  detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["full_model"]] <- results_jaccard$full_model$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results_jaccard$full_model$r2))
  
  # Site | All Variables
  full_model_r2_jaccard <- results_jaccard$full_model$r2
  site_all_result_jaccard <- run_permanova_jaccard("Depth + Visibility_std_rank + Latitude + Longitude + pp_mean + sitelocality", "Site + All Variables")
  site_all_r2_jaccard <- site_all_result_jaccard$r2
  site_conditional_r2_jaccard <- site_all_r2_jaccard - full_model_r2_jaccard
  
  results_jaccard$site_after_all <- list(
    r2 = site_conditional_r2_jaccard,
    detailed_stats = data.frame(
      Test_Name = "Site | All Measured Variables", Term = "site_conditional", 
      Df = NA, SumOfSqs = NA, R2 = site_conditional_r2_jaccard,
      F_Statistic = NA, P_value = NA, Model_R2 = site_conditional_r2_jaccard,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  detailed_stats_list_jaccard[["site_after_all"]] <- results_jaccard$site_after_all$detailed_stats
  cat(sprintf("%-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Measured Variables", site_conditional_r2_jaccard))
}

#========================= COMPILE RESULTS =========================

# Combine all detailed statistics
all_detailed_stats_jaccard <- do.call(rbind, detailed_stats_list_jaccard[!sapply(detailed_stats_list_jaccard, is.null)])
all_detailed_stats_jaccard$Data_Type <- "eDNA_18S_Jaccard"
all_detailed_stats_jaccard$Distance_Metric <- "Jaccard"

# Create summary
test_names_jaccard <- c("Depth Alone", "Visibility Alone", "Latitude Alone", "Longitude Alone", "Site Effects Alone")
r2_values_jaccard <- c(results_jaccard$depth_alone$r2, results_jaccard$visibility_alone$r2,
```
