```{r PERMANOVAs with Jaccard's distance}
                      results_jaccard$latitude_alone$r2, results_jaccard$longitude_alone$r2, 
                      results_jaccard$site_alone$r2)

if (has_pp_mean_jaccard) {
  test_names_jaccard <- c(test_names_jaccard, "pp_mean Alone", "pp_mean | Longitude", "Longitude | pp_mean")
  r2_values_jaccard <- c(r2_values_jaccard, results_jaccard$pp_alone$r2, results_jaccard$pp_after_longitude$r2, results_jaccard$longitude_after_pp$r2)
}

test_names_jaccard <- c(test_names_jaccard, "Environmental Baseline", "Environmental + Site", "Geography | Environment")
r2_values_jaccard <- c(r2_values_jaccard, results_jaccard$env_baseline$r2, results_jaccard$env_site$r2, results_jaccard$geography_after_env$r2)

if (has_pp_mean_jaccard) {
  test_names_jaccard <- c(test_names_jaccard, "Environmental + pp_mean", "Full Model", "Site | All Measured Variables")
  r2_values_jaccard <- c(r2_values_jaccard, results_jaccard$env_pp$r2, results_jaccard$full_model$r2, results_jaccard$site_after_all$r2)
}

summary_results_jaccard <- data.frame(
  Test = test_names_jaccard,
  R2 = r2_values_jaccard,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
summary_results_jaccard <- summary_results_jaccard[order(summary_results_jaccard$R2, decreasing = TRUE, na.last = TRUE), ]

#========================= SAVE RESULTS =========================

write.csv(all_detailed_stats_jaccard, 
          file.path("./PERMANOVA_eDNA_Jaccard/eDNA_18S_Jaccard_PERMANOVA_detailed_statistics.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(summary_results_jaccard, 
          file.path("./PERMANOVA_eDNA_Jaccard/eDNA_18S_Jaccard_PERMANOVA_summary.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

#========================= RESULTS SUMMARY =========================

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("eDNA 18S JACCARD PERMANOVA RESULTS - SUPPLEMENTARY ANALYSIS\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")

cat(sprintf("\nPERMDISP: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_jaccard, p_val_jaccard, assumption_met_jaccard))

cat("\nMARGINAL TESTS (Individual Effects):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Depth Alone", results_jaccard$depth_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Visibility Alone", results_jaccard$visibility_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Latitude Alone", results_jaccard$latitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Longitude Alone", results_jaccard$longitude_alone$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site Effects Alone", results_jaccard$site_alone$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_jaccard) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "pp_mean Alone", results_jaccard$pp_alone$r2))
}

cat("\nSEQUENTIAL TESTS:\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental Baseline", results_jaccard$env_baseline$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + Site", results_jaccard$env_site$r2))
cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Geography | Environment", results_jaccard$geography_after_env$r2))

if (has_pp_mean_jaccard) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Environmental + pp_mean", results_jaccard$env_pp$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Full Model", results_jaccard$full_model$r2))
  cat(sprintf("  %-35s: R² = %.3f\n", "Site | All Variables", results_jaccard$site_after_all$r2))
}

cat("\n=== COMPARISON: Bray-Curtis vs Jaccard ===\n")
cat("PERMDISP Results:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Bray-Curtis: F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_edna, p_val_edna, assumption_met_edna))
cat(sprintf("  Jaccard:     F = %.3f, p = %.3f %s\n", f_val_jaccard, p_val_jaccard, assumption_met_jaccard))

cat("\nResults saved to ./PERMANOVA_eDNA_Jaccard/\n")

print(summary_results_jaccard)
```



# =======================================
# -------------- PCoAs ------------------
# =======================================
Adapted from ARMS analysis for eDNA dataset - focusing on sitelocality, depth, and Visibility_std_rank
```{r PCoA}
# Load required libraries
#library(phyloseq)
#library(ggplot2)
#library(dplyr)
#library(vegan)
#library(patchwork)
#library(tidyr)

# Load the eDNA data (assumes 4th root transformation objects from NMDS script)
# load("./NMDS_eDNA/eDNA_NMDS_objects.Rdata")

# Use consistent color scheme and site ordering
ordered_sites_edna <- c("Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_deep", "EFGB_shallow", 
                       "Bright_shallow", "Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2",
                       "McGrail_deep", "Alderdice_deep1", "Alderdice_deep2",
                       "Alderdice_shallow", "Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")

c12_sites_edna <- c("Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077",      
                   "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
                   "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3",
                   "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
                   "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599",
                   "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599",
                   "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30",
                   "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C",
                   "McGrail_deep" = "#015951",
                   "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E")

# Create output directory
if(!dir.exists("./PCoA_eDNA")) {
  dir.create("./PCoA_eDNA")
  cat("Created directory: ./PCoA_eDNA\n")
}
```


```{r data prep}
# ---------------------- DATA PREPARATION -----------------
# Use the 4th root transformed proportions from NMDS script
# Extract data and create proportions
biotic_edna_raw <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
biotic_percs_edna <- sweep(biotic_edna_raw, 1, rowSums(biotic_edna_raw), "/")
biotic_percs_4th_edna <- biotic_percs_edna^0.25

# Verify data structure (samples as rows, ASVs as columns)
cat("Data dimensions:", dim(biotic_percs_4th_edna), "(samples x ASVs)\n")
cat("Sample sums range:", range(rowSums(biotic_percs_4th_edna)), "\n")

# Get metadata
metadata_edna <- as.data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
```

# Metadata cleaning if needed
```{r}
# ============================================================================
# CLEAN METADATA FORMATTING FOR PHYLOSEQ eDNA ANALYSIS
# Final version - handles duplicate columns and ensures dplyr compatibility
# ============================================================================

cat("=== CLEANING PHYLOSEQ METADATA ===\n")

# Step 1: Extract metadata from phyloseq object as data.frame
# Note: Use data.frame() constructor, not as.data.frame() for phyloseq compatibility
metadata_raw <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
cat("Original metadata dimensions:", dim(metadata_raw), "\n")

# Step 2: Remove duplicate columns (those with .1, .2, .3 suffixes)
# This handles cases where diversity indices were calculated multiple times
duplicate_pattern <- "\\.[0-9]+$"  # Matches .1, .2, .3, etc. at end of column names
cols_to_keep <- !grepl(duplicate_pattern, colnames(metadata_raw))
metadata_clean <- metadata_raw[, cols_to_keep]

cat("Cleaned metadata dimensions:", dim(metadata_clean), "\n")
cat("Removed", ncol(metadata_raw) - ncol(metadata_clean), "duplicate columns\n")

# Step 3: Ensure proper data.frame for dplyr operations
# Some phyloseq operations can create objects that aren't fully compatible with dplyr
metadata_edna <- data.frame(metadata_clean)
rownames(metadata_edna) <- rownames(metadata_clean)

# Step 4: Verify the result
cat("Final metadata class:", class(metadata_edna), "\n")
cat("Sample count:", nrow(metadata_edna), "\n")
cat("Variable count:", ncol(metadata_edna), "\n")

# Step 5: Update phyloseq object with cleaned metadata (optional)
sample_data(physeq_eDNA_rarefied) <- sample_data(metadata_clean)

# Display final column names for verification
cat("\nFinal metadata columns:\n")
print(colnames(metadata_edna))

cat("\nMetadata cleaning complete. Object 'metadata_edna' ready for analysis.\n")

# ============================================================================
# USAGE NOTES FOR FUTURE USERS:
# ============================================================================
# 
# 1. This code assumes you have a phyloseq object called 'physeq_eDNA_rarefied'
#    Adjust the phyloseq object name as needed for your dataset
#
# 2. The duplicate column removal targets columns ending with .1, .2, .3, etc.
#    This commonly occurs when diversity calculations are run multiple times
#
# 3. The final 'metadata_edna' object is guaranteed to be a regular data.frame
#    that works with dplyr operations (select, filter, mutate, etc.)
#
# 4. Row names (sample IDs) are preserved throughout the cleaning process
#
# 5. The original phyloseq object is updated with cleaned metadata, but the
#    'metadata_edna' object is kept separate for downstream analyses
#
# ============================================================================
```


# Final PCoA that includes PP_mean and correct plots
Adapted from ARMS analysis for eDNA dataset - focusing on sitelocality, depth, and Visibility_std_rank
```{r prep}
# Load required libraries
library(phyloseq)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(vegan)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyr)

# Load the eDNA data (assumes 4th root transformation objects from NMDS script)
# load("./NMDS_eDNA/eDNA_NMDS_objects.Rdata")

# Use consistent color scheme and site ordering
ordered_sites_edna <- c("Stetson_shallow", "EFGB_deep", "EFGB_shallow", 
                       "Bright_shallow", "Bright_deep1", "Bright_deep2",
                       "McGrail_deep", "Alderdice_deep1", "Alderdice_deep2",
                       "Alderdice_shallow", "Diaphus_deep1", "Diaphus_deep2")

c12_sites_edna <- c("Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077",      
                   "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
                   "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3",
                   "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
                   "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599",
                   "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599",
                   "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30",
                   "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C",
                   "McGrail_deep" = "#015951",
                   "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E")

# Create output directory
if(!dir.exists("./PCoA_eDNA")) {
  dir.create("./PCoA_eDNA")
  cat("Created directory: ./PCoA_eDNA\n")
}

cat("=== eDNA PCoA Analysis ===\n")

# ---------------------- DATA PREPARATION -----------------
# Use the 4th root transformed proportions from NMDS script
# If not available, create from rarefied data
if(!exists("biotic_percs_4th_edna")) {
  # Extract data and create proportions
  biotic_edna_raw <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
  biotic_percs_edna <- sweep(biotic_edna_raw, 1, rowSums(biotic_edna_raw), "/")
  biotic_percs_4th_edna <- biotic_percs_edna^0.25
  cat("Created 4th root transformed data from rarefied data\n")
}

# Verify data structure (samples as rows, ASVs as columns)
cat("Data dimensions:", dim(biotic_percs_4th_edna), "(samples x ASVs)\n")
cat("Sample sums range:", range(rowSums(biotic_percs_4th_edna)), "\n")

# Get metadata
metadata_edna <- as.data.frame(sample_data(physeq_eDNA_rarefied))
```


```{r PCoA Plot Function}
# ---------------------- FUNCTION TO CREATE PCoA PLOTS -----------------
create_pcoa_plot_edna <- function(data_matrix, metadata, color_var, color_palette, title_text, legend_title) {
  # Compute distance matrix and PCoA
  distance_matrix_edna <- vegdist(data_matrix, method = "bray")
  pcoa_result_edna <- cmdscale(distance_matrix_edna, eig = TRUE, k = 2)
  pcoa_points_edna <- as.data.frame(pcoa_result_edna$points)
  colnames(pcoa_points_edna) <- c("PCoA1", "PCoA2")
  
  # Add metadata
  pcoa_points_edna[[color_var]] <- metadata[[color_var]]
  
  # Calculate variance explained
  eig_values_edna <- pcoa_result_edna$eig[pcoa_result_edna$eig > 0]  # Only positive eigenvalues
  var_explained_edna <- eig_values_edna / sum(eig_values_edna) * 100
  
  # Function to calculate convex hull
  find_hull_pcoa_edna <- function(df) df[chull(df$PCoA1, df$PCoA2), ]
  
  # Create plot based on variable type
  if(color_var == "sitelocality") {
    # Categorical variable - use discrete colors and hulls
    pcoa_points_edna$sitelocality <- factor(pcoa_points_edna$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_edna)
    
    # Calculate hulls
    hulls_pcoa_edna <- pcoa_points_edna %>% 
      group_by(sitelocality) %>% 
      do(find_hull_pcoa_edna(.))
    
    plot_edna <- ggplot(pcoa_points_edna, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2, fill = sitelocality)) +
      geom_polygon(data = hulls_pcoa_edna, 
                   aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2, group = sitelocality, fill = sitelocality), 
                   alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
      geom_point(size = 4, shape = 21, color = "black") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
      guides(fill = guide_legend(title = legend_title))
  } else {
    # Continuous variable - use color gradient, no hulls
    plot_edna <- ggplot(pcoa_points_edna, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2, fill = get(color_var))) +
      geom_point(size = 4, shape = 21, color = "black") +
      scale_fill_viridis_c(option = if(color_var == "Depth") "mako" else "cividis", name = legend_title) +
      guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = legend_title))
  }
    
  # Add common elements
  plot_edna <- plot_edna +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(title = title_text,
         x = paste0("PCoA1 (", round(var_explained_edna[1], 1), "%)"),
         y = paste0("PCoA2 (", round(var_explained_edna[2], 1), "%)")) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
          panel.grid = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
          legend.position = "bottom")
  
  return(plot_edna)
}
```


```{r Crate PCoA Plots}
# ---------------------- CREATE PCoA PLOTS (4-PANEL APPROACH) -----------------
# Compute distance matrix and PCoA for plotting
distance_matrix_plot_edna <- vegdist(biotic_percs_4th_edna, method = "bray")
pcoa_result_plot_edna <- cmdscale(distance_matrix_plot_edna, eig = TRUE, k = 2)
pcoa_scores_edna <- as.data.frame(pcoa_result_plot_edna$points)
colnames(pcoa_scores_edna) <- c("PCoA1", "PCoA2")

# Add metadata to scores
pcoa_scores_edna$sitelocality <- metadata_df_edna$sitelocality
pcoa_scores_edna$Depth <- metadata_df_edna$Depth
pcoa_scores_edna$Visibility_std_rank <- metadata_df_edna$Visibility_std_rank
pcoa_scores_edna$pp_mean <- metadata_df_edna$pp_mean

# Calculate variance explained
eig_values_plot_edna <- pcoa_result_plot_edna$eig[pcoa_result_plot_edna$eig > 0]
var_explained_plot_edna <- eig_values_plot_edna / sum(eig_values_plot_edna) * 100
axis1_var_pcoa_edna <- round(var_explained_plot_edna[1], 1)
axis2_var_pcoa_edna <- round(var_explained_plot_edna[2], 1)

# Set factor levels for sitelocality
pcoa_scores_edna$sitelocality <- factor(pcoa_scores_edna$sitelocality, levels = ordered_sites_edna)

# ---------------------- PANEL A: PCoA BY SITE ---------------------
p_pcoa_site_edna <- ggplot(pcoa_scores_edna, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # Add points with eDNA styling (no hulls)
  geom_point(aes(fill = sitelocality), size = 8, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
  
  # Use eDNA color scheme
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_edna) +
  
  # Labels and theme
  
  labs(title = "eDNA 18S: PCoA Bray-Curtis (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa_edna, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa_edna, "%)"),
       fill = "Site") +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = "Site", ncol = 3, override.aes = list(size = 4)))

print(p_pcoa_site_edna)

# ---------------------- PANEL B: PCoA BY DEPTH ----------------------

p_pcoa_depth_edna <- ggplot(pcoa_scores_edna, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # Add points colored by depth
  geom_point(aes(fill = Depth), size = 8, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
  
  # Depth color scale (consistent with NMDS)
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", name = "Depth (meters)", direction = -1) +
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "eDNA 18S: PCoA by Depth (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa_edna, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa_edna, "%)")) +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Depth (meters)", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1))

print(p_pcoa_depth_edna)

# ---------------------- PANEL C: PCoA BY VISIBILITY ----------------------

p_pcoa_visibility_edna <- ggplot(pcoa_scores_edna, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # Add points colored by visibility
  geom_point(aes(fill = Visibility_std_rank), size = 8, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
  
  # Visibility color scale (consistent with NMDS)
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "cividis", name = "Visibility Rank") +
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "eDNA 18S: PCoA by Visibility (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa_edna, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa_edna, "%)")) +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Visibility Rank", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1))

print(p_pcoa_visibility_edna)

# ---------------------- PANEL D: PCoA BY PP_MEAN ----------------------

p_pcoa_pp_edna <- ggplot(pcoa_scores_edna, aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2)) +
  # Add reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # Add points colored by PP_mean
  geom_point(aes(fill = pp_mean), size = 8, shape = 21, 
             color = "black", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) + 
  
  # PP_mean color scale
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = "Primary Productivity") +
  
  # Labels and theme
  labs(title = "eDNA 18S: PCoA by Primary Productivity (4th Root)", 
       x = paste0("PCoA1 (", axis1_var_pcoa_edna, "%)"),
       y = paste0("PCoA2 (", axis2_var_pcoa_edna, "%)")) +
  theme_light() + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),  
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 20),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title = "Primary Productivity", 
                               title.position = "top", 
                               barwidth = 15, barheight = 1))

print(p_pcoa_pp_edna)

# ---------------------- CREATE COMBINED 4-PANEL PLOT ----------------------
# Remove individual titles for combined plot
p_pcoa_site_panel_edna <- p_pcoa_site_edna + labs(title = NULL)
p_pcoa_depth_panel_edna <- p_pcoa_depth_edna + labs(title = NULL)
p_pcoa_visibility_panel_edna <- p_pcoa_visibility_edna + labs(title = NULL)
p_pcoa_pp_panel_edna <- p_pcoa_pp_edna + labs(title = NULL)

# Four-panel combination
combined_pcoa_4panel_edna <- p_pcoa_site_panel_edna | p_pcoa_depth_panel_edna | p_pcoa_visibility_panel_edna | p_pcoa_pp_panel_edna

# Add overall title and panel labels
combined_pcoa_4panel_edna <- combined_pcoa_4panel_edna +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "eDNA 18S Communities: PCoA Bray-Curtis (4th Root Transformed)",
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5))
  )

print(combined_pcoa_4panel_edna)

# ---------------------- SAVE PLOTS -----------------
cat("4. Saving plots...\n")

# Save individual plots
ggsave("eDNA_18S_PCoA_Site.pdf", plot = p_pcoa_site_edna, device = "pdf", 
       path = "./PCoA_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("eDNA_18S_PCoA_Depth.pdf", plot = p_pcoa_depth_edna, device = "pdf", 
       path = "./PCoA_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("eDNA_18S_PCoA_Turbidity.pdf", plot = p_pcoa_visibility_edna, device = "pdf", 
         path = "./PCoA_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("eDNA_18S_PCoA_PP.pdf", plot = p_pcoa_pp_edna, device = "pdf", 
         path = "./PCoA_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Save combined plot
ggsave("eDNA_18S_PCoA_Combined.pdf", plot = combined_pcoa_4panel_edna, device = "pdf", 
         path = "./PCoA_eDNA", scale = 1, width = 19, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

```

Environmental Correlation Analysis
Variables included: depth, turbidity, pp_mean, latitude, and longitude
```{r PCoA Env. Correlation Analysis}
# ---------------------- ENVIRONMENTAL CORRELATION ANALYSIS -----------------
# Compute distance matrix and PCoA for correlation analysis
distance_matrix_env_edna <- vegdist(biotic_percs_4th_edna, method = "bray")
pcoa_result_env_edna <- cmdscale(distance_matrix_env_edna, eig = TRUE, k = 4)

# Extract PCoA scores (first 4 axes)
n_axes_edna <- min(4, ncol(pcoa_result_env_edna$points))
pcoa_scores_env_edna <- as.data.frame(pcoa_result_env_edna$points[, 1:n_axes_edna])
colnames(pcoa_scores_env_edna) <- paste0("PCoA", 1:n_axes_edna)

# Calculate variance explained
eig_values_env_edna <- pcoa_result_env_edna$eig[pcoa_result_env_edna$eig > 0]
pcoa_var_env_edna <- round(eig_values_env_edna / sum(eig_values_env_edna) * 100, 2)

cat("PCoA variance explained:\n")
for(i in 1:n_axes_edna) {
  cat(paste0("PCoA", i, ": ", pcoa_var_env_edna[i], "%\n"))
}
cat("Cumulative (first", n_axes_edna, "axes):", sum(pcoa_var_env_edna[1:n_axes_edna]), "%\n\n")

# Prepare environmental variables for fitting - ALL 5 SPECIFIED VARIABLES
env_vars_edna <- metadata_edna %>%
  dplyr::select(Depth, Visibility_std_rank, pp_mean, Latitude, Longitude) %>%
  dplyr::mutate_all(~ as.numeric(.))

# Check dimensions
cat("Metadata dimensions:", dim(metadata_edna), "\n")
cat("Environmental variables dimensions:", dim(env_vars_edna), "\n")
cat("4th root data dimensions:", dim(biotic_percs_4th_edna), "\n")

common_samples <- intersect(rownames(env_vars_edna), rownames(pcoa_scores_env_edna))
cat("Aligning to", length(common_samples), "common samples (should be 27)\n")

# Subset both to common samples in the same order
env_vars_aligned <- env_vars_edna[common_samples, ]
pcoa_scores_aligned <- pcoa_scores_env_edna[common_samples, ]

# Verify perfect alignment
cat("Perfect alignment achieved:", identical(rownames(env_vars_aligned), rownames(pcoa_scores_aligned)), "\n")
cat("Final dimensions - env_vars:", dim(env_vars_aligned), "\n")
cat("Final dimensions - pcoa:", dim(pcoa_scores_aligned), "\n")

# Update your objects to use the aligned versions
pcoa_scores_env_edna <- pcoa_scores_aligned
env_vars_edna <- env_vars_aligned


# Environmental fitting to PCoA axes
cat("Running envfit analysis...\n")
envfit_result_edna <- envfit(pcoa_scores_env_edna[, 1:min(2, n_axes_edna)], env_vars_edna, permutations = 999)
print(envfit_result_edna)


# Extract from the correct envfit object that has all 5 variables
envfit_results_edna <- data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(envfit_test$vectors$arrows),
    PCoA1_correlation = envfit_test$vectors$arrows[, 1],
    PCoA2_correlation = if(ncol(envfit_test$vectors$arrows) > 1) envfit_test$vectors$arrows[, 2] else NA,
    R_squared = envfit_test$vectors$r,
    p_value = envfit_test$vectors$pvals,
    Significance = ifelse(envfit_test$vectors$pvals < 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(envfit_test$vectors$pvals < 0.01, "**",
                          ifelse(envfit_test$vectors$pvals < 0.05, "*", ""))),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(envfit_results_edna)

# Individual correlations with all PCoA axes
individual_correlations_edna <- data.frame()

for(var_name in colnames(env_vars_edna)) {
  env_var <- env_vars_edna[[var_name]]
  
  for(axis in 1:n_axes_edna) {
    pcoa_axis <- pcoa_scores_env_edna[[paste0("PCoA", axis)]]
    
    if(sum(!is.na(env_var) & !is.na(pcoa_axis)) > 3) {
      cor_result <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(env_var, pcoa_axis, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"))
      
      individual_correlations_edna <- rbind(individual_correlations_edna, data.frame(
        Environmental_Variable = var_name,
        PCoA_Axis = paste0("PCoA", axis),
        Correlation = cor_result$estimate,
        p_value = cor_result$p.value,
        Significance = dplyr::case_when(
          cor_result$p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
          cor_result$p.value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
          cor_result$p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
          cor_result$p.value < 0.1 ~ ".",
          TRUE ~ ""
        ),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

individual_correlations_wide_edna <- individual_correlations_edna %>%
    dplyr::select(-p_value, -Significance) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PCoA_Axis, values_from = Correlation) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(abs(PCoA1)))
print(individual_correlations_wide_edna)
```

Save PCoA results
```{r save PCoA Results}
# ---------------------- SAVE CORRELATION RESULTS -----------------
cat("\n6. Saving correlation results...\n")


# Save envfit results
write.csv(envfit_results_edna, 
            file.path(corr_output_dir_edna, "eDNA_PCoA_envfit_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Save individual correlations
write.csv(individual_correlations_edna, 
            file.path(corr_output_dir_edna, "eDNA_PCoA_individual_correlations.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# Save PCoA variance explained
pcoa_variance_edna <- data.frame(
  Axis = paste0("PCoA", 1:n_axes_edna),
  Variance_Explained = pcoa_var_env_edna[1:n_axes_edna],
  Cumulative_Variance = cumsum(pcoa_var_env_edna[1:n_axes_edna])
)

write.csv(pcoa_variance_edna, 
          file.path(corr_output_dir_edna, "eDNA_PCoA_variance_explained.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Save PCoA scores with metadata
pcoa_scores_export_edna <- pcoa_scores_env_edna
pcoa_scores_export_edna$sample_id <- rownames(pcoa_scores_export_edna)
pcoa_scores_export_edna$sitelocality <- metadata_edna$sitelocality
pcoa_scores_export_edna$Depth <- metadata_edna$Depth
pcoa_scores_export_edna$Visibility_std_rank <- metadata_edna$Visibility_std_rank
pcoa_scores_export_edna$pp_mean <- metadata_edna$pp_mean
pcoa_scores_export_edna$Latitude <- metadata_edna$Latitude
pcoa_scores_export_edna$Longitude <- metadata_edna$Longitude

write.csv(pcoa_scores_export_edna, 
          file.path(corr_output_dir_edna, "eDNA_PCoA_scores_with_metadata.csv"), 
          row.names = TRUE)

# ---------------------- SUMMARY -----------------
cat("\n=== PCoA ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Metadata cleaned: removed", ncol(metadata_edna_raw) - ncol(metadata_edna), "duplicate columns\n")
cat("Final dataset: 27 samples (6 samples removed during rarefaction)\n")
cat("Variables analyzed:", paste(colnames(env_vars_edna), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Variance explained by first 2 axes:", round(sum(pcoa_var_env_edna[1:2]), 1), "%\n")
cat("Variance explained by first 4 axes:", round(sum(pcoa_var_env_edna[1:n_axes_edna]), 1), "%\n")

if(exists("envfit_results_edna") && nrow(envfit_results_edna) > 0) {
  cat("\nEnvironmental correlation results:\n")
  
  # Show all variables tested
  for(i in 1:nrow(envfit_results_edna)) {
    sig_code <- if(envfit_results_edna$p_value[i] < 0.001) "***" else
                if(envfit_results_edna$p_value[i] < 0.01) "**" else
                if(envfit_results_edna$p_value[i] < 0.05) "*" else
                if(envfit_results_edna$p_value[i] < 0.1) "." else ""
    
    cat(paste0("  ", envfit_results_edna$Variable[i], 
               ": R² = ", round(envfit_results_edna$R_squared[i], 3), 
               ", p = ", round(envfit_results_edna$p_value[i], 3), 
               " ", sig_code, "\n"))
  }
  
  # Summarize significant results
  sig_correlations_edna <- envfit_results_edna %>%
    dplyr::filter(p_value < 0.05)
  
  cat("\nSummary: ", nrow(sig_correlations_edna), " out of ", nrow(envfit_results_edna), 
      " variables significantly correlated with community structure (p < 0.05)\n")
      
  if(nrow(sig_correlations_edna) > 0) {
    strongest_correlation <- sig_correlations_edna[which.max(sig_correlations_edna$R_squared), ]
    cat("Strongest correlation: ", strongest_correlation$Variable, 
        " (R² = ", round(strongest_correlation$R_squared, 3), ")\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("\nNo envfit results found\n")
}
```


# =======================================
# -------------- dbRDAs -----------------
# =======================================
Comprehensive distance-based RDA
```{r}
# Load required libraries (if not already loaded)
#library(vegan)
#library(ggplot2)
#library(dplyr)
#library(tidyr)
#library(gridExtra)
#library(grid)

# Create output directory
#dir.create("./dbRDA_eDNA", showWarnings = FALSE)

# ============== DATA PREPARATION FOR dbRDA ==============

print("Preparing data for eDNA dbRDA analysis...")

# Extract and prepare community data (non-rarefied for multivariate analyses)
otu_data_original_edna <- as.data.frame(otu_table(physeq_eDNA18S))
if(taxa_are_rows(physeq_eDNA18S)) otu_data_original_edna <- t(otu_data_original_edna)

# Create proportional abundances and 4th root transformation
biotic_percs_original_edna <- sweep(otu_data_original_edna, 1, rowSums(otu_data_original_edna), "/")
community_4th_root_edna <- biotic_percs_original_edna^0.25

# Distance matrix
dist_matrix_edna <- vegdist(community_4th_root_edna, method = "bray")

#Prevent conflicts
select <- dplyr::select
rename <- dplyr::rename
filter <- dplyr::filter
mutate <- dplyr::mutate

# Prepare environmental variables (rename to match your framework)
env_data_dbrda_edna <- metadata_edna %>%
  select(Depth, Visibility_std_rank, pp_mean, Latitude, Longitude, sitelocality) %>%
  rename(
    depth = Depth,
    turbidity_std_rank = Visibility_std_rank,
    latitude = Latitude,
    longitude = Longitude
  )

# Ensure row names match
rownames(env_data_dbrda_edna) <- rownames(metadata_edna)

# Site colors (using your established scheme)
c12_sites_edna <- c("Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077", "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
                   "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3", "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E",
                   "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E", "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
                   "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599", "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599",
                   "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30", "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C",
                   "McGrail_deep" = "#015951", "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E")

# ================ dbRDA ANALYSIS FUNCTION FOR eDNA DATA ================

run_edna_dbrda <- function(community_data, metadata, dataset_name = "eDNA_18S") {
  
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  cat("ANALYZING:", dataset_name, "\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  # Use existing distance matrix
  distance_matrix <- dist_matrix_edna
  
  cat("Samples in analysis:", nrow(community_data), "\n")
  cat("ASVs in analysis:", ncol(community_data), "\n")
  
  # Check for required variables
  required_vars <- c("depth", "turbidity_std_rank", "latitude", "longitude", "pp_mean")
  missing_vars <- required_vars[!required_vars %in% colnames(metadata)]
  if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
    cat("Missing variables:", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Initialize results storage
  analyses_edna <- list()
  
  # ============= core environmnetal tests =============
  
  cat("\nRunning environmental tests for eDNA communities...\n")
  
  # Individual environmental drivers
  try({
    analyses_edna[["depth_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Depth alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  try({
    analyses_edna[["turbidity_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ turbidity_std_rank, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Turbidity alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  try({
    analyses_edna[["productivity_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ pp_mean, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Productivity alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  # Combined environmental model (depth + turbidity - your main story)
  try({
    analyses_edna[["environmental"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Environmental model (depth + turbidity) complete\n")
  })
  
  # Full environmental model (including productivity)
  try({
    analyses_edna[["full_environmental"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank + pp_mean, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Full environmental model complete\n")
  })
  
  # ============== spatial comparison tests ===============
  
  # Individual spatial drivers
  try({
    analyses_edna[["latitude_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ latitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Latitude alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  try({
    analyses_edna[["longitude_alone"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ longitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Longitude alone analysis complete\n")
  })
  
  # Combined spatial model
  try({
    analyses_edna[["spatial"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ latitude + longitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Spatial model (lat + lon) complete\n")
  })
  
  # Combined environmental + spatial model
  try({
    analyses_edna[["env_spatial_combined"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank + latitude + longitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Combined environmental + spatial model complete\n")
  })
  
  # Full model with all variables
  try({
    analyses_edna[["full_model"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ depth + turbidity_std_rank + pp_mean + latitude + longitude, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Full model with all variables complete\n")
  })
  
  # =========== conditional tests ================
  
  # Turbidity beyond depth
  try({
    analyses_edna[["turbidity_after_depth"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ turbidity_std_rank + Condition(depth), data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Turbidity | depth conditional test complete\n")
  })
  
  # Productivity beyond depth and turbidity
  try({
    analyses_edna[["productivity_after_env"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ pp_mean + Condition(depth + turbidity_std_rank), data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Productivity | environmental conditional test complete\n")
  })
  
  # Geography beyond environment (key test)
  try({
    analyses_edna[["spatial_after_env"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ latitude + longitude + Condition(depth + turbidity_std_rank), data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Spatial | environmental conditional test complete\n")
  })
  
  # Geography beyond full environment including productivity
  try({
    analyses_edna[["spatial_after_full_env"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ latitude + longitude + Condition(depth + turbidity_std_rank + pp_mean), data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Spatial | full environmental conditional test complete\n")
  })
  
  # =============== site effects ==================
  
  try({
    analyses_edna[["site_only"]] <- dbrda(distance_matrix ~ sitelocality, data = metadata)
    cat("✓ Site-only model complete\n")
  })
  
  # =============== extract results =================
  
  cat("\nExtracting results...\n")
  
  # Initialize results dataframe
  results_edna <- data.frame(
    Dataset = dataset_name,
    Analysis = names(analyses_edna),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Store detailed ANOVA tables for key models
  detailed_anova_tables_edna <- list()
  
  # Extract statistics for each analysis
  for (i in 1:length(analyses_edna)) {
    model <- analyses_edna[[i]]
    analysis_name <- names(analyses_edna)[i]
    
    try({
      # Test significance
      test_result <- anova(model, permutations = 999)
      
      # Get R²
      r2_result <- RsquareAdj(model)
      
      # Store results
      results_edna$R2[i] <- round(r2_result$r.squared, 4)
      results_edna$Adj_R2[i] <- round(r2_result$adj.r.squared, 4)
      results_edna$F_statistic[i] <- round(test_result$F[1], 2)
      results_edna$p_value[i] <- test_result$`Pr(>F)`[1]
      results_edna$Model_df[i] <- test_result$Df[1]
      results_edna$Residual_df[i] <- test_result$Df[2]
      
      # Extract and store ANOVA by terms for key models
      if (analysis_name %in% c("environmental", "spatial", "env_spatial_combined", "full_environmental", "full_model")) {
        if (length(attr(model$terms, "term.labels")) > 1) {
          anova_by_terms <- anova(model, by = "terms", permutations = 999)
          detailed_anova_tables_edna[[paste0("edna_", analysis_name)]] <- anova_by_terms
          
          cat(sprintf("\n--- DETAILED ANOVA FOR %s ---\n", toupper(analysis_name)))
          print(anova_by_terms)
        }
      }
      
      cat(sprintf("  %-30s: R² = %.3f, F = %.2f, p = %.3f\n", 
                  analysis_name, r2_result$r.squared, test_result$F[1], test_result$`Pr(>F)`[1]))
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Format p-values and significance
  results_edna$p_formatted <- ifelse(results_edna$p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", 
                                    sprintf("%.3f", results_edna$p_value))
  
  results_edna$significance <- case_when(
    results_edna$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
    results_edna$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
    results_edna$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
    results_edna$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
    TRUE ~ ""
  )
  
  return(list(
    results = results_edna, 
    models = analyses_edna, 
    anova_tables = detailed_anova_tables_edna,
    metadata = metadata, 
    community = community_data
  ))
}

# =============== dbRDA BIPLOT FUNCTION FOR eDNA DATA ===============

create_edna_biplot <- function(model, model_name, metadata) {
  
  cat("Creating eDNA biplot for:", model_name, "\n")
  
  # Extract site scores
  site_scores <- scores(model, display = "sites")
  
  # Handle single vs multiple axes
  if (is.vector(site_scores)) {
    site_df_edna <- data.frame(
      dbRDA1 = site_scores,
      dbRDA2 = 0,
      sample = names(site_scores),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else if (ncol(site_scores) == 1) {
    site_df_edna <- data.frame(
      dbRDA1 = site_scores[, 1],
      dbRDA2 = 0,
      sample = rownames(site_scores),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    site_df_edna <- data.frame(
      dbRDA1 = site_scores[, 1],
      dbRDA2 = site_scores[, 2],
      sample = rownames(site_scores),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Add metadata
  metadata_df_edna <- data.frame(
    sample = rownames(metadata),
    depth = metadata$depth,
    sitelocality = metadata$sitelocality,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Merge
  site_df_edna$depth <- metadata_df_edna$depth[match(site_df_edna$sample, metadata_df_edna$sample)]
  site_df_edna$sitelocality <- metadata_df_edna$sitelocality[match(site_df_edna$sample, metadata_df_edna$sample)]
  
  # Extract environmental vectors
  env_df_edna <- NULL
  try({
    env_scores <- scores(model, display = "bp")
    if (!is.null(env_scores) && length(env_scores) > 0) {
      if (is.vector(env_scores)) {
        env_df_edna <- data.frame(
          variable = names(env_scores),
          dbRDA1 = env_scores,
          dbRDA2 = 0,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      } else if (ncol(site_scores) == 1) {
        env_df_edna <- data.frame(
          variable = rownames(env_scores),
          dbRDA1 = env_scores[, 1],
          dbRDA2 = 0,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      } else {
        env_df_edna <- data.frame(
          variable = rownames(env_scores),
          dbRDA1 = env_scores[, 1],
          dbRDA2 = if(ncol(env_scores) > 1) env_scores[, 2] else 0,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }
      
      # Clean variable names for plotting
      env_df_edna$variable_clean <- case_when(
        env_df_edna$variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
        env_df_edna$variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
        env_df_edna$variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
        env_df_edna$variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
        env_df_edna$variable == "pp_mean" ~ "Productivity",
        TRUE ~ env_df_edna$variable
      )
    }
  }, silent = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate variance explained
  eigenvals <- eigenvals(model)
  if (length(eigenvals) >= 2) {
    axis1_var <- round((eigenvals[1] / sum(eigenvals)) * 100, 1)
    axis2_var <- round((eigenvals[2] / sum(eigenvals)) * 100, 1)
  } else {
    axis1_var <- round((eigenvals[1] / sum(eigenvals)) * 100, 1)
    axis2_var <- 0
  }
  
  # Calculate total R²
  r2_total <- round(RsquareAdj(model)$r.squared, 3)
  
  # Create the plot
  p_dbrda_e <- ggplot(site_df_edna, aes(x = dbRDA1, y = dbRDA2)) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = sitelocality), size = 6, shape = 21, alpha = 0.9, stroke = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites_edna, name = "Site") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.3) +
   labs(
     x = paste0("dbRDA1 (", axis1_var, "%)"),
     y = paste0("dbRDA2 (", axis2_var, "%)"),
      title = paste("dbRDA:", model_name),
      subtitle = paste0("R² = ", r2_total)
   ) +
   theme_bw() +
   theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      legend.title = element_text(size=20, color = "black"),
      legend.text = element_text(size=18, color = "black"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 22, color = "black", face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.5)
    )
  
  # Add environmental vectors if available
  if (!is.null(env_df_edna) && nrow(env_df_edna) > 0) {
    arrow_scale <- max(abs(c(site_df_edna$dbRDA1, site_df_edna$dbRDA2)), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.7
  
    p_dbrda_e <- p_dbrda_e +  # <-- FIXED
      geom_segment(data = env_df_edna, 
                 aes(x = 0, y = 0, 
                     xend = dbRDA1 * arrow_scale, 
                     yend = dbRDA2 * arrow_scale),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")), 
                 color = "#E31A1C", linewidth = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      geom_text(data = env_df_edna,
              aes(x = dbRDA1 * arrow_scale * 1.15, 
                  y = dbRDA2 * arrow_scale * 1.15, 
                  label = variable_clean),
              color = "#E31A1C", size = 6, fontface = "bold", 
              inherit.aes = FALSE)
}
  
  return(p_dbrda_e)
}  
# =============== RUN eDNA dbRDA ANALYSIS ================

cat("\n\nRunning comprehensive dbRDA analysis on eDNA data...\n")

edna_dbrda_analysis <- run_edna_dbrda(
  community_data = community_4th_root_edna,
  metadata = env_data_dbrda_edna,
  dataset_name = "eDNA_18S"
)

# Extract results
if (!is.null(edna_dbrda_analysis)) {
  edna_dbrda_results <- edna_dbrda_analysis$results
  edna_dbrda_models <- edna_dbrda_analysis$models
  edna_anova_tables <- edna_dbrda_analysis$anova_tables
  
  # Display results
  cat("\n\neDNA dbRDA RESULTS\n")
  cat("==================\n")
  print(edna_dbrda_results)
  
} else {
  stop("eDNA dbRDA analysis failed - check data structure and variable names")
}

# =============== RESULTS INTERPRETATION =================

cat("\n\neDNA dbRDA RESULTS INTERPRETATION\n")
cat("=================================\n")

if (exists("edna_dbrda_results")) {
  
  # 1. Environmental vs Spatial comparison
  env_spatial_comparison_edna <- edna_dbrda_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% c("environmental", "spatial")) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, p_value) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Analysis, values_from = c(R2, p_value)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Environmental_stronger = R2_environmental > R2_spatial,
      Effect_difference = abs(R2_environmental - R2_spatial),
      Interpretation = dplyr::case_when(
        R2_environmental > R2_spatial & p_value_environmental < 0.05 ~ "Environmental > Spatial",
        R2_spatial > R2_environmental & p_value_spatial < 0.05 ~ "Spatial > Environmental", 
        TRUE ~ "Similar effects"
      )
    )
  
  cat("\n1. ENVIRONMENTAL vs SPATIAL EFFECTS (eDNA Communities):\n")
  if (nrow(env_spatial_comparison_edna) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("Environmental R² = %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", 
                env_spatial_comparison_edna$R2_environmental, env_spatial_comparison_edna$p_value_environmental))
    cat(sprintf("Spatial R² = %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", 
                env_spatial_comparison_edna$R2_spatial, env_spatial_comparison_edna$p_value_spatial))
    cat("Winner:", env_spatial_comparison_edna$Interpretation, "\n")
  }
  
  # 2. Individual environmental drivers
  individual_env_edna <- edna_dbrda_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone", "productivity_alone")) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, p_value) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(R2))
  
  cat("\n2. INDIVIDUAL ENVIRONMENTAL DRIVERS:\n")
  print(individual_env_edna)
  
  # 3. Role of productivity
  productivity_comparison_edna <- edna_dbrda_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis %in% c("environmental", "full_environmental")) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, p_value)
  
  cat("\n3. ROLE OF PRODUCTIVITY:\n")
  print(productivity_comparison_edna)
  
  # 4. Conditional tests
  conditional_results_edna <- edna_dbrda_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(grepl("after", Analysis)) %>%
    dplyr::select(Analysis, R2, p_value, significance)
  
  cat("\n4. CONDITIONAL TESTS (Mechanistic insights):\n")
  print(conditional_results_edna)
  
  # 5. Site effects comparison
  site_effects_edna <- edna_dbrda_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(Analysis == "site_only") %>%
    dplyr::select(R2, p_value)
  
  if (nrow(site_effects_edna) > 0) {
    cat("\n5. SITE EFFECTS:\n")
    cat(sprintf("Site identity R² = %.3f (p = %.3f)\n", site_effects_edna$R2, site_effects_edna$p_value))
    cat("→ Represents maximum possible local-scale differentiation\n")
  }
}

# ================= CREATE dbRDA BIPLOTS ===============
plot_list_edna <- list()

if (exists("edna_dbrda_models")) {
  
  cat("Creating plots for", length(edna_dbrda_models), "models...\n")
  
  # Environmental model
  if ("environmental" %in% names(edna_dbrda_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list_edna[["environmental"]] <- create_edna_biplot(
        edna_dbrda_models[["environmental"]], 
        "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)",
        env_data_dbrda_edna
      )
    })
  }
  
  # Full environmental model
  if ("full_environmental" %in% names(edna_dbrda_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list_edna[["full_environmental"]] <- create_edna_biplot(
        edna_dbrda_models[["full_environmental"]], 
        "Full Environmental (Depth + Turbidity + Productivity)",
        env_data_dbrda_edna
      )
    })
  }
  
  # Spatial model
  if ("spatial" %in% names(edna_dbrda_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list_edna[["spatial"]] <- create_edna_biplot(
        edna_dbrda_models[["spatial"]], 
        "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)",
        env_data_dbrda_edna
      )
    })
  }
  
  # Combined model
  if ("env_spatial_combined" %in% names(edna_dbrda_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list_edna[["combined"]] <- create_edna_biplot(
        edna_dbrda_models[["env_spatial_combined"]], 
        "Combined (Environmental + Spatial)",
        env_data_dbrda_edna
      )
    })
  }
  
  # Site effects
  if ("site_only" %in% names(edna_dbrda_models)) {
    try({
      plot_list_edna[["site_only"]] <- create_edna_biplot(
        edna_dbrda_models[["site_only"]], 
        "Site Effects Only", 
        env_data_dbrda_edna
      )
    })
  }
}

# =========== SAVE RESULTS AND PLOTS ============

# Save results table
write.csv(edna_dbrda_results, "./dbRDA_eDNA/edna_dbrda_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Export detailed ANOVA tables
if (length(edna_anova_tables) > 0) {
  anova_dir_edna <- file.path("./dbRDA_eDNA", "detailed_anova_tables_edna")
  if (!dir.exists(anova_dir_edna)) {
    dir.create(anova_dir_edna, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  
  for (table_name in names(edna_anova_tables)) {
    anova_table <- edna_anova_tables[[table_name]]
    anova_df <- as.data.frame(anova_table)
    anova_df$Term <- rownames(anova_df)
    anova_df <- anova_df[, c("Term", names(anova_df)[names(anova_df) != "Term"])]
    
    write.csv(anova_df, 
              file.path(anova_dir_edna, paste0(table_name, "_anova_by_terms.csv")), 
              row.names = FALSE)
  }
}

# Save individual plots
if (length(plot_list_edna) > 0) {
  for (plot_name in names(plot_list_edna)) {
    plot_file <- file.path("./dbRDA_eDNA", paste0("edna_", plot_name, "_dbRDA.pdf"))
    try({
      ggsave(
        filename = plot_file, 
        plot = plot_list_edna[[plot_name]], 
        width = 10, height = 8, 
        dpi = 300
      )
      cat("✓ Saved:", plot_name, "plot\n")
    })
  }
}

# Create multi-panel figure
if (length(plot_list_edna) >= 3) {
  
  # Main comparison panel (Environmental vs Spatial vs Combined)
  main_plots_edna <- plot_list_edna[c("environmental", "spatial", "combined")]
  if (length(main_plots_edna) == 3) {
    
    # Create temporary plot WITH legend for extracting legend
    temp_plot_with_legend <- main_plots_edna[[1]] + theme(legend.position = "right")
    
    # Extract legend
    legend <- cowplot::get_legend(temp_plot_with_legend)
    
    # Create panel with plots (already have legend.position = "none")
    plot_panel <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = main_plots_edna, ncol = 3)
    
    # Combine plots with shared legend
    main_panel_edna <- cowplot::plot_grid(plot_panel, legend, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(3, 0.4))
    
    # Add title
    main_panel_edna <- cowplot::plot_grid(
      cowplot::ggdraw() + cowplot::draw_label("eDNA dbRDA: Environmental vs Spatial Drivers", 
                                             fontface = "bold", size = 16),
      main_panel_edna,
      ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.1, 1)
    )
    
    ggsave("./dbRDA_eDNA/edna_main_comparison_dbRDA.pdf", 
           plot = main_panel_edna, width = 18, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  }
  
  # Environmental models panel
  env_plots_edna <- plot_list_edna[grepl("environmental", names(plot_list_edna))]
  if (length(env_plots_edna) >= 2) {
    env_panel_edna <- cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = env_plots_edna[1:2], ncol = 2)
    
    env_panel_with_title <- cowplot::plot_grid(
      cowplot::ggdraw() + cowplot::draw_label("eDNA Environmental Models: Depth + Turbidity vs Full Environmental", 
                                             fontface = "bold", size = 14),
      env_panel_edna,
      ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(0.08, 1)
    )
    
    ggsave("./dbRDA_eDNA/edna_environmental_models_dbRDA.pdf", 
           plot = env_panel_with_title, width = 16, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  }
}
```


===============================================================
----- eDNA dbRDA SUPPLEMENTARY TABLES GENERATION ------
===============================================================
# Creating additional results tables similar to 18S ARMS data
Table 1: Variance Partitioning
Shows R², Adjusted R², F-statistics, and p-values for:
-Environmental model (Depth + Turbidity)
-Full environmental model (+ Productivity)
-Spatial model
-Combined models
-Site identity

Table 2: Marginal & Conditional Effects
Marginal effects: Individual contribution of each variable (depth, turbidity, productivity, lat, lon)
Conditional effects:
  -Turbidity beyond depth
  -Productivity beyond environmental factors
  -Spatial patterns beyond environmental gradients (your key dispersal limitation test)

Table 3: Axis Information
-Eigenvalues and variance explained for each dbRDA axis
-Shows dimensional structure of environmental control

Table 4: Variable Loadings
-Direction and strength of environmental gradients on ordination axes
-Vector coordinates for creating biplots

Table 5: 
For each model (Environmental, Full Environmental, Spatial, Combined), it extracts:
-Individual term contributions: How much variance each variable (depth, turbidity, productivity, latitude, longitude) explains when added sequentially
-Degrees of freedom for each term
-Sum of Squares: Raw variance explained
-F-statistic and p-value for each term
-R² for each term (if available in your vegan output)

This table reveals:
1. Which environmental gradient is stronger (depth vs turbidity)
2. Whether productivity adds meaningful variance beyond depth + turbidity
3. The mechanistic importance of each gradient
```{r}
#library(dplyr)
#library(tidyr)

# ========== TABLE 1: VARIANCE PARTITIONING FOR eDNA ============
# Analogous to your ARMS fraction comparison, but with single dataset

create_edna_variance_partitioning_table <- function(results_df) {
  
  cat("\n=== TABLE 1: eDNA VARIANCE PARTITIONING ===\n")
  
  # Extract key models for variance partitioning
  variance_table <- results_df %>%
    filter(Analysis %in% c("environmental", "full_environmental", "spatial", 
                          "env_spatial_combined", "full_model", "site_only")) %>%
    select(Analysis, R2, Adj_R2, F_statistic, p_value, Model_df, Residual_df) %>%
    mutate(
      Component = case_when(
        Analysis == "environmental" ~ "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)",
        Analysis == "full_environmental" ~ "Full Environmental (Depth + Turbidity + Productivity)",
        Analysis == "spatial" ~ "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)",
        Analysis == "env_spatial_combined" ~ "Combined (Env + Spatial)",
        Analysis == "full_model" ~ "Full Model (All Variables)",
        Analysis == "site_only" ~ "Site Identity"
      ),
      Significance = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    ) %>%
    select(Component, R2, Adj_R2, F_statistic, Model_df, Residual_df, p_value, Significance)
  
  print(variance_table)
  
  # Create formatted version for export
  variance_table_formatted <- variance_table %>%
    mutate(
      R2_formatted = sprintf("%.3f", R2),
      Adj_R2_formatted = sprintf("%.3f", Adj_R2),
      F_formatted = sprintf("%.2f", F_statistic),
      p_formatted = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_value)),
      df_formatted = paste0(Model_df, ", ", Residual_df)
    ) %>%
    select(Component, R2_formatted, Adj_R2_formatted, F_formatted, df_formatted, p_formatted, Significance)
  
  colnames(variance_table_formatted) <- c("Component", "R²", "Adj. R²", "F", "df", "p-value", "Sig.")
  
  return(variance_table_formatted)
}

# Run Table 1
table1_edna <- create_edna_variance_partitioning_table(edna_dbrda_results)


# ============ TABLE 2: MARGINAL AND CONDITIONAL EFFECTS FOR eDNA ==============

create_edna_marginal_conditional_table <- function(results_df) {
  
  cat("\n\n=== TABLE 2: eDNA MARGINAL AND CONDITIONAL EFFECTS ===\n")
  
  # MARGINAL EFFECTS (individual variables)
  marginal_effects <- results_df %>%
    filter(Analysis %in% c("depth_alone", "turbidity_alone", "productivity_alone", 
                          "latitude_alone", "longitude_alone")) %>%
    select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value) %>%
    mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "depth_alone" ~ "Depth",
        Analysis == "turbidity_alone" ~ "Turbidity",
        Analysis == "productivity_alone" ~ "Productivity",
        Analysis == "latitude_alone" ~ "Latitude",
        Analysis == "longitude_alone" ~ "Longitude"
      ),
      Effect_Type = "Marginal",
      Significance = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    ) %>%
    select(Variable, Effect_Type, R2, F_statistic, p_value, Significance)
  
  cat("\nMARGINAL EFFECTS (Individual Variable Contributions):\n")
  print(marginal_effects)
  
  # CONDITIONAL EFFECTS (added variance)
  conditional_effects <- results_df %>%
    filter(Analysis %in% c("turbidity_after_depth", "productivity_after_env", 
                          "spatial_after_env", "spatial_after_full_env")) %>%
    select(Analysis, R2, F_statistic, p_value) %>%
    mutate(
      Variable = case_when(
        Analysis == "turbidity_after_depth" ~ "Turbidity | Depth",
        Analysis == "productivity_after_env" ~ "Productivity | (Depth + Turbidity)",
        Analysis == "spatial_after_env" ~ "Spatial | (Depth + Turbidity)",
        Analysis == "spatial_after_full_env" ~ "Spatial | Full Environmental"
      ),
      Effect_Type = "Conditional",
      Significance = case_when(
        p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      ),
      Interpretation = case_when(
        Analysis == "turbidity_after_depth" ~ "Turbidity effects independent of depth",
        Analysis == "productivity_after_env" ~ "Productivity effects beyond depth/turbidity",
        Analysis == "spatial_after_env" ~ "Geographic patterns beyond environment",
        Analysis == "spatial_after_full_env" ~ "Geographic patterns beyond all environmental factors"
      )
    ) %>%
    select(Variable, Effect_Type, R2, F_statistic, p_value, Significance, Interpretation)
  
  cat("\n\nCONDITIONAL EFFECTS (Additional Variance Explained):\n")
  print(conditional_effects)
  
  # COMBINED TABLE
  combined_table <- bind_rows(
    marginal_effects %>% mutate(Interpretation = NA_character_),
    conditional_effects
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      R2_formatted = sprintf("%.4f", R2),
      F_formatted = sprintf("%.2f", F_statistic),
      p_formatted = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_value))
    )
  
  return(list(
    marginal = marginal_effects,
    conditional = conditional_effects,
    combined = combined_table
  ))
}

# Run Table 2
table2_edna <- create_edna_marginal_conditional_table(edna_dbrda_results)


# ============ TABLE 3: dbRDA AXIS INFORMATION FOR eDNA ============

create_edna_axis_information_table <- function(models_list) {
  
  cat("\n\n=== TABLE 3: eDNA dbRDA AXIS INFORMATION ===\n")
  
  # Extract for key models
  model_names <- c("environmental", "full_environmental", "spatial", "env_spatial_combined")
  
  axis_info_list <- list()
  
  for (model_name in model_names) {
    if (model_name %in% names(models_list)) {
      
      model <- models_list[[model_name]]
      eigenvals <- eigenvals(model)
      total_inertia <- model$tot.chi
      constrained_inertia <- sum(eigenvals)
      
      cat("\n", toupper(model_name), "MODEL:\n")
      cat(sprintf("Total Inertia: %.4f\n", total_inertia))
      cat(sprintf("Constrained Inertia: %.4f (R² = %.3f)\n", 
                  constrained_inertia, constrained_inertia/total_inertia))
      
      # Extract axis information
      n_axes <- min(length(eigenvals), 3)  # Show up to 3 axes
      
      for (i in 1:n_axes) {
        axis_var <- (eigenvals[i] / constrained_inertia) * 100
        cumul_var <- (sum(eigenvals[1:i]) / constrained_inertia) * 100
        
        cat(sprintf("  dbRDA%d: Eigenvalue = %.4f, Variance = %.1f%%, Cumulative = %.1f%%\n", 
                    i, eigenvals[i], axis_var, cumul_var))
        
        # Store for table
        axis_info_list[[length(axis_info_list) + 1]] <- data.frame(
          Model = model_name,
          Axis = paste0("dbRDA", i),
          Eigenvalue = eigenvals[i],
          Variance_Percent = axis_var,
          Cumulative_Percent = cumul_var,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Combine into table
  axis_table <- bind_rows(axis_info_list)
  
  return(axis_table)
}

# Run Table 3
table3_edna <- create_edna_axis_information_table(edna_dbrda_models)


# ============ TABLE 4: ENVIRONMENTAL VARIABLE LOADINGS FOR eDNA ===============

create_edna_variable_loadings_table <- function(models_list) {
  
  cat("\n\n=== TABLE 4: eDNA VARIABLE LOADINGS ON dbRDA AXES ===\n")
  
  model_names <- c("environmental", "full_environmental", "spatial", "env_spatial_combined")
  
  loadings_list <- list()
  
  for (model_name in model_names) {
    if (model_name %in% names(models_list)) {
      
      model <- models_list[[model_name]]
      
      # Extract biplot scores (variable loadings)
      bp_scores <- scores(model, display = "bp")
      
      if (!is.null(bp_scores) && length(bp_scores) > 0) {
        
        cat("\n", toupper(model_name), "MODEL:\n")
        
        # Handle different score formats
        if (is.vector(bp_scores)) {
          # Single axis case
          for (i in 1:length(bp_scores)) {
            var_name <- names(bp_scores)[i]
            cat(sprintf("  %s: dbRDA1 = %.3f\n", var_name, bp_scores[i]))
            
            loadings_list[[length(loadings_list) + 1]] <- data.frame(
              Model = model_name,
              Variable = var_name,
              dbRDA1 = bp_scores[i],
              dbRDA2 = NA,
              dbRDA3 = NA,
              stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
          }
        } else {
          # Multiple axes case
          n_axes <- ncol(bp_scores)
          
          for (i in 1:nrow(bp_scores)) {
            var_name <- rownames(bp_scores)[i]
            dbRDA1 <- bp_scores[i, 1]
            dbRDA2 <- if(n_axes > 1) bp_scores[i, 2] else NA
            dbRDA3 <- if(n_axes > 2) bp_scores[i, 3] else NA
            
            cat(sprintf("  %s: dbRDA1 = %.3f", var_name, dbRDA1))
            if (!is.na(dbRDA2)) cat(sprintf(", dbRDA2 = %.3f", dbRDA2))
            if (!is.na(dbRDA3)) cat(sprintf(", dbRDA3 = %.3f", dbRDA3))
            cat("\n")
            
            loadings_list[[length(loadings_list) + 1]] <- data.frame(
              Model = model_name,
              Variable = var_name,
              dbRDA1 = dbRDA1,
              dbRDA2 = dbRDA2,
              dbRDA3 = dbRDA3,
              stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Combine into table
  loadings_table <- bind_rows(loadings_list)
  
  # Add clean variable names
  loadings_table <- loadings_table %>%
    mutate(
      Variable_Clean = case_when(
        Variable == "depth" ~ "Depth",
        Variable == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
        Variable == "pp_mean" ~ "Productivity",
        Variable == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
        Variable == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
        TRUE ~ Variable
      )
    ) %>%
    select(Model, Variable_Clean, everything(), -Variable)
  
  return(loadings_table)
}

# Run Table 4
table4_edna <- create_edna_variable_loadings_table(edna_dbrda_models)


# ========== EXPORT ALL TABLES ======================

export_edna_tables <- function(table1, table2, table3, table4, output_dir = "./dbRDA_eDNA") {
  
  cat("\n\n=== EXPORTING eDNA dbRDA TABLES ===\n")
  
  # Create subdirectory for tables
  tables_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "supplementary_tables")
  if (!dir.exists(tables_dir)) {
    dir.create(tables_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Export Table 1: Variance Partitioning
  write.csv(table1, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table1_eDNA_variance_partitioning.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Table 1 (Variance Partitioning) exported\n")
  
  # Export Table 2: Marginal and Conditional Effects
  write.csv(table2$combined, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table2_eDNA_marginal_conditional_effects.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(table2$marginal, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table2a_eDNA_marginal_effects_only.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(table2$conditional, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table2b_eDNA_conditional_effects_only.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Table 2 (Marginal & Conditional Effects) exported\n")
  
  # Export Table 3: Axis Information
  write.csv(table3, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table3_eDNA_axis_information.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Table 3 (Axis Information) exported\n")
  
  # Export Table 4: Variable Loadings
  write.csv(table4, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table4_eDNA_variable_loadings.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Table 4 (Variable Loadings) exported\n")
  
  cat("\nAll tables exported to:", tables_dir, "\n")
}

# Export all tables
export_edna_tables(table1_edna, table2_edna, table3_edna, table4_edna)


# ============= TABLE 5: ANOVA BY TERMS (SEQUENTIAL VARIANCE DECOMPOSITION) ===============

create_edna_anova_by_terms_table <- function(anova_tables_list) {
  
  cat("\n\n=== TABLE 5: eDNA ANOVA BY TERMS (SEQUENTIAL DECOMPOSITION) ===\n")
  
  # Models to extract
  model_names <- c("edna_environmental", "edna_full_environmental", 
                   "edna_spatial", "edna_env_spatial_combined", "edna_full_model")
  
  anova_results_list <- list()
  
  for (table_name in model_names) {
    if (table_name %in% names(anova_tables_list)) {
      
      # Extract the ANOVA table
      anova_table <- anova_tables_list[[table_name]]
      
      # Convert to data frame
      anova_df <- as.data.frame(anova_table)
      
      # Add term names as column
      anova_df$Term <- rownames(anova_df)
      
      # Clean up model name for display
      model_display <- gsub("edna_", "", table_name)
      model_display <- gsub("_", " ", model_display)
      model_display <- tools::toTitleCase(model_display)
      
      cat("\n", toupper(model_display), ":\n")
      
      # Extract key columns (column names vary by vegan version)
      # Common column names: Df, SumOfSqs, F, R2, Pr(>F)
      col_names <- names(anova_df)
      
      # Find the relevant columns
      df_col <- col_names[grepl("^Df$", col_names)]
      ss_col <- col_names[grepl("SumOfSqs|SumsOfSqs", col_names)]
      f_col <- col_names[grepl("^F$|^F\\.Model", col_names)]
      r2_col <- col_names[grepl("^R2$", col_names)]
      p_col <- col_names[grepl("Pr\\(>F\\)", col_names)]
      
      # Create cleaned version
      result_df <- data.frame(
        Model = model_display,
        Term = anova_df$Term,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      # Add columns if they exist
      if (length(df_col) > 0) result_df$Df <- anova_df[[df_col]]
      if (length(ss_col) > 0) result_df$SumOfSqs <- anova_df[[ss_col]]
      if (length(f_col) > 0) result_df$F_statistic <- anova_df[[f_col]]
      if (length(r2_col) > 0) result_df$R2 <- anova_df[[r2_col]]
      if (length(p_col) > 0) result_df$p_value <- anova_df[[p_col]]
      
      # Add significance codes
      if ("p_value" %in% names(result_df)) {
        result_df$Significance <- case_when(
          result_df$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
          result_df$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
          result_df$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
          result_df$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
          TRUE ~ "ns"
        )
      }
      
      # Clean up term names
      result_df$Term_Clean <- case_when(
        result_df$Term == "depth" ~ "Depth",
        result_df$Term == "turbidity_std_rank" ~ "Turbidity",
        result_df$Term == "pp_mean" ~ "Productivity",
        result_df$Term == "latitude" ~ "Latitude",
        result_df$Term == "longitude" ~ "Longitude",
        result_df$Term == "Residual" ~ "Residual",
        result_df$Term == "Total" ~ "Total",
        TRUE ~ result_df$Term
      )
      
      # Print nicely formatted output
      for (i in 1:nrow(result_df)) {
        term <- result_df$Term_Clean[i]
        
        if (term %in% c("Residual", "Total")) {
          cat(sprintf("  %s:\n", term))
          if ("Df" %in% names(result_df)) {
            cat(sprintf("    Df = %d\n", result_df$Df[i]))
          }
          if ("SumOfSqs" %in% names(result_df)) {
            cat(sprintf("    Sum of Squares = %.4f\n", result_df$SumOfSqs[i]))
          }
        } else {
          cat(sprintf("  %s:\n", term))
          if ("Df" %in% names(result_df)) {
            cat(sprintf("    Df = %d\n", result_df$Df[i]))
          }
          if ("SumOfSqs" %in% names(result_df)) {
            cat(sprintf("    Sum of Squares = %.4f\n", result_df$SumOfSqs[i]))
          }
          if ("F_statistic" %in% names(result_df)) {
            cat(sprintf("    F = %.2f\n", result_df$F_statistic[i]))
          }
          if ("R2" %in% names(result_df)) {
            cat(sprintf("    R² = %.4f\n", result_df$R2[i]))
          }
          if ("p_value" %in% names(result_df)) {
            cat(sprintf("    p = %.3f %s\n", result_df$p_value[i], result_df$Significance[i]))
          }
        }
      }
      
      anova_results_list[[length(anova_results_list) + 1]] <- result_df
    }
  }
  
  # Combine all results
  combined_anova_table <- bind_rows(anova_results_list)
  
  # Create formatted export version
  if ("R2" %in% names(combined_anova_table) && "p_value" %in% names(combined_anova_table)) {
    export_table <- combined_anova_table %>%
      mutate(
        R2_formatted = sprintf("%.4f", R2),
        F_formatted = sprintf("%.2f", F_statistic),
        p_formatted = ifelse(p_value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p_value))
      ) %>%
      select(Model, Term_Clean, Df, SumOfSqs, F_formatted, R2_formatted, p_formatted, Significance)
    
    colnames(export_table) <- c("Model", "Term", "Df", "Sum of Squares", "F", "R²", "p-value", "Sig.")
  } else {
    export_table <- combined_anova_table %>%
      select(Model, Term_Clean, everything()) %>%
      select(-Term) %>%
      rename(Term = Term_Clean)
  }
  
  return(list(
    detailed = combined_anova_table,
    formatted = export_table
  ))
}

# Run Table 5
table5_edna <- create_edna_anova_by_terms_table(edna_anova_tables)


# ============  UPDATED EXPORT FUNCTION TO INCLUDE TABLE 5 ==================

export_edna_tables_v2 <- function(table1, table2, table3, table4, table5, output_dir = "./dbRDA_eDNA") {
  
  cat("\n\n=== EXPORTING eDNA dbRDA TABLES ===\n")
  
  # Create subdirectory for tables
  tables_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "supplementary_tables")
  if (!dir.exists(tables_dir)) {
    dir.create(tables_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Export Table 1: Variance Partitioning
  write.csv(table1, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table1_eDNA_variance_partitioning.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Table 1 (Variance Partitioning) exported\n")
  
  # Export Table 2: Marginal and Conditional Effects
  write.csv(table2$combined, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table2_eDNA_marginal_conditional_effects.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(table2$marginal, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table2a_eDNA_marginal_effects_only.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(table2$conditional, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table2b_eDNA_conditional_effects_only.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Table 2 (Marginal & Conditional Effects) exported\n")
  
  # Export Table 3: Axis Information
  write.csv(table3, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table3_eDNA_axis_information.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Table 3 (Axis Information) exported\n")
  
  # Export Table 4: Variable Loadings
  write.csv(table4, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table4_eDNA_variable_loadings.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Table 4 (Variable Loadings) exported\n")
  
  # Export Table 5: ANOVA by Terms
  write.csv(table5$formatted, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table5_eDNA_anova_by_terms.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(table5$detailed, 
            file.path(tables_dir, "Table5_eDNA_anova_by_terms_detailed.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("✓ Table 5 (ANOVA by Terms) exported\n")
  
  cat("\nAll tables exported to:", tables_dir, "\n")
}

# Export all tables including Table 5
export_edna_tables_v2(table1_edna, table2_edna, table3_edna, table4_edna, table5_edna)


# =========  COMPARISON SUMMARY: eDNA KEY FINDINGS ============

cat("\n\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("eDNA dbRDA SUMMARY FOR MANUSCRIPT\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")

# Environmental vs Spatial
env_r2 <- table1_edna$`R²`[table1_edna$Component == "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)"]
spatial_r2 <- table1_edna$`R²`[table1_edna$Component == "Spatial (Latitude + Longitude)"]

cat("\n1. ENVIRONMENTAL vs SPATIAL:\n")
cat(sprintf("   Environmental (Depth + Turbidity): R² = %s\n", env_r2))
cat(sprintf("   Spatial (Latitude + Longitude): R² = %s\n", spatial_r2))
cat(sprintf("   → %s effects dominate\n", 
            ifelse(as.numeric(env_r2) > as.numeric(spatial_r2), "Environmental", "Spatial")))

# Individual drivers
cat("\n2. INDIVIDUAL DRIVER CONTRIBUTIONS:\n")
print(table2_edna$marginal %>% arrange(desc(R2)) %>% select(Variable, R2, Significance))

# Conditional tests
cat("\n3. MECHANISTIC INSIGHTS (Conditional Tests):\n")
conditional_summary <- table2_edna$conditional %>%
  select(Variable, R2, Significance, Interpretation)
print(conditional_summary)

cat("\n4. PRODUCTIVITY CONTRIBUTION:\n")
prod_marginal <- table2_edna$marginal %>% filter(Variable == "Productivity")
prod_conditional <- table2_edna$conditional %>% filter(grepl("Productivity", Variable))
if (nrow(prod_marginal) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("   Marginal effect: R² = %.4f %s\n", prod_marginal$R2, prod_marginal$Significance))
}
if (nrow(prod_conditional) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("   Beyond Depth+Turbidity: R² = %.4f %s\n", prod_conditional$R2, prod_conditional$Significance))
}

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("✓ All tables ready for manuscript supplementary materials\n")
cat("✓ Framework consistent with 18S ARMS analysis\n")
```

# Table with dbRDA axes
ENHANCED FUNCTION FOR TABLE S5c: dbRDA AXIS INFORMATION
Includes permutation F-tests for axis significance
```{r}
create_dbrda_axis_significance_table <- function(models_list) {
  
  cat("\n\n=== TABLE S5c: dbRDA AXIS INFORMATION WITH SIGNIFICANCE TESTS ===\n")
  
  # Focus on the environmental model for each dataset
  # In your case: "environmental" (Depth + Turbidity) model
  model_name <- "environmental"
  
  axis_info_list <- list()
  
  if (model_name %in% names(models_list)) {
    
    model <- models_list[[model_name]]
    eigenvals <- eigenvals(model)
    total_inertia <- model$tot.chi
    constrained_inertia <- sum(eigenvals)
    
    cat("\nENVIRONMENTAL MODEL (DEPTH + TURBIDITY):\n")
    cat(sprintf("Total Inertia: %.4f\n", total_inertia))
    cat(sprintf("Constrained Inertia: %.4f (R² = %.3f)\n", 
                constrained_inertia, constrained_inertia/total_inertia))
    
    # Test axis significance with permutation F-test
    cat("\nRunning permutation F-tests for axis significance...\n")
    axis_test <- try({
      anova(model, by = "axis", permutations = 999)
    }, silent = TRUE)
    
    if (!inherits(axis_test, "try-error")) {
      cat("Permutation F-tests complete. Results:\n")
      print(axis_test)
    } else {
      cat("Warning: Could not perform axis significance tests\n")
    }
    
    # Extract information for up to 4 axes
    n_axes <- min(length(eigenvals), 4)
    
    for (i in 1:n_axes) {
      # Calculate variance percentages (relative to constrained variance)
      axis_var <- (eigenvals[i] / constrained_inertia) * 100
      cumul_var <- (sum(eigenvals[1:i]) / constrained_inertia) * 100
      
      # Get F-statistic and p-value if available
      f_stat <- NA
      p_val <- NA
      
      if (!inherits(axis_test, "try-error") && nrow(axis_test) >= i) {
        f_stat <- axis_test$F[i]
        p_val <- axis_test$`Pr(>F)`[i]
      }
      
      # Store for table
      axis_info_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
        Dataset = "18S_eDNA", # You can customize this or make it a parameter
        Model = "Environmental (Depth + Turbidity)",
        Axis = paste0("dbRDA", i),
        Eigenvalue = eigenvals[i],
        Variance_Percent = axis_var,
        Cumulative_Percent = cumul_var,
        F_statistic = f_stat,
        p_value = p_val,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
  }
  
  # Combine into table
  if (length(axis_info_list) > 0) {
    axis_table <- do.call(rbind, axis_info_list)
    
    # Format p-values
    axis_table$Significance <- case_when(
      axis_table$p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      axis_table$p_value < 0.01 ~ "**", 
      axis_table$p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      axis_table$p_value < 0.1 ~ ".",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
    
    axis_table$p_formatted <- ifelse(
      axis_table$p_value < 0.001, 
      "< 0.001", 
      ifelse(is.na(axis_table$p_value),
             "NA",
             sprintf("%.3f", axis_table$p_value))
    )
    
    # Round values for display
    axis_table$Eigenvalue <- round(axis_table$Eigenvalue, 6)
    axis_table$Variance_Percent <- round(axis_table$Variance_Percent, 1)
    axis_table$Cumulative_Percent <- round(axis_table$Cumulative_Percent, 1)
    axis_table$F_statistic <- round(axis_table$F_statistic, 6)
    
    # Create a formatted version that matches your screenshot
    formatted_table <- data.frame(
      Dataset = axis_table$Dataset,
      Model_Type = rep("Environmental", nrow(axis_table)),
      Axis = axis_table$Axis,
      Eigenvalue = axis_table$Eigenvalue,
      Variance_Percent = axis_table$Variance_Percent,
      Cumulative_Percent = axis_table$Cumulative_Percent,
      F_statistic = axis_table$F_statistic,
      P_Value = axis_table$p_formatted,
      Significance = axis_table$Significance,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    cat("\nFormatted table created with", nrow(formatted_table), "rows\n")
    print(formatted_table)
    
    # Export to CSV
    write.csv(formatted_table, 
              "Table_S5c_dbRDA_Axis_Information.csv", 
              row.names = FALSE)
    cat("✓ Table S5c exported to CSV\n")
    
    return(formatted_table)
  } else {
    cat("No axis information available.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Run the function with eDNA models
table_S5c_edna <- create_dbrda_axis_significance_table(edna_dbrda_models)
```

# =======================================
# ------- Geo dist vs. Env dist ---------
# ----- Mantel, Partial Mantel, MRM -----
# =======================================

# Set up
```{r}
# Load required packages
library(vegan)    # for mantel tests
```
